Name: Objectif Québec !
Description:
Objectif Québec !, expert en stratégie d’expatriation vers le Québec, accompagne les français dans leur projet grâce à un accompagnement personnalisé. 

Nos distinctions ? 

 Un accompagnement personnalisé, adapté à chaque projet, afin de concevoir une stratégie d’expatriation sur mesure qui répond à vos aspirations et objectifs.

 L’académie d’Objectif Québec ! ouvre les portes d’une communauté de personnes engagées et leaders de leur projet et donne accès à une formation en 13 modules thématiques vidéos, à des interventions d'experts québécois et à un guide pas à pas. Le tout visant à préparer le candidat pour son expatriation au Québec. 

 La mise en relation avec des partenaires experts : emploi, formation, déménagement, études, finances, immobilier…

Nous sommes également les fiers initiateurs du Mois du Québec, un événement sans précédent où nous venons à la rencontre des français chaque année, dans plusieurs grandes villes, depuis plus de 5 ans.

Adhérez et rejoignez la communauté d’Objectif Québec !

Name: RiseUp
Description:
RiseUp is a platform that connects startups to the most relevant resources, worldwide.

Working relentlessly from the heart of AFRICA-GCC-EUROPE, RiseUp creates environments that encourage startup ecosystem stakeholders to exchange the 7 resources any startup needs to grow: Know-how, Talent, Funding, Marketplace, Media, Toolbox and Inspiration.

RiseUp does this through our range of digital and event products, the most prominent of which is RiseUp Summit, MENA's largest entrepreneurship event.

RiseUp Summit ’24 saw a gathering of 14000+ attendees from 53 countries who spent 3 days participating in sessions, workshops, talks, and chats by 260 international speakers. More than 250 startups participated as exhibitors or at the pitch events, aiming to impress 190+ investors. As a grassroots event, we pooled the resources of 90 partners to help build the Summit. !

Name: Yönetim Kurulunda Kadın Derneği  - Women on Boards Türkiye
Description:
Yönetim Kurulunda Kadın, ekonomimizi yönlendiren kurumlarımızın en üst karar mercilerinde daha fazla kadın olabilmesi için başlatılmış bir inisiyatiftir.

Yönetim Kurulunda Kadın programı, ekonomimizi yönlendiren kurumlarımızın en üst karar mercilerinde daha fazla kadın olabilmesi için başlatılmış bir inisiyatiftir. Liderlik gelişimi konusunda uzman Praesta Türkiye ve Orta Doğu ofisi ile Forbes Türkiye dergisi işbirliğiyle ve iş dünyamızdaki liderlerinin gönüllü katılımıyla yürütülen bu program, başarıyla tamamladığı birinci döneminin ardından gelişerek yoluna devam etmektedir.

Çeşitlilik konusu, demokrasilerde olduğu gibi ekonomilerde de sağlıklı ve bütünsel karar mekanizmaları oluşturabilmek için kaçınılmazdır. Üniversite mezuniyetinde ve işe giriş pozisyonlarında popülasyonun yarısını oluşturan kadınların en üst karar noktası olan yönetim kurullarında tüm dünyada (kota sahibi ülkeler hariç) %5 ila %15 arasında yer almaları, ekonomik, sosyal ve toplumsal alanlar için büyük risk taşımaktadır. Yönetim Kurulunda Kadın programı da “şirketlerarası mentorluk” uygulaması sayesinde birçok hedefe aynı anda ulaşabilmektedir.

SPK’nın yönetim kurullarında %25 kadın üye oranını hedeflediği bu dönemde, bir yandan donanımlı ve bu alanda görev almaya hevesli kadın aday havuzumuzu geliştirirken, öte yandan birinci dönemi tamamlamış olan kadın adaylarımızın yönetim kurullarına atanabilmeleri için çalışmalarımıza devam etmekteyiz.

Description: Platform Calgary brings together the resources of Calgary's tech ecosystem to help startups launch and grow. Through collaboration and targeted programming, we are a hub and an engine for technology-focused economic diversification and job creation.

Description: Black Wall Street promotes thought leadership and provides access to capital networks for minority entrepreneurs to increase diversity within the technology and entrepreneurial ecosystem.

Name: Breakthrough ACTION
Description: Breakthrough ACTION is USAID’s flagship program for social and behavior change (SBC). Breakthrough ACTION ignites collective action and encourages people to adopt healthier behaviors—from using modern contraceptive methods and sleeping under bed nets to being tested for HIV—by forging, testing, and scaling up new and hybrid approaches to SBC.

Name: Kickstart Innovation
Description:
Kickstart is one of Europe's largest zero equity, multi-corporate ecosystem innovation platforms that runs a scale-up program for later-stage startups with a goal to accelerate deep tech innovation. 

Science and engineering driven technologies have the potential to solve humanity’s biggest challenges. They require unprecedented collaboration between established organizations and the most audacious entrepreneurs out there. Thereby, Kickstart is committed to building an innovation ecosystem that brings high-growth startups, corporates, cities, foundations and universities together. 

Each year Kickstart brings around 100 startups to Switzerland to collaborate with key players for proofs-of-concept, pilot projects and other innovation partnerships. The program provides exceptional access to the executives and decision-makers of Kickstart’s partners.

Being an initiative of Impact Hub Zürich and launched by digitalswitzerland in 2015, Kickstart runs 5 verticals (New Work & Learning, Finance & Insurance, Food & Retail, Smart Cities and Health & Wellbeing), an Intrapreneurship Academy and the Circular Economy Initiative.

Name: Texas Medical Center Innovation Factory
Description:
Texas Medical Center Innovation Factory is shaping the future of health care by uniting promising innovators with the best minds in science and medicine at the member institutions of the Texas Medical Center.

Located in a former cookie factory, TMC Innovation is home to the Healthtech Accelerator, TMC Biodesign, TMC Accelerator for Cancer Therapeutics, Johnson & Johnson Innovation (JLABS@TMC), Center for Device Innovation, and ABB Robotics for Healthcare.

Sign up for the TMC Innovation newsletter and be the first to know about events, community updates, and accelerator opportunities: https://share.hsforms.com/1LusKpseUTX69HQiydeb9fw4g43p

Name: 360 Health Systems Diagnostics and Correction
Description:
360 HSDC is a holistic health-based development organization, focused on addressing disparities, poor health systems, and the inequalities in accessing health care services to under-served communities in Nigeria. We utilize innovative technology to address health-related challenges in the development sector.

We provide tailored and integrated responses to public health issues by leveraging relevant resources and partnerships to ensure these issues are addressed in a targeted and yet comprehensive manner. In collaboration with global and national entities we conduct needs assessments of Health Management Information Systems (HMIS), and provide sustainable solutions to health-based challenges in Nigeria.

Name: ROWAD Foundation
Description: Founded in 2013 in Sana’a, Yemen; ROWAD started by a few Yemeni entrepreneurs who sought the need for serious efforts to engage Yemeni young businessmen/businesswomen and entrepreneurs in a constructive way to create an encouraging and productive Entrepreneurship Ecosystem in Yemen. Since then, ROWAD grew to be one of the most active, and most effective organizations working in the business development and entrepreneurship areas in Yemen.

Name: Badir Program
Description:
يعد برنامج بادر لحاضنات التقنية الذي تم تأسيسه في عام 2007م، أحد برامج مدينة الملك عبد العزيز للعلوم والتقنية، وهو برنامج وطني شامل يسعى إلى تفعيل وتطوير حاضنات الأعمال التقنية.

برنامج بادر مفتوح لجميع رواد أعمال التقنية السعوديين، ممن لديهم أعمال تقنية في مراحلها المبكرة أو نماذج مبدئية أو ما يدل على فكرة المنتج. 

BADIR means “Initiate” in Arabic and the BADIR program opens the door on business development support to people who have a viable technology idea that can be commercialized into a business opportunity.

King Abdulaziz City for Science and Technology (KACST), the National Research Institute of Saudi Arabia, created the BADIR innovation and technology program to meet some of the objectives of the National Technology and Science Plan.

Name: HF Solutions

Nos especializamos en sistemas transaccionales y plataformas mobile. Entregamos soluciones escalables de manera integral a través de la creación de valor.

Name: Columbia Venture Community
Description:
Founded in 2006, the Columbia Venture Community is a private, global network of more than 7,500 Columbia University alumni, students, and staff who are interested in all aspects of entrepreneurship, tech, and innovation.

Our mission is to foster entrepreneurship within the Columbia innovation ecosystem by facilitating communication, providing access to resources, and creating a vibrant and supportive community. To this end, we promote in-person and virtual events in cities around the globe, including happy hours, startup pitch events, incubation seminars, speaker panels, webinars, dinners, and more.

Individuals must possess a Columbia email address (UNI) to join our official member platform: https://www.meetup.com/ColumbiaVC/

CVC is classified as a 'Shared Interest Group' (SIG) and endorsed by Columbia University.

https://www.meetup.com/ColumbiaVC/

Name: Progressive Intercultural Community Services (PICS) Society
Description:
Progressive Intercultural Community Services (PICS) Society is a registered non-profit society in good standing with annual reports and other required documents filed and up to date with the BC Registrar of Societies. We are a United Way Agency with PCTIA certification. As a community services society we provide various programs and services including Employment Programs, Settlement Services, Language Services, Social Programs and Housing Services. Our services assist new immigrants, seniors, farm workers, women and youth. We work diligently to provide responsive programs that address various issues within our community by promoting harmony and intercultural understanding for the purpose of building a more inclusive and mutually respectful society.

Our Society’s revenues now come from private, individuals, organizations, government, diverse foundations, BC Gaming Branch and United Way of the Lower Mainland. To remain effective and dynamic, we continue to build on our strengths in partnerships within the South Asian community. We have grown to offer a wide range of employment programs, housing services, and social programs.

Description: Mestrelab Research (Mestrelab) is a leading software development company specializing in innovative solutions for analytical chemistry. We provide advanced tools that empower scientists and researchers in areas such as NMR, LC/GC-MS, and optical spectroscopy, offering capabilities for data analysis and interpretation, workflow automation, electronic lab notebooks (ELNs), and AI-ready data preparation. With a team of nearly 90 professionals spanning Spain, Europe, Asia, and the USA, Mestrelab is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of scientific software, helping researchers tackle complex challenges and achieve their goals with greater efficiency and precision.

Name: Mandela Washington Fellowship Alumni Association of Nigeria
Description: The Mandela Washington Fellowship Association of Nigeria (MWFAAN) is a body of young African leaders with its membership drawn from all sectors of the economy (and classified under Business and Entrepreneurship, Civic Leadership, Public Management and Energy tracks) as beneficiaries of the US State Department Initiative – Mandela Washington Fellowship for Young African Leaders Initiative (YALI). These notable and distinguished young leaders are currently championing various projects and initiatives that are capable of redefining socio-economic landscape of Nigeria and African continent with supports from country governments and corporate organizations across Africa since inception to date. The Nigerian arm of the alumni network is believed to be the largest and strongest youth network in Africa, it consists of 490 Mandela Washington Fellows from 2014 till date

Name: Platform WOW
Description:
Platform WOW is een platform van èn voor (vaar)wegbeheerders en waterbeheerders bij het rijk, provincies, gemeenten, waterschappen en drinkwaterbedrijven. De letters WOW staan voor Wegbeheerders ontmoeten Wegbeheerders en voor Water ontmoet Water.

Name: Triangle Women in STEM
Description:
Triangle Women in STEM is a volunteer organization creating an integrated ecosystem to recruit, engage, and advance women in STEM in their career, educational, and personal pursuits. Led by university and business leaders, it is a partnership between Triangle industry, universities, nonprofits and government to build a diverse community with activities that promote, value, and support women in STEM.
Our goal is to establish North Carolina’s Research Triangle region as the preeminent destination for women in STEM.

Name: National Graphene2D Association
Description: The National Graphene2D Association (NGA2D) is the leading organization in the U.S. advocating and promoting the commercialization of graphene and graphene-like materials. Graphene2D is focused on addressing critical issues such as policy and standards development which impact effective integration of graphene and graphene-like materials globally. Graphene2D brings together current and future graphene stakeholders — entrepreneurs, organizations, researchers, developers and suppliers, as well as investors, venture capitalists and government agencies — in order to drive innovation, and to promote and facilitate the commercialization of graphene 2D products and technologies.

Name: YearBeyond
Description:
YearBeyond, or YeBo, is a Youth Service partnership between the Western Cape Government, The Community Chest of the Western Cape, the Michael and Susan Dell Foundation and numerous NGOs. It aims to provide 18 to 25 year-olds with a meaningful work experience and a pathway to further studies or work while at the same time encouraging a culture of active citizenship and volunteerism.

Youth unemployment remains one of South Africa’s biggest challenges. Despite increasing access to education, almost half of the learners who enter school in grade 1 do not obtain a matric. Young people who do complete their schooling but come from disadvantaged backgrounds continue to have fewer post-school opportunities and are more likely to end up not in employment, education or training (NEET).

Data further highlights that the longer a young person stays out of work, the lower their chances of ever working, and the higher the likelihood that they will stay trapped in poverty. 

Experts note that the multiple barriers that give rise to high youth unemployment are interconnected and should be addressed holistically for the best outcomes.

In 2015, YearBeyond was started as a flagship programme of the Western Cape Youth Development Strategy.  It aims to link young people not in employment, education or training to increased economic opportunity.  YearBeyond provides participants with a meaningful work experience, a pathway into studies or work and a social and economic network. 

This programme trains bright and motivated young people to serve as teacher assistants and tutors running after school literacy and numeracy programmes for grade 3 and 4 learners in under-resourced schools across the Western Cape. Operating in almost 100 low and no-fee schools across the province, YeBo deploys 500 young people who serve 8 000 learners annually. 

In 2018 and 2020 the programme expanded to YeBo Scouting and Data Administration respectively.

Name: Age Friendly Ireland
Description:
Age Friendly Ireland is the organisation responsible for the national Age Friendly Shared Service, affiliated to the World Health Organization’s [WHO] Global Network of Age Friendly Cities and Communities. The programme involves a multiagency, multi-sectoral approach to age-related planning and service provision. Age Friendly Ireland supports cities and counties to be more inclusive of older people by addressing their expressed concerns and interests under the eight pillars of the World Health Organization’s global programme. The Age Friendly Business Recognition Programme offers training, and encourages low cost or no cost changes to make a business more Age Friendly and eligible to receive an Age Friendly Charter.
Age Friendly Ireland operates as a shared service centre of local government hosted by Meath County Council. The shared service centre supports a network of 31 local Age Friendly Programmes which are led by local authorities and which involve many stakeholders from other public bodies, universities, community/voluntary and private sector partners. The shared service supports a number of strategic national structures and provides technical guidance to its networks.
Within the framework of the WHO’s Age Friendly Cities and Communities model, city and county based stakeholders are making commitments to shared action plans addressing pillars spanning housing, our health services, built environment, transport and employment. Under the leadership of
the local authority, governance is anchored in the multi-agency Age-Friendly Alliances, supported by broadly representative Older People’s Councils actively engaged as co-design partners.

Name: Alloy Development Co.
Description:
Alloy Development Co. is a commercial lender, startup incubator operator, and economic development partner based in Cincinnati, Ohio. We help organizations, businesses, and communities grow by providing access to capital, entrepreneurial programs, and strategic development support.

Our integrated model—commercial capital + startup growth + economic development—makes us a uniquely effective partner for growth at every stage, from early-stage founders to established businesses and community-led development initiatives.

Name: U-LEAD with Europe
Description:
U-LEAD with Europe: Ukraine – Local Empowerment, Accountability and Development Programme

It is a multi-donor action of the European Union and its Member States Germany, Poland, Sweden, Denmark, Estonia and Slovenia. 

U-LEAD with Europe contributes to the establishment of multilevel governance that is transparent, accountable and responsive to the needs of the population.

The Programme’s specific objective is to enhance the capacities of key actors at national, regional and local levels to further implement Ukraine’s decentralisation and related regional policy reforms, and to contribute to defining the functions for each level of government within specific policy areas.

Partner: Ministry of Development of Communities and Territories of Ukraine (MinRegion)

Name: VMK Holding
Description:
A VMK Holding foi fundada em 2020 com intuito de administrar e promover o crescimento saudável e sólido de unidades de diversos seguimentos na área de serviços.
Atuamos principalmente como holding e gestora de franquias do Grupo TODOS Empreendimentos, com unidades do Cartão de TODOS (cartão de benefícios) e AMORSAÚDE (clínicas médico odontológicas). Também realizamos investimentos em empreendimentos imobiliários e venture capital em empresas de impacto socioambiental.
Com sede em Ribeirão Preto, a empresa nasceu para administrar mais de 60 unidades de negócio que contam com 1600 colaboradores na ponta, entregando cuidado e qualidade aos nossos clientes em diversas regiões do país.
Guiada por uma equipe de liderança com ampla experiência - e aderindo a uma filosofia consistente e humana - a VMK constrói a estrutura e o time necessários para maximizar o desenvolvimento de nossas unidades pautada na Administração Solidária.
A holding compartilha dos valores do Cartão de TODOS e acredita que respeito, determinação e empenho são o caminho para o sucesso.

Name: UK Lebanon Tech Hub
Description:
UK Lebanon Tech Hub is a UK Government Initiative spearheaded by @DCMS through #dcmstechhubs and @UKinLebanon to help grow Lebanon's tech ecosystem. The UKLTH is powered by @NucleusVentures

UKLTH exists to grow local economies and connect low-density ecosystems to global markets. We create opportunities for growth, profitability & impact by engaging industry, talent, and finance through our Acceleration and Corporate Finance programs.

Name: Tekus | Comunicación Digital
Description:
Tekus es una empresa colombiana dedicada a desarrollar soluciones tecnológicas con alto valor agregado para diferentes mercados: retail, moda, restaurantes, salud, educación, industria, comercio, gobierno, etc. 

Con su plataforma propia de Digital Signage, Tekus ha mejorado la efectividad y gestión de las comunicaciones internas y en puntos de venta de cientos de empresas en 16 países de América.

Esta plataforma se integra de manera total con los sistemas de información de cada cliente, permitiéndoles tener control total de los contenidos en pantallas, kioscos, tablets, videowalls, etiquetas electrónicas, entre otros.

Con nuestras soluciones de señalización digital y experiencias interactivas ofrecemos un servicio completo y de gran impacto, que ayudan a nuestros clientes en el ahorro de procesos logísticos, aumento de su productividad, mejor manejo de sus inventarios, mayor impacto en su comunicación y percepción de sus servicios ante el usuario final o a sus mismos empleados.

Adicionalmente, contamos con un servicio de publicidad digital DOOH en nuestra red de más de 7900 pantallas en Latinoamérica y Estados Unidos.

Tekus ha sido nombrada como una de las empresas de tecnología más importantes de Colombia, en la categoría de Martech, destacándose por sus desarrollos y soluciones innovadoras adaptadas a las necesidades de las diferentes industrias y mercados.

Name: Women in Tech World (WiTWorld)
Description:
We are a grassroots, volunteer-run organization dedicated to creating community-driven plans and educational programming to support and advance women in tech.. Our mission is to activate communities through community-driven plans and action-oriented educational programming.

We’ve listened to over 1,600 voices from Canadian women and men in the tech industry, resulting in the largest qualitative data set about women in the Canadian tech space. Qualitative research uncovers trends in thought and opinion, allowing us to dive deeper into the problem.

Women in Tech World is both collaborative and inclusive, and welcomes all professionals in tech, including stakeholders, advocates, and allies.

Name: hes - Inovação

O nosso objetivo é a evolução tecnológica do cliente, através da criação de ferramentas personalizadas, que vão de encontro às suas expectativas.

Name: Urbantech
Description: Urbantech is a non-equity, pilot-focused accelerator program for startups within the urbantech space, hosted in Copenhagen, Denmark.

Name: ROStartup
Description:
ROStartup is the umbrella organization that represents and brings together the Romanian startup ecosystem.

Our independent organization, unique in Romania, brings together startup founders, investors, public authorities, policymakers, startup program organizers, and other key entities.

We believe that Romania has the potential to become one of the leading startup hubs, both in the CEE region and at the European level. We also believe that a clear common vision, joint actions, multi-actor collaboration, value co-creation, and knowledge transfer are the foundation for establishing a strong and competitive national entrepreneurial ecosystem. Our vision is to enable Romania to contribute to global innovation through startup disruption.

As the central hub for the ecosystem, we will provide a comprehensive array of activities, including capacity-building programs, policy advocacy, international outreach, and financial support mechanisms for startup enablers.

Building upon the ROStartup initiative created in June 2020, we aim to facilitate a nurturing environment where startup enablers can thrive and collaborate.

Join us! https://rostartup.com/

Name: Makers Unite
Description:
Makers Unite is a platform for social inclusion providing equal opportunities to newcomers & locals by making products with a story that matters.

We believe that making together leads to dialogue and trust. By the power of making we connect people to real opportunities. By offering people a physical place to meet, and a valuable activity, their social network grows. In co-design we transform the life vests into new products, which are worth having. 

Makers Unite has designed an effective social inclusion programme based on collaboratively creating sustainable products. While getting to know each other, participants discover their talents, ambitions and how to connect to local networks.

We connect participants to our extensive network of partners, educational institutions and companies to guide them to the next step as an active citizen. 

We share the stories of newcomers to the public by selling our collection of fashion and lifestyle products made of life vests. Newcomers have the opportunity to tell their own story at (open) making workshops with schools, companies and organisations.

Nous accompagnons également les organisations publiques désireuses d'intégrer la pratique évaluative en leur sein.

Pour sa création et mise en oeuvre, le PIFED a bénéficié de l’appui financier d'Affaires mondiales Canada et est également un partenaire associé à la Global Evaluation Initiative (GEI), une initiative internationale pilotée par l’IEG de la Banque mondiale et le PNUD et visant le développement des capacités en évaluation.

Name: P&L Nordic AB
Description:
Företaget
P&L Nordic AB bildades 1988 och vi har haft en stadig kurva uppåt sedan start. Vi har attraherat nya stora kunder i en jämn fart. Ett tryggt, men spännande, företag att jobba i.

Vi brinner för utveckling 
Vårt löfte till våra kunder är att alltid erbjuda de bästa metoderna för utveckling av kompetens och engagemang. Vi vill ligga i framkant inom mjukvara och pedagogik och därför utvecklar vi oss ständigt inom dessa område. 

Vi vill ge EKO
Med EKO beskriver vi för oss själva hur vi vill leva våra liv på jobbet. E står för Enkelhet, K för Kompetens och O för Omtanke. 
Vi vill få mottagaren att förstå även komplexa samband. Med hög kompetens, och omtanke, bygger vi bland annat avancerade simulatorer för maximal inlärning. 

Våra kunder
Vi har många av Sveriges största, och börsnoterade, företag som kunder. Vi anser att det bästa sättet att utveckla ett företag är att ha krävande kunder. Detta är en mycket viktig del i vår verksamhet och ger många av våra medarbetare stora möjligheter att utvecklas.

Våra medarbetare
Våra medarbetare har utbildningar och erfarenhet inom vitt spridda områden men har utveckling av människor och organisationer som gemensam drivkraft. Att kunna samarbeta, och att stödja varandra, är viktiga egenskaper.

Vårt ledarskap
Vårt ledarskap bygger också på EKO. Genom att förenkla organisationen, förtydliga ansvaren och att tro på att människor vill och kan ta ansvar vill vi ge alla chansen att göra ett bra jobb. Det hoppas vi är en av de viktigaste orsakerna till att man vill gå till jobbet med ett leende. Varje dag.

Våra produkter
Competence Tool och LearnWARE bildar idag tillsammans marknadens mest effektiva eko-system för utveckling av människor på jobbet. Många av Sveriges större företag har implementerat dessa för att öka kompetens och engagemang i verksamheten. 
Vi arbetar med att höja både kompetens och engagemang hos våra kunder. Och det har visat sig vara lönsamt för våra kunder, och därmed bra för oss.

Name: HamperBlock
Description:
https://linktr.ee/hamperblock
HAMPERBLOCK contiene un modelo de negocio basado en la inversión de activos (criptomonedas y otros) en carteras descentralizadas, con la intención de ofrecer la posibilidad de invertir en el ecosistema DeFi a gente que quiere hacerlo pero que no tiene los conocimientos suficientes como para hacerlo. HAMPER BLOCK ha creado una plataforma que, entre otros usos, emitirá tokens intrínsecos del propio modelo.

El objetivo de esta Dapp es crear una plataforma donde los usuarios puedan aprender, formarse e invertir en carteras descentralizadas (con diferentes riesgos). La plataforma tiene una parte gamificada donde se podrá ir adquiriendo conocimientos de forma divertida y amena.

Para conseguirlo, se ha creado formación específica que irá adaptándose a las nuevas necesidades requeridas por el mercado. Además, se ha desarrollado un juego dentro la plataforma para fomentar el aprendizaje de forma interactiva y divertida, de modo que el usuario progrese de forma escalonada.

A parte, se han desarrollado diferentes carteras de inversión, compuestas por activos de mayor y menor riesgo, para todos aquellos clientes que posean mejores conocimientos o, simplemente, quieran invertir directamente. Todo esto ha sido creado con tecnología blockchain.

Entre 2012 y 2021, el precio de Bitcoin ha aumentado en más de un 540.000%. Bitcoin alcanzó una tasa de crecimiento anual del 274% en 2020 y se prevé que el mercado de las criptomonedas tenga una tasa de crecimiento anual compuesta del 56,4% desde 2019 a 2025. Por lo tanto, todavía queda recorrido para beneficiarnos del mercado.

Name: STrategic Alliances boosting Railway Smes (STARS)
Description:
STARS is a project funded by the European Union's COSME Programme which addresses all aspects related to the uptake of advanced technologies for the delivery of Railway-related innovations by SMEs. Approaching technologies such as Artificial Intelligence, Blockchain, Big data, Internet of Things, IT for Mobility, Cybersecurity, Advanced Manufacturing, Advanced materials, will boost competitiveness of our European SMEs towards the Railway & Multimodality meta-ecosystem, which is strategically important for the European Industrial Transformation and Resilience.

STARS4TRACE is the service designed for STARS project which enables the railway SMEs to exchange digital assets representing physical goods in a way which promotes a transparent and auditable business.

All the operations representing  the SME's business processes are recorded on the network and they are digitally signed and sealed by a double layer infrastructure. The first layer is a distributed network relying on the Partners taking part in the project. The second one is a public blockchain which enhance data integrity. Both the networks are fully open for the connection and  the inspection while preserving the privacy of the data of the partecipants.Many use cases are supported, from the KANBAN production model to the prototype development, but we foresee that new cases will arise during the development of the STARS project and the uptaking of the new technologies.

Med Wexers grundmodul Wengine blir våra kundprojekt kostnadseffektiva eftersom vi aldrig behöver starta från noll. Wengine är en mångsidig och kraftfull plattform för att bygga säljstöd, kundportaler eller CPQ lösningar (configure, price, quote), lösningar som kan bli till exempel en konfigurator för både interna och externa ändamål.

För att få ett säljstödsystem, ett säljverktyg eller ett CPQ-verktyg riktigt bra behöver det vara bra på att kommunicera med andra system. Wengine kan enkelt integreras med till exempel Monitor ERP, Lime CRM, HubSpot CRM, Fortnox eller direkt med en uppkopplad maskin. 

I Wengine kan en kundportal eller säljverktyg också kombineras med visualisering i 2D eller 3D i exempelvis DynaMaker. Givetvis kan Wengine också importera och exportera via Excel, JSON eller XML.

Välkommen att starta samtal med oss för digitalisering av era affärsprocesser.

Name: Sandbox Communities LLC
Description:
Why We Exist:
Our continued ascendance as a species depends upon solving increasingly complex challenges. These breakthroughs do not happen in a vacuum. Rather, they are the natural result of connecting subject matter experts from different disciplines to learn from, inspire, and collaborate with each other. We exist to create these connections. 

What We Do:
We create social environments within research parks and mixed-use innovation districts that lead to game-changing breakthroughs. Through engaging events, collaborative spaces, and compelling media content, we forge a density of shared experiences that leads to trust and collaboration. 


Who We Are:
We hire, reward, and develop our team members by placing the greatest emphasis on being:
-> Trustworthy - We honor our commitments with honesty and integrity
-> Inventive - We forge new paths with a balance of playful curiosity and pragmatism
->  Drive - We are proactive self starters who can assemble and lead teams to achieve shared goals


How We Operate:
Every community is different having its own unique resources, challenges, and opportunities. To spark the connections possible, we focus on a four-step approach:
1. Observation and Research 
We adopt the mind of the beginner, taking note of the people, organizations, resources, and efforts already in place and what unmet needs exist.

2. Frugal Experimentation
We test our gut instincts when it comes to new ideas and initiatives with simple tests before scaling them.

3. Clarity from Feedback Loops
We need to seek honest feedback from ourselves, customers, and others. Pain is a signal for growth; self-delusion must be cleansed away by the clarity of what it is, not what we want it to be. 	

4. Quality Core Experiences
We cannot be all things to all people. We find core experiences that set us apart from the market. Not only do we deliver them at the highest quality each time, we seek ways to make them better over time.

Name: Baliyo Nepal Nutrition Initiative
Description:
Baliyo Nepal Nutrition Initiative (BNNI) is an autonomous, not-for-profit company governed by an independent board. BNNI was initiated as a response to the urgent need of action required to address the alarming issue of malnutrition, especially, stunting, by promoting the consumption of nutritious food among Nepali people. 
The Baliyo Nepal Movement, a national initiative of BNNI, is a collaborative approach to support Nepal in reducing its acute malnutrition indicators (stunting and wasting) as per the national SDG & MSNP II goals by instigating behavior transformation - Generating demands of nutritious foods and Shifting food industry practices to meet this demand in order to make nutritious foods affordable, available and accessible.
BNNI aims to create a market for nutritious food products, ensuring their availability and affordability to the people and spreading nutrition awareness in communities by delivering interventions for nutrition improvement by engaging the Supply side (Technology and Business Support), Demand side (Awareness, Livelihood and Sports) and Regulatory side (Advocacy and Capacity building). Under the movement, BNNI is uniting private sector companies (food and non-food), government line agencies, influencers and community role models, development partners as well as civil society organizations are collectively united to serve the purpose of tackling malnutrition.

Name: SÖZ
Description:
2003 yılında, “yaşamın farkında ve yaşama duyarlı çocuklar yetişmesine katkıda bulunmak için” sloganı ile çıktığımız yolculukta 25 Kurumsal Marka, 5 Müze, 12 Sivil Toplum Örgütü için yerel, ulusal, dönemsel ve uzun soluklu projeler geliştirdik. Markalar ve çocukları buluşturan projelerin yanında, araştırmalar ve yayınlar yaptık. 

2015 yılında çalışma alanlarımıza Psikolojik Danışmanlık hizmetlerini ekledik. 

Markalarla çalışma deneyimlerimizi genişletmeyi, geliştirmeyi ve dönüştürmeyi hayal ettik. Markalar için araştırma modelleri geliştirmek, markaya ait arketipleri analiz etmek, tüketicinin bilinçdışı süreçlerine yönelik toplanan verileri analiz ederek içgörüler oluşturmak, bu içgörüleri, özel stratejilere ya da hikayelere dönüştürmek amacıyla 2020 yılında Two Point Zero adı altında marka ajansımızı kurduk. 

Dünyanın hızlı değişimine paralel olarak, bireyleri, girişimleri ve markaları yeni bir geleceğin beklediğini, geleceğin, yeni düşünme biçimlerini ve farklı donanımları gerektirdiğini gördük. Bireyleri, girişimleri, markaları dünyanın bu yeni versiyonuna hazırlamak, bireylerin öğrenme yolculuğuna rehberlik etmek, girişimlerini desteklemek, markalarına derin bir bakış kazandırmalarını sağlayacak beceriler kazandırmak amacıyla online eğitim platformu Akademi 2.0’ı kurduk. 

Projelerimizi, uzmanlık alanlarımız olan psikoloji ve sosyoloji temelinde tasarlarken, nörobilimin ve dijital teknolojinin sunduğu yeni bilgi ve donanımlarla kendimizi yenilemeye devam ediyoruz.

Name: TransitieTeam Zeeland
Description:
TransitieTeam Zeeland is het leiderschaps- en ontwikkelingsprogramma van en voor Zeeland, powered by: Zeeuws Instrituut voor Organisatieontwikkeling, De Zeeuwse Connectie & Better Future.

De economische en sociale ontwikkeling van Zeeland valt of staat bij de kwaliteit en motivatie van haar toekomstige leiders. Die toekomstige leiders uit de diverse Zeeuwse sectoren vinden elkaar in Transitie Team Zeeland. Hierin gaan Zeeuwse high potentials anderhalf jaar lang samen ‘op reis’ met als doel: 
- persoonlijke ontwikkeling, 
- organisatie ontwikkeling en 
- gezamenlijk werken aan Zeeuwse vraagstukken 

Daarnaast worden de deelnemers onderdeel van een waardevol cross-sectoraal Zeeuws netwerk, binnen het totaal van De Zeeuwse Connectie. 

Naar een hoger doel
Transitie Team Zeeland is een ‘life changing experience': de reis brengt de deelnemers op een hoger bewustzijnsniveau waaruit een fundamentele verandering op persoonsniveau groeit. De teamleden leren anders naar zichzelf en hun motieven te kijken en dat brengt hen naar het reisdoel: het stimuleren van maatschappelijke betrokkenheid en oprechte interesse in mensen, organisaties en de samenleving. Dit leidt tot een vorm van dienstbaar leiderschap die waarde creëert voor het individu, organisaties en de Zeeuwse samenleving. 

Transitie Team Zeeland is een initiatief van Zeeuws Instituut voor Organisatieontwikkeling (ZIO), stichting De Zeeuwse Connectie en Better Future en werkt samen met diverse Zeeuwse partijen. Het eerste Transitie Team Zeeland-traject is oktober gestart en eindigt december 2018. De volgende leergang start najaar 2018.

‘Het is niet het doel dat het succes bepaalt maar de reis zelf’

Meer weten?
Ga naar de pagina www.zeeuwseconnectie.nl/transitieteam
of mail naar: transitieteam@zeeuwseconnectie.nl

Name: Tetranomics
Description:
Tetranomics SE is dedicated to harnessing new technological capabilities and scientific methodologies to enable different economic actors to design, manage and evaluate businesses in a multi-dimensional responsibility. The company was founded by three partners – the Parmenides Foundation, Paradigmatic Innovations GmbH and M3TRIX GmbH – who combined their different but highly complementary competencies.

The Parmenides Foundation is a highly interdisciplinary research organization that was founded in 2001 with the task to understand better how the human brain copes with complexity. With approx. 240 scientists from 12 disciplines in its wider network, the Parmenides Foundation is likely the leading forum focused on studying the foundations and frontiers of complex human thinking.

Paradigmatic Innovations GmbH has the task of translating scientific findings regarding the structures and dynamics of human thinking into disruptive innovations. According to the HACROI criterion (Human And Commercial Return On Investment), four application fields have been chosen: Medicine & Healthcare, Education & Science, Economics & Sustainability, and last not least Democracy & Governance. Based on a joint pool of methodologies and tools it develops a novel type of "cognitive workbenches" for these four application domains.

M3TRIX GmbH is a research and consulting boutique that translates in-depth practical experience and basic scientific research into a novel type of advanced conceptual and practical support for companies in the field of sustainability.

Las experiencias inmersivas son entornos digitales (no reales) que hacen sentir al usuario dentro de ellas con estímulos interactivos; ideales para aprender, capacitar y explorar en ambientes que combinan la ciencia de datos, la inteligencia artificial y la creatividad.

DriVR - Simulador de realidad virtual enfocado a la seguridad vial en las empresas para la selección, capacitación y certificación de conductores de vehículos, a partir de un diagnóstico de riesgo de las competencias frente al volante en diferentes escenarios para evaluar y mejorar la conducción.

 LiftruckVR - Simulador de realidad virtual enfocado en el desarrollo de competencias en el manejo de montacargas, que le permite a nuestros clientes seleccionar y entrenar a sus operadores.

FactoryVR  - Simulador para la industria donde es posible capacitar con realidad virtual al personal en ambientes industriales sin exponerse a los riesgos. Algunos de los ambientes con los que contamos son refinerías, centrales eléctricas y sitios peligrosos, donde los operadores deben cumplir con procedimientos establecidos sin poner en peligro su vida.

ExecutionVR - Simulador de ejecución para especialistas de Trade Marketing donde podrán entender el flujo de personas y sus interacciones para tomar decisiones de marca, evaluarlas y calificar el performance del especialista.

Em suma: transforma em resultados positivos, a união entre os ambientes virtual e real, reforçando a informação, objeto do game.

Acima de tudo,  a gamificação, criando mecânicas e dinâmicas de jogos para engajar pessoas, resolver problemas e melhorar o aprendizado, faz parte das grandes corporações como ferramenta de marketing; portanto, está totalmente aliada a estratégia de marketing digital das empresas e instituições, criando um ambiente amigável para atrair, ensinar e treinar crianças, jovens e adultos e, como resultado, o engajamento do público é muito maio

Name: OneMama.org Non-Profit International Health Center Organization
Description:
The OneMama Organization is a self-sustaining medical clinic in Africa that promotes safe birthing environments, family and financial planning, as well as trade craft and agricultural education. With over ten years in the recruiting business, founder Siobhan Neilland has now translated for-profit core methodologies in to building an international nonprofit organization that utilizes these methodologies to organize a three-tier infrastructure for the OneMama Organization. After overcoming her own obstacles of illness, poverty and the loss of her child, she set out to create self-sustainable communities around the world in an effort to help the world render trife in to peace - empowering women to have a voice.

OneMama programs put special focus on women, specifically midwives who are often at the center of these impoverished communities. Women in late term pregnancy travel by foot for miles in order to give birth with a midwife they trust. At times, a single midwife nurtures all of the mothers and infants of an entire community- thus, quite literally being one mother for all: One Mama.

Our pilot program in Uganda consists of building an on-site, solar birthing and medical clinic where midwives can provide safe post and prenatal care to their patients as well as teach about family planning and economic sustainability. As OneMama grows, we will gradually replicate this program in 250 communities around the globe.

Get inspired today and become a OneMama Action Hero!

Doscar es una firma netamente española cuya actividad principal es el desarrollo, edición y distribución de aplicaciones de software de gestión, su posterior implantación en las empresas y la prestación de aquellos servicios post-venta necesarios para el correcto funcionamiento de las mismas. Cuenta con una amplia gama de productos dirigidos principalmente al mercado de las pequeñas y medianas empresas. La aplicación de su propia tecnología, junto con la elaboración de contenidos de una alta calidad, permiten a Doscar elaborar sus propios productos con garantía de éxito, compitiendo así con las grandes multinacionales del sector.

Nuestra experiencia desarrollando software de gestión para diferentes sectores, nos permite afirmar que somos conocedores de los problemas y necesidades de los clientes finales y de los distribuidores, consiguiendo de esta forma una gran simplicidad de manejo y la máxima potencia y eficacia de los programas, que se convierten así en verdaderas herramientas de trabajo sin crearle por ello nuevos problemas.

Name: Basecamp Foundation Kenya
Description:
Basecamp Foundation is a not for profit organization whose vision is to provide tourism based solutions for conservation and sustainable development in tourism destinations. Born out of Basecamp Explorers’ practical experience in championing a sustainable tourism concept that acknowledges the significance of local people and conservation in destination development, the Foundation provides a link between the non-economic and economic activities in tourism destinations.

Basecamp is an idea just as much as an organisation: An innovative and inspiring idea of developing destinations by approaching tourism and society in a holistic way, challenging traditional concepts of sustainability – and of business.

Basecamp Foundation (BCF) is part of the international Basecamp Group, operating within the global tourism industry. We constitute the Group’s implementing instrument for cultural and social development, within the context of sustainable destination development. Our counterpart and collaborator within the Group, Basecamp Explorer (BCE) is engaged with operating accommodation and offering adventures at chosen destinations, at the same time developing principles and demonstrating practises of responsible tourism.

Whereas BCE is a commercial enterprise operated according to sound business principles, BCF is an entirely non-profit endeavour building on a sustainability philosophy.

Name: BooSSST, vitaliteit op de werkvloer
Description:
BooSSST organiseert unieke vitaliteitsproeverijen voor jouw medewerkers waarbij we ze enthousiasmeren en verleiden om aan hun vitaliteit te werken. 
Denk hierbij aan interventies zoals een breinboossst, stress reduceren, talenten herkennen, mindfulness, bewegen, voeding etc. 
Samen met onze community van professionele BooSSST-ers zorgen wij voor een energieke dag waar we in overleg met jou de juiste thema's van vitaliteit programmeren op een laagdrempelige, luchtige én enthousiasmerende manier.
Eventueel aangekleed met een vitaliteitskermis, smoothie fiets, een lachsessie, een stoelmassage en mooie complimentenmeisjes. Een dag of een dagdeel, een vitaliteitsweek met dagelijks interventies of iedere maand een andere interventie, afhankelijk van de wensen en doelstellingen.
Dit concept werkt goed omdat er ook groepsbinding in zit. Je doet het als groep met elkaar en dus merk je positieve groepsdruk of sociale druk. Maar ook dat je het leuk hebt met elkaar. 
De fun-factor helpt bij het luchtig brengen van de kernboodschap van vitaliteitsmanagement. 
Deze proeverij-interventies zijn een combinatie van preventieve en amplitieve interventies en zetten aan tot een grotere bewustwording en doen een aanzet tot gedragsverandering. 
Aandacht voor gedragsverandering en de bewustwording die daarvoor nodig is, realiseer je niet in één dag maar alles wat je aandacht geeft, groeit!

Fysieke en mentale ontspanning verbeteren de persoonlijk vitaliteit, en zorgen voor een betere focus, rust en ontspanning. 
Vitale medewerkers zijn creatiever, werken beter samen en zijn innovatiever. 
Investeren in vitaliteit & werkgeluk loont op verschillende manieren; 
* Meer werkplezier, meer betrokkenheid betekent, dus minder verloop = kostenbesparing;
* Wanneer men zowel fysiek als mentaal in balans is, er minder ziekteverzuim is = kostenbesparing;
* Gezonde en betrokken medewerkers een hogere arbeidsproductiviteit opleveren = meer omzet

Name: Bianca Modo Foundation
Description:
The Bianca Modo Foundation is a mission-driven nonprofit organization dedicated to empowering and uplifting girls and young women, ages 14-25, who have been impacted by sexual violence, abuse, and human trafficking, as well as those at risk of exploitation. Our holistic approach combines the transformative power of art, leadership development, and faith-based healing to help survivors reclaim their confidence, purpose, and path to becoming global change-makers.

At the core of our work is a commitment to equipping and empowering young women to overcome trauma, cultivate resilience, and rise up as fearless leaders capable of transforming their communities. We provide a range of programs and services designed to support survivors and at-risk girls, including trauma-informed counseling, expressive arts therapy, mentorship, and leadership training.

In addition to our direct service work, we also engage in community education and advocacy efforts to raise awareness about the issues of sexual violence and human trafficking. We offer training and consulting services to corporations seeking to develop human rights policies and anti-trafficking initiatives, and we partner with schools, community organizations, and faith communities to provide prevention education to youth and families.

As a growing organization with a passionate and dedicated team, we are committed to creating a culture of empowerment, innovation, and continuous learning. We value diversity, equity, and inclusion, and we strive to create a supportive and collaborative environment where every team member can thrive and make a meaningful impact.

If you are a creative, compassionate, and driven individual who is passionate about empowering young women and working towards a world free from violence and exploitation, we encourage you to join our team. Together, we can create transformative change and help every girl and young woman tap into her full potential as a leader and change-maker.

Name: Flexlife Desenvolvimento de Software
Description:

A Flexlife possui parcerias com diversas empresas para o estudo e pesquisa na área de desenvolvimento, troca de experiências e tecnologia. O setor de treinamento se encarrega de realizar cursos, palestras e demonstrações dos softwares implantados, seja nas dependências da própria Flexlife ou na empresa do cliente. Com essa estrutura, a Flexlife divulga aos seus clientes todas as informações necessárias para o máximo aproveitamento do produto disponibilizado.

Missão
Ser inovador, desenvolver soluções ágeis e confiáveis.

Visão
 Criar soluções interativas, uniformizar os processos empresariais e estabelecer forte presença no mercado nacional.


Política
Postura ética, atitudes saudáveis, fazendo o outro se sentir valorizado, quando fazemos as pessoas que estão a nossa volta se sentir valorizada, adquirirmos sua confiança, consequentemente teremos mais um parceiro naquilo que desejamos obter. Além disso, com essa postura, é possível ajudar uma pessoa ou um grupo a conquistar seus próprios objetivos.

Nossa equipe

A Flexlife possui uma equipe qualificada para atender as necessidades do seu negócio, nossos consultores realizam um processo de imersão dentro da empresa contratante, adquirindo conhecimento do negócio do cliente, seu mercado, seu público-ativo, assim como as demais informações que se fizerem necessárias dentro desse processo de conhecimento da sua cadeia de valores, fatores fundamentais para a obtenção de ganhos e vantagens competitivas para o seu negócio.

Os consultores da Flexlife têm uma forte experiência no mercado em que atuam, aliado ao seu alto nível técnico, oferecem o melhor suporte para o desenvolvimento de suas práticas de gestão empresarial.

Name: NEPAD-IPPF
Description: NEPAD-IPPF is a multi-donor Special Fund hosted by the AfDB, which supports African countries to prepare regional infrastructure projects in energy, transport, ICT and transboundary water. It is currently supported by a number of Donors including Canada, Germany, UK, Spain, Norway and Denmark. Since its inception in 2005, NEPAD-IPPF has completed 55 grants  to prepare regional infrastructure projects resulting to 30 projects which have reached financial closure, mobilizing downstream investment of US 24,1 billion, thus, responding directly to Africa’s integration and development efforts.

Name: Estes Park Economic Development Corporation
Description:
The Estes Park EDC was established in August 2013 due to the recognized need for a sustained, systemic economic development effort for the Estes Valley and surrounding region. Economic development is an important component of the quality of life for all residents. 

The Estes Park Economic Development Corporation (Estes Park EDC) mission is to plan for and promote the economic development of the Estes Valley in ways that are compatible with those qualities that make Estes Park a unique mountain community. The Corporation exists to build a stronger and more broadly-based economy and tax base; to advise and assist existing local businesses to reach their full economic potential; and to attract new businesses that create primary jobs and new employment opportunities. 

Estes Park EDC Projects:

The Estes Park EDC Entrepreneur Center (E-Center) is the premier business incubator program in the Estes Valley. Through partnerships with Larimer SBDC and Innosphere Ventures, a successful 20-year business incubator with locations throughout Colorado, the Estes Park EDC E-Center provides customized, hands on assistance and business resources to Estes Valley startups and scale-ups.

As part of our continued strategic plan, the Estes Park EDC Board of Directors agreed to initiate a Business Expansion And Retention Program called the BEAR Program. The goal of this program is to directly work with and help our existing businesses grow. To do this we reach out to as broad a representation of businesses in our community as possible and meeting with them regularly.

Today, the Estes Park EDC helps facilitate private investment and public-private partnerships to address the workforce housing needs in the Estes Valley. The Workforce Housing Task Force includes the Town of Estes Park & The Estes Park Housing Authority.

Description:

ISN hadir sebagai penghubung antara pemerintah, lembaga beasiswa, organisasi, komunitas dan masyarakat dalam membantu pemerataan informasi dan pengembangan program “preparation” beasiswa serta membantu dalam mencari solusi dari berbagai polemik/ isu-isu permasalahan beasiswa yang ada di Indonesia.


ISN di launching pada saat kegiatan beasiswa terbesar di Indonesia pada tahun 2018 yaitu: World Indonesia Scholarship (WISH) Forum 2018 yang dilaksanakan di kompleks Kemendikbud RI pada tanggal 11 Agustus 2018. ISN terbentuk berdasarkan inisiatif dan hasil kolaborasi dari berbagai organisasi & komunitas yang peduli terhadap permasalahan beasiswa di Indonesia, antara lain: Komunitas Beasiswa Indonesia (Indonesian Scholarship Community), Sahabat Beasiswa, Mata Garuda LPDP, Ikatan Jurnalis Televisi Indonesia (IJTI), Aliansi Jurnalis Independen (AJI) Jakarta, Indorelawan, Indonesia Mengglobal, IYOIN (Indonesian Youth Opportunities in International Networking), Fakta Bahasa, Indonesian Diaspora Network (IDN) Global, dll

Dan pada tahun 2019 ISN kembali berkolaborasi dengan beberapa organisasi serta komunitas beasiswa seperti Mata Garuda LPDP, Indonesian Scholarship Community dan Sahabat Beasiswa mengadakan festival beasiswa yaitu World Indonesia Scholarship (WISH) Festival 2019 di 21 Provinsi di Indonesia.

Name: Medlinx
Description:
Мы продуктовая MedTech-компания. Помогаем врачам, клиникам, лабораториям ускорить и упростить работу. А пациентам - качественно и удобно заботиться о своем здоровье.

Разрабатываем IT-экосистему для медицинских провайдеров, врачей и пациентов. Наши инновационные продукты позволяют провести полное медицинское обследование: начиная с лабораторных анализов и заканчивая приемом у врача и постановкой диагноза. Наши продукты собирают структурированные данные, которые легко поддаются анализу. Кроме того, мы разработали уникальный ряд сервисов, позволяющих создавать на основе этих данных индивидуальные рекомендации для врачей и пациентов.
Нашими продуктами пользуются крупнейшие компании в области медицины и лабораторной диагностики такие как Helix и Roсhe.

Некоторые наши продукты:
МИС - Медицинская информационная система, которая включает в себя модули для управления пациентской базой данных, электронной медицинской документацией, расписанием приема врачей, учетом медицинских услуг и финансами
Helzy – телемедицинская платформа, которая предоставляет возможность провести диагностику возможных заболеваний с помощью AI и получить квалифицированную консультацию врача.
Helix Express - сервис для сдачи лабораторных анализов без очередей, без администраторов, с получением результата в течение нескольких часов.

Для нас важно
Постоянное изменение. В нашей компании фраза “be flexible” не просто девиз - это наш стиль жизни. Мы находимся в постоянном изменении и совершенствуем продукт индивидуально под каждого клиента.
Амбициозность. Мы достигаем большего и создаем самые крутые проекты, которых не видел еще никто. Мы всегда ставим себе амбициозные цели и показываем результаты на самом высоком уровне.
Право выбора. Полная свобода выбора - это то, чем наполнены все наши проекты, задачи и атмосфера. А еще, свобода для нас - это открытость друг к другу и полная отдача своему делу.

Заботиться о здоровье с Medlinx- просто ;)

Name: Transforming Irrigation Management in Nigeria (TRIMING) Project
Description: The Transforming Irrigation Management in Nigeria Project objective is to improve access to irrigation and drainage services and to strengthen institutional arrangements for integrated water resources management and agriculture service delivery in selected large-scale public schemes in Northern Nigeria. The Project consists of four components. These are linked with each other. The main thrust of the project is Component 2 with the aim of rehabilitating public irrigation schemes. This needs to be complemented with improvements in dams/reservoirs via Component 1 to assure integrated water management and to improve safety for people downstream. Component 3 is helping to increase agricultural productivity of the irrigated lands as well as with the processing and marketing side of the increased output. Finally, Component 4 is essential for capacity building and managing the three components.

Name: COPED
Description:
Le Conseil pour l’Education et le Développement (COPED) est une association burundaise sans but lucratif (ASBL) créée en 1974 autour de Mgr Bududira.

Il a pour vision « la construction d’un monde d’espoir : un monde où la faim, l’ignorance et la maladie ont été éradiquées » ; et est partout connu pour son attachement indéfectible au développement intégral de l’homme.
 
Il possédait à son origine le statut de bureau diocésain de développement et est devenue une ASBL par l’ordonnance ministérielle n° 550/242/89 du 25 septembre 1989, lui conférant le statut d’une Organisation Non Gouvernementale (ONG).
 
 
COPED est né et intervient jusqu’alors dans un environnement de turbulence, mais cherche à mettre en œuvre des démarches pouvant préparer un développement durable dans l’optique du retour futur du Burundi à la stabilité.
 
Depuis 1974 jusqu’en 2000, la zone principale d’intervention du COPED comprend les Provinces de Bururi, Makamba et Rutana.
 
Au cours de l’année 2000, le siège du Conseil pour l’Education et le Développement a été transféré à Bujumbura avec une antenne à Bururi couvrant les provinces de Bururi,Makamba et Rutana,une antenne à Gitega couvrant les provinces de Gitega, Mwaro et Karuzi, une antenne à Ruyigi couvrant les provinces de Ruyigi et Cankuzo et une antenne à Kayanza couvrant les provinces de Kayanza, Ngozi, Muyinga et Kirundo.
 
Cette nouvelle position lui a permis d’élargir son champ d’action et de se donner les moyens d’accroître le volume de ses réalisations.

Name: Larkspur Consulting Inc.
Description:
Larkspur Consulting Inc. (LCI) is a consulting practice focused on the development of creative strategies to support the successful delivery of complex capital projects. LCI was established in 1990 and since that time has helped numerous organizations achieve their vision and goals. The firm is owned and operated by principals Lori Van Rooijen (Pii’Takii), BA, BEd., MLIS and Courtney Shearer, BSc., MBA, CMA, CPA who work with a small team of qualified employees and a broad range of experienced consultants across Western Canada. LCI works out of Calgary, and most of our project are in Alberta.
LCI provides “owner representation” project management services for public and not-for-profit organizations who are planning and constructing a new facility. We specialize in strategic planning, facilitation, community development, business case development, project feasibility studies, financial modelling, project coordination, community consultation and stakeholder engagement, and fund development for public and private organizations.
LCI works on projects that are highly complex involving stakeholders with diverse views and opinions. Our style is to work collaboratively to find opportunities, resolve issues and build consensus. In the last 10 years, our projects have included numerous large-scale, highly public projects. Our high-quality work is the result of our very experienced team. We come from various backgrounds, including education, community development, planning and engagement, financial modelling, business management, and architecture and design which gives us a breadth of perspectives across the entire project. We continue to ensure we are performing to industry best practices, through our industry contacts, research, and continuing education. We have a very positive relationship with all levels of government, through the delivery of our public good projects.  To date, we have led or been a key team member on raising over $1.1 Billion for our clients and projects.

En el año 2010, se presenta al primer Concurso de Zaragoza Activa, logrando con la idea de desarrollo de un CRM para la hostelería, un hueco dentro del Vivero. Siguiendo con la hostelería, se presentó a través de HORECA Zaragoza, una web de reservas de mesa, que obtuvo la financiación por parte del Ayuntamiento de Zaragoza.
Siguiendo con la digitalización en las empresas, se presenta otro proyecto en el CEEI de Andorra (Teruel) que consistía en la firma por medio de tabletas digitales de Consentimientos médicos. El proyecto fue aprobado y también se obtuvo un sitio dentro del Vivero de Empresas. Esta aplicación sigue funcionando a día de hoy.
En el año 2016, presentamos un nuevo proyecto para el CEEI de Castellón, el embrión de lo que sería SEVI. Un hardware capaz de verificar la identidad de una persona de manera desatendida. El proyecto fue seleccionado y luego, presentado al MoveUp de ese mismo año, donde quedó finalista, con otros 10 proyectos. Mientras el prototipo se iba desarrollando, entra en escena un nuevo socio en la empresa, Alejandro Gas.
En la actualidad, el equipo cuenta con 5 integrantes y dedica todos sus esfuerzos en un nuevo desarrollo propio de alto potencial.

Name: Agro Entrepreneurship Competition - AEC
Description: Agro Entrepreneurship Competition – AEC is the first of a kind television reality show that promotes agriculture and entrepreneurship at the same platform. The vision of the program is to create agro entrepreneurs and promote the agriculture sector as a whole. The program will empower the youths of today. Channel i’s ‘Agro Entrepreneurship Competition – AEC’ has started its journey on March 17, 2014 through a series of 1-minute television advertisements on Channel i and through digital promotions in Social media. The competition has ventured as a CSR project of Channel i under the program called ‘Hridoye Mati o Manush’ which is hosted, directed and produced by the media personality, agriculture development activist and the pioneer of development journalism Mr. Shykh Seraj. The program has so far been a success with the participation of more than 1500 students from all over Bangladesh. The whole program will air on Channel i in July in the form of a reality show. There were roadshows in three different universities. 186 teams each with 4 members participated and submitted their agro business ideas online. 53 teams were called to pitch their idea on May 06, 2014 in Round 2 of the event. 5 teams have been finally selected to compete in the final round where they will have to directly work in the field. The final event of AEC will take place in August/September. Channel i is looking for Event Sponsor for the final event. We are offering the event partnership for 2,000,000 BDT. The benefits are described in the report. Channel i is the No. 1 television channel of Bangladesh in terms of the viewership. Partnering up with such a social and development event will not only enhance your CSR activities but also will give your brand exposure to 4 crore viewers worldwide. We appreciate Unilever’s commitment for a sustainable environment and hope to have a long-term relationship to build up a better world.

Seinet is leading the way in developing innovative digital publishing platforms for education and media. Our solution: Xtent, the first multi-channel collaborative content authoring platform designed specifically for the media and education sectors, Xtent’s powerful workflow makes it easy to create books, courseware, and interactive assessments in multiple formats including HTML5, PDF, ePUB and SCORM. xPad is an innovative platform that allows you to distribute, license and monetize branded digital editions for desktops and all devices.

Seinet was founded in 2001 with the clear mission to deliver a “create once, publish anywhere” world-class content management solution. Our systems, employed by media and educational publishers the world over, combine cutting-edge technology with innovative workflows to reduce the number of manual interventions required to publish and distribute content to any device, anywhere in the world.

Our success in traditional print media, such as newspapers and magazines, led to our Xtent system being chosen to power Agfa’s ApogeeMedia integrated workflow in 2006, and it’s been used globally by the publishing and print industry ever since. In 2008, we started applying our expertise to help educational publishers meet the increasing demands for high-quality digital content creation. And three years later, we moved things on further by providing services that cater specifically for the complex needs of the e-Learning sector. 

As the only content management system (CMS) supplier to integrate both publishing and e-Learning functionality, we’ve improved the efficiency and productivity of publishing and digital distribution in the educational and media industries by developing innovative, flexible and robust platforms.

Name: Community Development International
Description: CDI was created by a group of motivated and committed young professionals from around the world and aims to build strong and sustainable urban and rural communities in both the worst off developing countries throughout the world and in local communities in the developed world. Through innovative projects and programs, following the Millenium Development Goals and through CDI's six core inter-related focal areas; Education, Health, Agriculture, Energy, Infrastructure and Job Creation, the process CDI follows is to identify communities that can benefit from our assistance, begin by working with local community leaders and inhabitants to establish interest in receiving assistance from CDI, researching the needs and demographic information of the area, devising a detailed and targeted step by step plan to implement sustainable projects and programs within the six core focal areas, execute the projects and programs, empower local inhabitants, monitor the effects and management for a provisional period to ensure success and ultimately leave the community in the hands of its inhabitants with a new sense of pride, ownership and empowerment. The individual program process varies widely as per location and is dependent on the location's particular needs, existing infrastructure and the individual geographical, medical, social and political conditions from area to area.

Name: Ledelseshuset ApS
Description:
Velkommen til Ledelseshuset – et konsulenthus, hvor vi hjælper dig til at få ledelseskraft i din hverdag.

Vi træner ledere til at løfte og udvikle deres lederskab, der giver god energi og trivsel blandt medarbejderne, effektivitet og en sund økonomi på bundlinjen. Vi har et stærkt øje for ledelse af det hele menneske, og vi træner derfor ledere i at skabe mening i hverdagen, inddrage medarbejdere og få dem til at lykkes i fællesskab.

Vores mission er at bidrage til at skabe flere formålsdrevne virksomheder og meningsfulde arbejdspladser. Vi coacher og rådgiver små og mellemstore virksomheder, hvor hverdagen har taget over, og vi fokuserer på at skabe en positiv og varig forandring for lederen og kollegaerne.

Vi tilbyder:
INDIVIDUELLE UDVIKLINGSFORLØB 
Et individuelt forløb med fokus på det personlige lederskab, kraftfuld kommunikation, ledelse- og udvikling af teams samt coaching af medarbejdere mm. Vi tilrettelægger forløbet, der tager afsæt i dine behov og unikke omstændigheder. Du får konkrete værktøjer til brug i din hverdagsledelse. Tilbydes fysisk eller online.

EFFEKTIVE LEDERGRUPPEFORLØB
Ledergrupper er afgørende for, at organisationer får succes. Med et udviklingsforløb for top- og mellemledelsen får virksomheden styrket samspillet mellem forskellige niveauer, udviklet strategier for drift, udvikling og bæredygtighed samt tilpasset kommunikation internt og eksternt. Tilbydes fysisk eller online.

LEDERCOACHING
Et individuelt forløb, der bygger på anerkendelse af, at forandring kommer indefra. Coaching i forandringsledelse handler om at ændre handlinger i hverdagen, opnå egne og fælles målsætninger og gøre en forskel for sine medarbejdere. Tilbydes fysisk eller online.

FOREDRAG / OPLÆG / KURSER
For større og mindre forsamlinger om bevidst ledelse med formål, ledelse af bæredygtig udvikling, fremtidens leder samt kraftfuld kommunikation.

Name: Elan pour tous
Description:
UN ÉLAN POUR TOUS

Le Maroc est dans une période charnière :  une période d’inflexion nécessaire face une révolution industrielle 4.0. 

Un virage décisif à prendre en maitrisant les différentes composantes (Stratégiques, Ressources humaines, innovation, cout productivité…) tout en ayant une démarche AGILE :  L’unique choix pour éviter une stagnation séculaire.

Confrontés aux différents défis, les relever ne peut être possible que si la croissance économique est diversifiée, la plus inclusive possible et intégrée dans un ensemble régional et portée notamment par la croissance d’un secteur privé fortement créateur de valeurs et d’emplois . 

Pour cela, la CGEM doit être un moteur de croissance , une locomotive économique, non seulement être force de propositions mais aussi une force d’actions.

Name: Community Policing Lebanon
Description:
The Promoting Community Policing in Lebanon project, financed by the European Union and jointly managed by FIIAPP and Civipol, seeks to promote social cohesion by promoting a community policing that respects human rights and the rule of law in the country. 
One of the main aims of the project is to improve the application of the Internal Security Forces’ community policing model. Work is also being done to strengthen the Municipal Police to improve the service offered to local people and promote the independent supervision of the Internal Security Forces in cooperation with civil society. 

This project is part of the EU-Lebanon Partnership Agreement for the 2016-2020 period and is based on the Strategic Plan of the Lebanese Internal Security Forces (2018-2022) to ensure a more responsive, professional police service that is more respectful of human rights.

Name: LOOKNorth Centre of Excellence
Description:
LOOKNorth is a Centre for Excellence for Commercialization and Research under the Canadian Networks of Centres of Excellence Program. 

LOOKNorth is hosted by C-CORE at Memorial University, St.John’s Newfoundland. It collaborates with a broad network of industry, business, research and northern partners to verify and commercialize monitoring technologies that support safe and sustainable resource development in Canada’s North. Its vision is to ensure that stakeholders in northern resource development have cost-effective, reliable access to the information needed for planning and decision-making related to exploration, development, production and transportation of natural resources in the diverse, dynamic, challenging and environmentally-sensitive environment of Canada’s North.

LOOKNorth focuses on the natural resource sector; primarily the oil and gas, mining, hydro electric and transportation sectors. The monitoring technologies of interest are those related to remote sensing, which can create products and services that provide information and knowledge to the natural resource sectors to overcome knowledge gaps, improve safety and cost effectiveness of operations, accelerate permitting, and make a positive impact to project economics.

Name: Economic Development Board Alphen
Description:
Stichting Economic Development Board Alphen aan den Rijn (EDBA) is een onafhankelijke adviesorganisatie. Onze doelstelling is vanuit een adviserende en stimulerende rol bij te dragen aan de duurzame economische ontwikkeling van Alphen aan den Rijn (economie binnen de grenzen van ecologie) en een aantrekkelijk vestigingsklimaat in Alphen aan den Rijn en de regio.

De kracht van de EDBA zit in het realiseren van publiek-private samenwerkingen met de gemeente en haar maatschappelijke en economische partners. Daardoor kan kennis en kunde gebundeld worden aangeboden aan bestuurders en beleidsmakers van de gemeente. De continue onderlinge synergie en verbinding draagt daarmee bij aan de versterking van de economische basis van de gemeente Alphen aan den Rijn.

De stichting werkt samen met een aantal in het Platform Economic Development Board Alphen aan den Rijn vertegenwoordigde partijen bestaande uit;
- Gemeente Alphen aan den Rijn (directie en College B&W)
- De Alphense ondernemingsvereniging VOA
- Greenport Boskoop
- MBO Rijnland
- Rijnvicus
- Platform voor Toerisme PReT
- Alphen Marketing

Onze gezamenlijke missie is om de gemeente Alphen aan den Rijn tussen de vier grote steden tot de sterkste economie van het Groene Hart te ontwikkelen.

EDBA initieert, stimuleert, stemt af, coördineert en ondersteunt activiteiten die een positieve invloed hebben op het ondernemersklimaat en die de economische ontwikkelingen in de gemeente Alphen aan den Rijn concreet bevorderen.

EDBA staat open voor ideeën, activiteiten en projecten van partijen die een herkenbare bijdrage leveren aan de versterking van de lokale en regionale economie.

Kansrijke ideeën worden in de EDBA op elkaar afgestemd om synergie en samenhang te creëren. Daarmee wordt de basis voor een economisch sterk fundament verstevigd. 

Ideeën en vragen zijn van harte welkom!

Name: AVATAG
Description:
AVATAG is a solution designed for everyone, with an inclusive design. It was specially designed for the difficulties of visual impairment.

They are embossed NFC tags, with different codes (braille, QR code and barcode), suitable for all surfaces and resistant to different temperatures, easily recognizable by touch, which will identify each object you want.
A mobile application reads, edits and shares information on AVATAG interactive tags. This connection is established through reading by NFC (communication by proximity field).
The mobile application is free, optimized for all devices. It can be controlled by voice, allows reading, editing and sharing of content. It is also possible to create alerts, geolocation, hyperlinks, read all types of codes (QR / barcode) and print with pagination in QR code. All of this organized in folders and with total accessibility.

The application aims to improve your quality of life, allowing the identification of all objects used in your daily routines, from documents to your freezer.

AVATAG is currently in the development phase and we are looking for investors interested in the project, as we believe that everyone can enjoy this product and that the visually impaired will be able to gain autonomy and privacy.

General information
JHRC:

Based on the Royal vision of a self-sustaining historical re-enactment sector in Jordan, the King Abdullah II Fund for Development (KAFD) created the Jordan Heritage Revival Company (JHRC).

Mission

To create, engender and administer a self-sustaining historical re-enactment sector in Jordan

Objectives

The overall business objectives are aimed at carefully capitalizing on the national treasure in order to bring history to life for Jordanians and tourists, while also developing a self-sustaining income stream. JHRC’s objectives are to:
Foster an interest in Jordan’s history
Increase the attractiveness of Jordan as a destination for foreign tourists, journalists and corporations by enhancing the availability of cultural activities.
Generate employment opportunities for retired military personnel and prospects for other local business ventures achieve self-sustaining financing through expansion of other areas for business development, including the addition of corresponding hospitality and touristic components like cafes and shops, events, the engagement with the film industry and tourism intermediaries and the acquisition of copyrights and associated imagery.
