Name: Atlanta Compliance & Ethics Roundtable (ACE)
Description:
The Atlanta Compliance and Ethics Roundtable exists to promote ethical business practices through the provision of educational resources, networks and discussion forums; professional support to current and developing ethics professionals; and through the support of industry research.

Formed in 2006 through collaboration between The Center for Ethics and Corporate Responsibility at Georgia State University, the J. Mack Robinson Colleges of Business and Law at Georgia State University, and area ethics professionals, ACE is now the leading network for Ethics and Compliance Officers within Atlanta’s top companies and academic institutions.

ACE maintains a membership comprised of ethics or compliance professionals who may join individually or as a corporate entity.  Membership includes access to ACE tools and resources, website and certain member-only events. Membership also includes recognition on ACE promotional materials and website. Most importantly, membership in ACE signifies that an individual or company is actively engaged in supporting and promoting business ethics as a field and in developing the future of the field in Atlanta.

Mission Statement:
To foster an attitude of commitment and continuous improvement among the Atlanta business community in the development of compliance and ethics programs that promote integrity and ethical leadership.

Objectives:
- Raise the standard for business ethics programs.
- Determine and publish best practices for implementation and management of compliance programs.
- Create a forum that provides members a networking opportunity with other compliance & ethics leaders.
- Provide continuing education on compliance and ethics topics and issues to its members.
- Promote the study of business ethics in colleges and universities.

Name: RCX
Description:
RCX is an organisation responsible for creating, hosting, and managing new forms of immersive experiences enhancing productivity and collaboration in the built environment.  

RCX 360 is a game-changing ecosystem that allows users to elevate visuals. It allows architects, designers, and stakeholders to collaborate in real-time using immersive 360° technology. Upload, share and view 360° content cross-device with anyone, anywhere, anytime. 

The RCX Ecosystem comprises four products designed to manage, share and view 360° content.   

360 MANAGE 
Serves as the backbone of the RCX 360 ecosystem, providing a central, easy-to-navigate platform for streamlined project management. Users can efficiently handle account, project, and workspace management, user and viewer permissions, and project organisation. The platform enables users to upload, filter, and search through projects effortlessly, while also managing QR codes, controlling viewing access, and facilitating updates. Additionally, basic analytics offer valuable insights.  

360 VIEW 
Experience immersive 360° content viewing with device motion tracking, VR compatibility, and real-time updates. Easily filter and search through projects for a seamless and efficient workflow.  

360 LENS 
Enhance your user experience with 360 Lens, which provides a fast local file preview of 360° content before uploading it to the 360 Manage platform. View single or bulk images. With its intuitive interface, users can easily review their content and ensure it meets their expectations.  

360 COMPRESS 
Streamline the content preparation process for the 360 Manage Platform with 360 Compress, which efficiently compresses large files and optimises them for web upload. With fast file compression and batch processing capabilities, users can quickly and easily prepare their content for seamless integration into the platform, ensuring a smooth and efficient workflow.

Name: Oogst van Morgen
Description:
De Oogst van Morgen is een programma waarin we samen werken aan toekomstbestendige landschappen in Nederland. 

In het landelijk gebied komen grote maatschappelijke opgaven samen — van stikstof en waterkwaliteit tot landbouwtransitie, woningbouw en biodiversiteit. Veel gebieden nemen zelf het initiatief om hiermee aan de slag te gaan, maar een integrale aanpak ontbreekt vaak.

De Oogst van Morgen verbindt lokale gebiedsteams met elkaar én met systeemspelers zoals overheden, financiële instellingen en bedrijven om een gezamenlijke aanpak te organiseren. In acht gebieden in Nederland brengen we mensen en initiatieven samen in een uniek tweejarig programma. 
 Texel 
 Stroomgebied Grift - IJsselvallei
 Stroomgebied Zuid-Veluwe 
 Rivierenland 
 Van Gogh Nationaal Park / Landgoed Eyckenlust 
 Schouwen-Duiveland 
 Mooi Maasvallei 
 Achterhoek 

Hier leren we van elkaar, ontwikkelen we uitvoerbare én financierbare plannen, en bouwen we aan een sterk netwerk dat gebieden ondersteunt in hun transitie. 

 Ons doel: landschappen die gezond, leefbaar en economisch veerkrachtig zijn — gedragen door de regio zelf. 

 De Oogst van Morgen is een samenwerking tussen Commonland, Oogst van Overmorgen, Bioregional Weaving Labs Collective, Akademie van Plaats en Frisse Blikken, en wordt ondersteund door Topsector Energie, het Ministerie van Landbouw, Visserij, Voedselzekerheid en Natuur, Collectief Natuurinclusief, Wij.land, Adessium Foundation en de Nationale Postcode Loterij.

Name: InCompass International Consultancy Services Ltd.
Description:
A professional services provider in SSR / justice and home affairs (JHA), InCompass International offers impartial policy and strategic advice, technical assistance solutions, tailored programmes and specialist human resources to ministries of Interior, Justice, Foreign Affairs and Defence; law-enforcement and judicial Agencies; and to international donor organisations active in supporting reforms across the JHA / SSR sector.

We are a boutique consultancy and the only company operating in Europe dedicated exclusively to supporting reforms across the SSR and specifically JHA sector, through specialised in-house technical assistance solutions and initiatives.  As such, we are able to formulate our own tailored projects for government departments and donors, as well as identify and mobilise dedicated human resources, deployable within 48 hours, through our global network and continuously updated database of over 4,000 Consultants. These include police, Gendarmerie, border police, immigration and customs professionals, judges, magistrates, prosecutors, international law and human rights lawyers, as well as ICT, cybersecurity and SSR project management specialists (including former military personnel), interpreters and translators trained in sector terminology.

Our associated services include advising governments and private-sector clients on how to manage, avoid and / or mitigate political, security, integrity and economic risks, including those of political corruption, fraud and money-laundering, whilst operating at home or abroad.

Our clients and/or co-ordinating partners are Ministries of Justice, Home Affairs (Interior), Foreign Affairs, Defence, Border, Immigration and Customs Agencies, as well as prison and detention services, international Development Agencies and parliaments of EU Member States, UK, Trade & Investment Agencies, EC, EU’s Research Executive Agency, FRONTEX, the United Nations Global Marketplace (UNGM), UNDP, USAID/INL & commercial interests.

We acknowledge our mistakes, failures, and fuckup stories that impact our personal lives and professional careers, affecting us as the humans that we are.

Name: The Foundery
Description:
The Foundery was established as an entrepreneurial catalyst, for a time such as this. The world is changing rapidly due to numerous factors, such as the 4th Industrial Revolution, the VUCA-world phenomenon, COVID-19, national recessions and political instability, as well as other global disruptors. In light of these new realities, our contribution can best be described by the following considerations:

WHY We Exist:
We exist to propel capital growth for all stakeholders, based on Kingdom-minded values and principles, to bring about transformation and hope within systemic broken societies.

WHO We Are:
The Foundery is a collective of people-centric entrepreneurs who catalyse scalable entrepreneurial ventures.

WHAT We Do:
We develop and empower entrepreneurs based on the principles of human capital investment to establish and grow Industry 4 enabled organisations.

HOW We Do It:
A dual approach best executes our mandate, based on both the alignment of entrepreneurial psychology as well as the crafting of complementary skills:

1.	We train and develop new and existing entrepreneurs alongside our academic and enterprise development partners, based on three levels:

Entrepreneurial master classes;
SETA accredited NQF 4 qualification (TBC);
SETA accredited NQF 5 learnership (TBC).

2.	Through our internal incubator, we facilitate a development process for new and existing entrepreneurs, based on four phases:

Phase 1: 
I-Founder - A six-month part-time investment program for all prospective entrepreneurs.

Phase 2: 
Pioneering - A three-year development process during which the entrepreneur will be required to craft and successfully establish their own business.

Phase 3: 
Established - A three-year consolidation phase during which the business will grow with the assistance of strategic partners.

Phase 4: 
Scaling - Introduce the entrepreneur to a private equity investor market, to exponentially scale their business model for a sustainable future.

■企業理念
経営×WEB活用戦略による個客満足並びに個客創出へ


■企業ビジョン
シフトする市場並びに個客購買行動の変化を捉え、どのメディアチャネルでもシームレスに一気通関したサービス体験を提供し、収益向上による資本最大化サービスをご提供できる「ビジネスに直結したWEBコンサルティング会社」を目指します。


■企業スローガン
「全てはゴールの為に」。お客様のビジネスに限りなく貢献できる企業になろうと思います。全てはゴールに向けて、戦略、デザイン、機能、アイデアが存在しています。プロフェッショナルとしてお客様の今あるゴールを実現するだけでなく、その先に広がる新しい可能性を見つけ出し、より良い企業活動の次の未来に貢献していきます。お客様の喜びが弊社の社会的貢献と自負しております。これからもシフトする市場並びに個客購買行動の変化を捉え、WEBコンサルティング会社として日本文化創出も変わってまいります。このスローガンは、お客様とのお約束です。


■選ばれる3つの強み
１．ビジネスのご提案が出来ます。経営、事業、機能戦略をふまえ、広告代理店、制作会社現場従事12年のロジックとノウハウ、そしてマスメディアからWEBメディアの反響ROI予測より、WEB領域よりビジネスに直結したサービスをご提案出来ます。

２．論理的・実践的ご提案が出来ます。戦略、戦術から個客、サービス、施策、検証まで全てを見える化し、ビジネスに直結したベストプラクティスをご提供いたします。

３．一気通関した体制があります。社内にはコンサルタント、外部には集客や解析、デザイン、システムのプロフェッショナル約20社による体制で課題解決に最適なチームを編成いたします。


■サービス領域
市場をふまえたゴール予測をもとに、予算内で出来ることを模索し、理想を見据えながら、経験や感覚値ではなく、全てはゴール達成へ向けた戦略・戦術、調査・分析・解析、集客・反響、構築・開発、企画・制作サービスをご提供いたします。

Desde nuestros inicios hemos desarrollado diversas líneas de investigación y desarrollo, a partir de las cuales hemos creado herramientas y servicios, centrados en mejorar la competitividad y la sostenibilidad de la industria turística andaluza. Entre nuestras iniciativas cabe destacar el diseño y puesta en marcha del proyecto Andalucía Lab, que ha culminado con la inauguración en 2012 del mayor Centro tecnológico especializado en turismo de Andalucía.

El fruto de éste "expertise" nos ha transformado en "partners" tecnológicos de Andalucía Lab. This project is a chance for businesses and citizens alike to demonstrate social responsibility while supporting economic development and the ‘global’ leadership of UBC students.  

The program is designed to encourage youth entrepreneurship and promote small business ventures in Kenya.  In partnership with Kenyan Strathmore University students, UBC students work with Kenyan youth to develop feasible business plans and secure microfinancing.  We provide a three-week seminar on business plans that include workshops, guest speakers, and mentorship as well as evening classes and one-on-one consulting services. 

It is our hope that by applying our knowledge and experience, we will create opportunities for sustainable income, stimulate the growth of the local economy, and build long-term connections with the community.  The seminar, workshop and consulting are provided free-of-charge to Kenyan students.

Con la idea del trabajo en equipo, y de acuerdo con nuestras visiones individuales, fuimos dando forma a la empresa de desarrollo de software (basadas en el capital intelectual de sus miembros sin distinción) que deben responder a estructuras más horizontales, democráticas y participativas.
 
Este fue el nacimiento de Equilateral LAB, un espacio productivo y de desarrollo profesional de excelencia con un fuerte compromiso de transformación de las relaciones entre la gente y el trabajo.

Name: IDMoney
Description:
Our only official ETH Address: 0x28B85Bc9e851271214fe70F433874B9aEdC5A94A

The IDMoney Project has developed software built on blockchain technology which promotes the fields of human development, crypto governance, and socioeconomic impact. The IDMoney software, Money Making Wallet, empowers its users to exercise their fundamental right of a virtual personality by managing their personal information, deciding who has access to that information and under what terms that information can be used. By utilizing the Money Making Wallet, users can manage personal information and generate profit from their identity. They will be able to exchange personal data with government agencies, financial institutions, marketing firms and other interested parties. 

Further, the IDMoney Project seeks to select three well-organized and advanced local governments of the world which agree to participate in the project, and to which the ownership of the software development company, IDMoney S.A., will be transferred at the end of the project. With this, the IDMoney project will act as a case study on how the best local governments can regulate, integrate and achieve symbiosis with the crypto community. 

The IDM Project also aims to bring about a socioeconomic impact using two additional project features. The first is the IDMoney Poverty Relief Program which will donate 20% of created IDM tokens (7 million IDM) to selected local governments to be directly distributed, free of charge, among poor persons of their municipality. The second is a software tool (Poverty Relief Tool) which will be developed to coordinate the poverty relief programs of selected local governments, and / or any other organization seeking to take advantage of this tool.

Name: UITalks
Description:
When the pandemic hits in 2020, it was all of a sudden. Soon after, per April 2020, 229.789 people are laid off from the formal sector and another 443.760 from the informal sector. Not only from the employee side, there are at least 10,1% of SME that stop operating during the pandemic. Seeing this phenomenon, CEDS UI as an entrepreneurial community at UI tries to expand its contribution to the Indonesian people by launching the first UITalks in 2020, in hope that people can be inspired to rise from the economic downturn during the pandemic.

This year the world is still in the pandemic, but we don’t want to stop contributing for Indonesia once the pandemic ends. Indonesia still needs at least 4 million new entrepreneurs to help strengthen the economic structure. As currently the entrepreneurial ratio in the country is still around 3.1 percent of the total population. Therefore UITalks will continue to develop and inspire Indonesia. 

Last year's event was fully in the form of a webinar, but we see that theories only are not sufficient to help the people. So for this year’s event, UITalks will also encourage the audience to apply what they’ve learned.

Our Vision
Developing an innovative, sustainable, and impactful entrepreneurial ecosystem in Indonesia by promulgating business perspectives and fundamentals

Our Missions
-To deliver a comprehensive yet applicable business fundamental knowledge as basic for entrepreneurs in making a sustainable business
-To inspire entrepreneurs by giving business perspectives, opportunities and trends through idea sharing sessions
-To reach audience as wide as possible

Name: Growth Enablement
Description:
Why do we exist?  To create highly tuned sales engines for different customer types and fine tune the support chassis required to drive productivity growth.

How do we do it? By simplifying the end to end process of how you exchange information with your customers to create value for them and helping your sales people become more effective.   We find tune this method following an outside in approach we call Model, Map, Match that has been designed based on over 1500 different inputs from buyers.   

1) We model your customer (frame their desired possible outcome, the agreement network, the funding strategy, and their oath to short and long term success) 

2) We map your various messages, products, and propositions into an integrated value communication strategies (so all of the messages are coordinated for sales) 

3) Then match the messaging strategies with the right sales teams to better service you customers.

What do we do?  We offer a variety of different service to meet you where you want to be.

Assessments
- Examples:  Sales support spending analysis,  sales outliners analysis, sales time and results study, customer sales experience study, supply chain behind sales study, Hire to Retire sales talent study, Concept to Contact - Go to Market study, etc

Services 
- Examples:  experience room creation, customer workshop development, live coverage desk creation for your conferences, sales presentations, sales training, outcome messaging creation, team alignment

Consulting

Name: ImPower social impact projects
Description:
ImPower helpt mensen om het beste uit zichzelf te halen (empowerment) en brengt mensen en bedrijven bij elkaar. Op deze manier hebben wij de afgelopen 12 jaar al vele honderden werkzoekenden die een steuntje in de rug nodig hadden aan een mooie baan geholpen. Tot groot genoegen van deze mensen én het bedrijf waar ze nu werken!

Ons succes is gebaseerd op vier pilaren:

Ons eerste 'geheim' is dat we dicht bij de mensen staan: we werken met peercoaches die niet alleen goed opgeleid zijn, ze kennen de weerbarstige wereld ook uit eigen praktijk. Wat jouw achtergrond ook is, bij ImPower vind je een coach die je wereld kent. 

De tweede pilaar is dat we geen mensen 'bemiddelen' (we zijn geen uitzendbureau) maar mensen helpen ontwikkelen. Daar hoort ook bij dat we je heel concreet naar werk of opleiding toe coachen. Iedereen die bij ImPower binnen stapt, komt sterker naar buiten.

Weer een andere pilaar vormen de sociale projecten. In Amsterdam geeft bijvoorbeeld een enthousiast team huis aan huis advies over energiebesparing. Een win/win situatie voor klimaat, arbeidsmarkt en de strijd tegen energiearmoede.

Ons laatste 'geheim' is dat we een ondernemende club zijn met roots in het bedrijfsleven. We hebben stevige kennis van zaken over ontwikkeling van mensen en over publiek-private samenwerking. 

ImPower is actief in Amsterdam en Rotterdam, Arnhem is in ontwikkeling. We staan open voor uitbreiding naar andere gemeenten.

Description:
Depuis 2006, la Chaire UNESCO « Eau, Femmes et Pouvoir de Décisions », œuvre à la création d’un environnement favorable à la promotion du Genre dans une perspective de développement plus équitable, plus inclusif et plus durable. La Chaire UNESCO « Eau, Femmes et Pouvoir de Décisions » a la particularité d’adapter ses interventions à la complexité des enjeux et à la spécificité des contextes. C’est un creuset de l’innovation et de l’excellence pour un développement humain certain.

Enfin, la Chaire UNESCO « Eau, Femmes et Pouvoir de Décisions », a pour objectifs principaux de promouvoir un système intégré d’activités de recherches, de formation, d’information et de documentation dans le domaine du genre, des femmes, de l’eau, des sciences exactes, naturelles et technologiques et des sciences sociales, en vue de la mise en œuvre des Objectifs du Millénaire pour le Développement (OMD/ODD).

Name: National Association of Engineering Student Councils (NAESC)
Description: The National Association of Engineering Student Councils, Inc. (NAESC) was established in 1983 as an avenue for Engineering Student Councils from around the United States to communicate and share ideas to be more effective organizations at their home schools. NAESC, Inc. commits itself to improving the engineering educational experience and supporting all engineering disciplines. This strong organization not only serves engineering student councils but also the engineering students each council represents. To achieve these goals, NAESC, Inc. works to facilitate communications among member councils, promotes engineering education, organizes programs and events, provides a resource of information about engineering student activities, and serves as a collective voice for engineering student councils. Since its inception, NAESC. membership has grown from a few schools in the central United States to over fifty schools nationwide. NAESC. also is working towards fostering professional relationships with the National Society of Professional Engineers (NSPE), the National Council of Examiners for engineering and Surveying (NCEES), the American Society for Engineering Education (ASEE), Tau Beta Pi Engineering Honor Society, and the Accreditation Board for Engineering and Technology, Inc. (ABET). In an effort to expand our membership’s horizons and contacts beyond the United States, NAESC is also working to collaborate with the Canadian Federation of Engineering Students (CFES), the Board of European Students of Technology (BEST), and the German organization “bonding”.

Our partners include the Central Bank of Nigeria, the ADfB, the African Union, the African Independent Television, and many other organizations. We expect several hundred people from emerging markets to participate, including Technology Pioneers, Heads of government and international organizations, entrepreneurs, scientists, inventors, and Media Leaders. Additionally, the event will feature leading companies, venture capital firms, academic institutions, NGOs, and startups from Africa and Asia. 

You can read more at http://www.aecongress.org

Name: Transactional Analysis
Description:
Transactional analysis integrates the theories of psychology and psychotherapy because it has elements of psychoanalytic, humanist and cognitive ideas.

According to the International Transactional Analysis Association, TA 'is a theory of personality and a systematic psychotherapy for personal growth and personal change'.

1. As a theory of personality, TA describes how people are structured psychologically. It uses what is perhaps its best known model, the ego-state (Parent-Adult-Child) model, to do this. The same model helps explain how people function and express their personality in their behavior.
2. As Berne set his Psychology up, there are four life positions that a person can hold, and holding a particular psychological position has profound implications for how an individual operationalizes his or her life.
3. It is a theory of communication that can be extended to the analysis of systems and organisations.
4. It offers a theory for child development by explaining how our adult patterns of life originated in childhood.
This explanation is based on the idea of a "Life (or Childhood) Script": the assumption that we continue to re-play childhood strategies, even when this results in pain or defeat. Thus it claims to offer a theory of psychopathology.
5. In practical application, it can be used in the diagnosis and treatment of many types of psychological disorders and provides a method of therapy for individuals, couples, families and groups.
6. Outside the therapeutic field, it has been used in education to help teachers remain in clear communication at an appropriate level, in counselling and consultancy, in management and communications training and by other bodies.

Description:
Meereeng50 is a brand new, purpose built business accelerator program being developed collaboratively by PwC's Indigenous Consulting (PIC), Kinaway Chamber of Commerce Victoria and University of Melbourne using an Aboriginal informed co-design process.   Meereeng50 aims to create fertile ground for 50 Indigenous businesses to grow - their businesses, their skills and their relationships - as they engage in meaningful commercial opportunities with some of Australia's biggest companies.  The initial pilot program will be delivered in Victoria in early 2020.

Name: The Hive - Leitrim County Enterprise Fund
Description:
The Leitrim County Enterprise Fund was founded in 1988 to assit businesses to develop, grow and access low cost finance. LCEF's latest development is The Hive- Leitrim's Technology Enterprise Centre in Carrick on Shannon
The Hive was developed as part of the Innovation and Enterprise Programme (IEP) which is a joint cross border initiative between Leitrim and Omagh. The project received £2.27 million, part-financed by the European Union’s INTERREG IVA Programme, managed by the Special EU Programmes Body (SEUPB).  The Programme is led by Omagh District Council and the partners are Leitrim County Council, Leitrim County Enterprise Fund, Leitrim County Enterprise Board and Omagh Enterprise Company, developed by the Irish Central Border Area Network (ICBAN) through their Multi-Annual Plan

Connectivity and convenience are the main focus of this new centre to serve the knowledge-based business community of the North West. The Hive opened in November 2013. 
Accommodation solutions ranging from a single desk with high speed fibre broadband access to serviced office suites with fixed cost flexible leases and optional packages including phone systems, print solutions and secretarial support are available.  

There is  an on site coffee dock, and high tech meeting rooms and training suites which make it the ideal location for your next training or conferencing event with its high profile location on a national primary route (N4). The Hive is also an ideal location for off site interviews or meetings with short and long term flexible availability in a high quality business focused environment.

Name: Huts Spot Geleen
Description:
In het centrum van Geleen bevindt zich een experimentele plek voor -en met- jongeren die in het teken staat van kunst, design en duurzaamheid: HutsSpot.
FTR; HutsSpot; een verbastering van ‘hotspot’ maar ook een product van verschillende ‘ingredienten’ die elkaar versterken om zo tot een lekker gerecht te komen. Geen haute cuisine, gewoon lekker Hollandse pot. En daarnaast: ‘huts. (jongerentaal) uitdrukking om een geslaagde of niet geslaagde actie te onderstrepen’. Overigens voert de uitdrukking ‘huts’ al terug tot de gloriejaren van Pippi Langkous. Lekker lang houdbaar dus.
HutsSpot is er om jongeren -en mensen met een jong hart- een plek te geven voor ontmoeting, ontdekking, verbreding en uitwisseling.
HutsSpot is een verzameling activiteiten (SPOTS) om te experimenteren, om te maken, om samen te werken, om te leren vanuit verschillende disciplines en media. We starten in december 2020 met een DOE SPOT waar jongeren geënthousiasmeerd worden voor kunst en techniek en haar onbegrensde mogelijkheden. Een plek waar je kunt ervaren hoe trots je kunt zijn door iets te maken, door zelf aan de slag gaan, of onder begeleiding van inspirerende mensen en makers. Ze kunnen op het moment nergens heen om hun creativiteit om te zetten in iets zichtbaars. We willen jongeren een podium geven. Coronaproof -op anderhalve meter- maar verder niet moeilijk doen en iets moois  maken.
Het initiatief wordt gesteund door bedrijven die beseffen hoe belangrijk het is dat jongeren hun creatieve en technische talenten kunnen ontdekken. In onze SPOTS kunnen jongeren aan de slag met materialen en onderwerpen die passen binnen de belevingswereld en met inzet van duurzame aspecten om bewustwording te creëren rondom circulariteit.
Naast de culturele en innovatieve mogelijkheden geeft HutsSpot ook invulling aan maatschappelijke aspecten die spelen in stad Geleen.

Name: Institute of Public and Private Policies (IP3)
Description:
Institute of Public and Private Policies (IP3) is an independent non-for profit organization based in Albania. IP3 since its establishment in 2012 provides high quality analysis aiming at promoting the design and implementation of public and private policies in different areas and across numerous sectors, consistent with European tradition of individual liberty and values of good governance, free market economy and private property rights. 
IP3 supports sustainable development by contributing to local and regional development, territorial strategies, operational and urban development plans, marketing strategies and tourism development by preserving cultural and historical heritage. 
IP3 promotes the empowering of local democracy through its contribution to territorial reform in local and regional level, decentralization policies, public finance management and fiscal policies, efficiency in services delivery through one stop shops initiatives by assuring transparency and accountability and participatory governance by strengthening social and economic cohesion.
IP3 works also in achieving economic growth through trade facilitation assistance, public private dialogue and regular impact assessment, public private partnership, private sector engagement, investment policies, analysis of different financial instruments in local, regional and national level and contributing to economic development of Albania.    
IP3 seeks to establish institutional channels to foster public and private policy dialogue in Albania by carrying out research and producing cutting edge policy options, project results, and recommendations for reform in areas critical to accelerate the country's integration in the European Union.

Il nostro prodotto di punta punta è SinLog, MES per il mondo industriale.

- sistemi per il monitoraggio industriale
- piattaforme di rilevazione e comunicazione installate su macchinari
- sistemi hw/sw per il controllo di accesso e il tracciamento di merci e persone

Siamo iscritti come PMI innovativa dal 2020.
Investiamo ogni anno oltre il 15% del fatturato in Ricerca e Sviluppo con un team composto per oltre il 60% da laureati in discipline tecniche quali ingegneria e informatica.
Da ottobre 2020 facciamo parte di Confindustria Brescia e il nostro Amministratore Delegato è iscritto all'albo degli Innovation Manager creato nel 2019 dal MISE.

Name: Stichting De Kleine Aarde
Description:
De Kleine Aarde is een van de oudste milieuorganisaties in Nederland. De stichting werd opgericht in 1972. Het is de enige landelijke organisatie met een eigen Eco-park van bijna 3 hectare, waar je niet alleen inspiratie en informatie vindt, maar ook de concrete producten en diensten die een duurzame leefstijl mogelijk en zelfs aantrekkelijk maken.

De naam 'De Kleine Aarde' verwijst naar de voorspelling van de Club van Rome in 1972 dat onze aarde langzaam meer zeker te klein zou worden, gezien de groei van de wereldbevolking en de snelle toename van de consumptie. Eerst kwam het kwartaalblad 'De Kleine Aarde' uit. En een jaar later kwam het project in Boxtel van de grond; een proeftuin voor duurzame productie en consumptie van bijna 3 hectare. Dat is nu het Eco-park van De Kleine Aarde, waar iedereen inspiratie kan opdoen voor een duurzame leefstijl.

Rond 1987 is onze aarde echt te klein geworden. Dat is duidelijk geworden met het model van de Mondiale Voetafdruk. Mondiaal gebruiken we nu op jaarbasis meer dan de aarde duurzaam kan opbrengen. Dus teren we in op het natuurlijk kapitaal. Werken aan een duurzame leefstijl is daarom urgenter dan ooit te voren.

 Nosso resultado? Desde 2019, entregamos a base para que empresas e líderes formulem estratégias vencedoras, antecipem riscos, capturem oportunidades e construam um futuro mais resiliente.

A Consciência Corporativa surgiu da parceria entre Suzanne Mayumi, idealizadora do Programa Consciência Corporativa, e Leandro Percário, Diretor-presidente do Instituto TFT Brasil, com a missão de transformar a saúde mental integral e emocional no ambiente de trabalho por meio da integração entre ciência, humanização e bem-estar coletivo.

A iniciativa se tornou referência em saúde integral, liderança consciente e conformidade com a NR1 e a Lei 14.831. Como parte desse propósito, os cofundadores lançaram o Curso de Extensão Universitária de Formação Técnica de Terapeuta Corporativo e a pós-graduação, MBA em Gestão de Saúde Mental Corporativa, em parceria com a Unifatec-PR e com reconhecimento do MEC, profissionalizando o uso das terapias integrativas nas organizações.

Name: National Youth Council of Australia
Description:
OVERVIEW
The National Youth Council of Australia is an independent organisation for young people and youth organisations within Australia. The council brings together youth organisations and provides a platform for inter organisational cooperation and discussion. The council also runs a number of programs and events aimed at inspiring the next generation of young leaders. 

Along with providing a platform for inter-organisational cooperation the Council also operates an advisory arm. The advisory arm provides all levels of government and business with the opportunity to connect with young people and seek their advice and recommendations on a range of issues.

The council was developed as a result of consultation with young Australians and national youth organisations. The council holds no political affiliation and is run by young Australians for the benefit of young Australians. 

The council is a non-profit organisation and is managed by an appointed organisation program director and overseen by a board of young Australians. 

OUR VISION 
The National Youth Council aims to inspire and motivate the next generation of young Australians. Creating a lasting generational change of socially conscious young Australian leaders. 

OUR MISSION
Connect | Inspire | Motivate | Change

To Connect young Australians with national youth organisations driving positive change. 

To Inspire young Australians to generate changes in their communities. To start local grass roots movements that focus on positive change. 

To Motivate young Australians to take the necessary steps to becoming young leaders. 

To generate Change. Change that secures the future for all young Australians. Change because the world we see today is not the world we want to leave behind tomorrow.

We're already preparing for a Wales where waste no longer exists either in business or in the home: 

1. We're rolling out the 'Green Shed' hub to help communities upcycle & reprocess any material into the goods of the future. 
2. To take us forward on our journey we're developing a Wales wide schools programme to equip our children for Wales's circular future
3. We're developing a Wales wide Home to Soil Programme: moving Wales to a zero-chemical, 100% organic food future
4. We're designing a parallel 'Circular Currency' to underpin Wales's sustainability goals: partnering with circuits across the Europe

We aim to help Wales become the global standard bearer for the new Circular Economy

TOOLNOLOGY ARGENTINA es la empresa del Grupo AP distribuidora exclusiva de GeneXus en Argentina desde hace 18 años. Se especializa en la comercialización, soporte, capacitación y mantenimiento de la tecnología GeneXus. Toolnology brinda asesoramiento a Casas de Software para la rápida inmersión en esta tecnología. 
TOOLNOLOGY COLOMBIA es la empresa del Grupo AP que representa a GeneXus en Colombia desde 2012, brindando soporte, entrenamiento y mantenimiento con el mismo modelo de negocio que su sede principal en Argentina. 

En TOOLNOLOGY ARGENTINA Y TOOLNOLOGY COLOMBIA brindamos capacitación y damos soporte técnico sobre la herramienta Genexus a más de 300 Clientes.

Description:
Inversiones inmobiliarias + Proyectos Blockchain + Asesoramiento en minería + Programación integral 


Tenemos un equipo profesional en programación sobre el mundo de las criptomonedas, programación web, programas de gestión multiplataforma (ordenador, tablets, móviles, cloud computing)  Quieres hacer un Exchange, un sistema de pagos en monedas digitales, servicios de inversión por trading, desarrollo de nuevas tecnologías enfocadas a servicios cotidianos.

Si tienes una idea pero no tienes fondos para desarrollarlo, nosotros te damos asesoramiento completo para desarrollar un ICO, contamos con un equipo de programadores que crearan un Smart Contract que garantizará  el negocio de cara a los inversores, además plantearemos todo en el White Paper, documento con el cual lograremos captar la atención y los fondos de muchos inversores.

Te ayudamos a montar tu propia fábrica de Criptomonedas, puedes crear tu propio dinero virtual desde tu casa o en forma profesional desde una instalación dedicada.  Te conseguimos el Hardware necesario para poder crear monedas de cualquier Algoritmo desde SHA 256 (Bitcoin y más de 100 monedas), Scrypt (Litecoin y más de 100 monedas), y otros muchos protocolos que están en una subida constante y exponencial, x11, blake, dagger, skun y muchos más. 

Además te asesoraremos en seguridad para tus monedas, formas de hacer crecer esas monedas y sacar la mayor rentabilidad posible a tu propia Fabrica,  también podemos usar Green Energy y hacerlo aun más redituable.

Name: Impact House
Description:
Impact House is a social impact intelligence facility researching and consulting in the field of SDGs, ESG, CSR and social impact in general.

Our passion is bringing science and innovation to projects, policies and businesses, managing and enabling positive social change!

With experience in private, public, and non for profit sectors, Impact House analysts come from social science and business backgrounds with numerous awards for social innovation and academic achievements, providing you with everything you need to make your impact count. 

Our services as well as our passions and pro bono work include analysis, management, and measuring of social impact within SDG, ESG and CSR frameworks including the developing EU taxonomy and non-financial reporting.

With an additional interest in social innovation, we function both as scientists, entrepreneurs and practitioners in the field. 

We offer services such as social impact scans for your company/organisation, training and education for your employees or target groups, organising and leading strategy sprints, designing impact strategies and action plans, managing impact and supporting or leading your impact teams. We set up your impact measuring system (SROI or any quantitative or qualitative methodology) and provide support for measuring impact or serve as outside expert evaluators. 

As social impact intelligence experts, we analyze global social trends and developments in order to design and measure social impact policies, strategies and actions in the increasingly dynamic and complex online and offline social reality.

Simply put, we can accelerate your sales and revenue.
 
Crux-Xcelerate is perfect for emerging companies past the pre-seed stage, where aggressive revenue growth is required. Do you need a chief sales officer and a solid sales team but can’t afford the cost or time to build a team yourself? Are you looking to be acquired, or need help reaching the next funding round? Do you simply want to reach a self-sustaining monthly recurring revenue? We can bring experienced sales leadership to give you the navigation you need.

The vision for Crux-Xcelerate was born from Crux KC, the first “un-agency,” merging executive-level marketing and business strategy to provide a simple, smart and affordable marketing solution for clients. From working with startups to build their marketing strategy, we realized the need for a sales solution was equally important.
 
The beauty of this sales and marketing partnership benefits you: You’ll reap the rewards of experienced sales and marketing leadership, all at a fraction of the cost—instantly doubling your value.
 
Ready to get moving?

Name: OntwikkelRijk
Description:
Leiders met maatschappelijke impact door samenwerking en inzet met voelbaar resultaat.
 
OntwikkelRijk is een projectorganisatie / ecosysteem en o.a. de verbindende kracht achter Leven Lang Ontwikkelen (LLO), Ontwikkelvoucher, Ontwikkeladvies en Collectief Ontwikkelen.

2023 - Stakeholder management ervaring inbrengen in arbeidsmarkt, onderwijs en (met) maatschappelijke organisaties
2021-2022: advies en procesbegeleiding op gebied van lerende organisatie (VNOG)
2021: participatief actieonderzoek binnen het brede speelveld van stakeholders in werk en onderwijs omtrent vraag en aanbod op arbeidsmarkt (met IG!). Zie whitepaper 'de arbeidsmarkt van morgen'.
2017-2020: subsidieregeling Ontwikkeladvies 45+-ers (20 miljoen euro) bedacht, uitgewerkt en succesvol geïmplementeerd i.s.m. Ministerie SZW en ons hele netwerk (w.o. Noloc, OU en De Loopbaanacademie).

Ons doel is groei van de samenleving door de energie, die in mensen zelf zit, los te maken en in te zetten, menselijke waarden meer aandacht te geven en onderlinge verhoudingen te versterken. Daarbij maken we inhoud en beoogde doelen concreet. Door anders, integraal te organiseren: visie en (digitale) aanpak, houding, mindset én gedrag.

Wij zijn daarin een verbindende en ontwikkelrijke factor en verbinden praktijk, wetenschap en beleid.

Referenties o.a.
Charistar en Riverrun (diverse projecten);
VACO (Ontwikkelvoucher);
Ministerie van SZW (Ontwikkeladvies (vijfenveertigplussers), STAP, samenwerking in de regio, LLO);
Ministerie van OCW (LLO, STAP en Strategische visie MBO 2030);
Open Universiteit (ecosystemen, LevenLangOntwikkelen en CollectiefOntwikkelen) en
werkgevers, onderwijsinstellingen, branche-, beroeps-, WN en WG organisaties en partners in ons ecosysteem w.o. SBB, PZO, Veiligheidsregio N-O Gelderland/Berenschot, Charistar en NOBCO.
 
#CollectiefOntwikkelen #VerantwoordInnoveren #MensCentraal #VoelbaarResultaat

Description:

Our mission is to provide our clients with insights and tools that will allow them to develop their anticipation capabilities, connect their strategies and priorities to the “global picture” and to help them to navigate and leverage globalization.

Name: BHK Consulting, LLC
Description:
The history of the United States—as is the history of the world—is filled with centuries of racism, ethnocentrism and nationalism, all representing inhumane categories of inferiority and superiority which ultimately devalue human life.  From genocide, to the presence of dead bodies on shores and borders, our country, and world, is broken and in need of reconciliation.

BHK Consulting exists to bring unity amongst communities and nations from different cultures and backgrounds and establish justice and equity throughout creation. With a theological framework that has grounded abolitionists, activists, and civil rights leaders such as Frederick Douglass, John Rankin, Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. and Millard Fuller, BHK Consulting is strategically positioned to repair and restore unity, equity and justice in the 21st century.

By providing relevant and engaging learning opportunities—unlike standard “check the box” diversity, inclusion, equity and justice training—BHK Consulting helps organizations move forward and better engage issues related to race, ethnicity and nationality. Understanding that clients are at different points in their journey, our services are crafted to meet the clients where they are and help move them forward.

BHK Consulting provides the following services:
Dialogue Facilitation
Workshops
Retreats
Conferences
Intensives
Strategic Partnership Development
Policy Development
General Consultation  

Please visit our website for additional information.

Name: IARGES - International Association for Responsible Governance and Executive Sustainability
Description:
IARGES is a private non-profit international association dedicated to promote the equitable, humane and participatory development in the management of organisations.

Our goal is to value the activity of executive management of organisations as a determining factor in the dissemination of reproductive practices focused on the social, environmental and relational sustainability aspects and on the construction of cooperation networks (national and international), underlined on the respect for the established Sustainable Development Goals of the United Nations.

Name: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT NETWORK ZW
Description: A brain child of Zimbabwe CEO’s Network, is the vibrant Executive Assistant Network of Zimbabwe. We have realized the criticalness and importance of the boss personal assistant. Many changes have happened to the role of the Executive Assistant which was perceived to be that of a secretary, managing their bosses diary, handling basic logistics and booking travel. Today, with many of the traditional tasks of the secretary handled by ever evolving technology, the role of the EA has expanded to include a wide range of business, managerial and human skills including amongst others project management, strategic planning, office management, budget management and human resource management. The Executive Assistant Network (EAN) was born out of a recognition of this change in the role, and a realization that whilst the EA is critical in providing support to, and enabling a significant boost in productivity for their Executive, its importance in the organization is still not fully appreciated. EAN today is a community of senior Executive Assistants, from a wide range of industries, who can connect with one another, further enhance their skills and knowledge through tailored training and conferences, and work together to celebrate the role of the modern Executive Assistant. Our goal, very simply, to support our members throughout their career as an EA, to inspire them to ever greater achievements in their work and personal lives, and to advocate for the role within the organization and wider community.

Name: Empowering Latino Futures
Description:
Empowering Latino Futures, formerly Latino Literacy Now, is a 501(c)(3) not for profit organization founded to promote literacy in the community in all forms: educational, financial, reading, health, and community awareness. Empowering Latino Futures (ELF) is a goal-driven organization focusing on education, community building, and content issues affecting underserved communities and working with authors. Since 1997, when Edward James Olmos and Kirk Whisler co-founded Latino Literacy Now, over a million people have been impacted by our organization’s four program areas:
1) Award Programs: International Latino Book Awards, and Latino Book into Movie Awards
2) Education Programs: Latino & American Indian Scholarship Directory, and Empowering Students website.
3) Community Building Programs: Latino Book & Family Festivals, and Education Begins in the Home
4) Empowering Content Programs: Latino Reads Podcast, and Latino Events eNewsletter.

Nous faisons le diagnostic de l'entreprise, le renforcement des capacités en gouvernance, le suivi conseil de mise en œuvre, la mise en relation et la promotion des MPME . Et plus généralement nous assistons, les collectivités locales dans la Gouvernance de leurs projets, la mondialisation des fonds et le mentorat à travers le benchmarking. 
Nous sommes une équipe pluridisciplinaire composée essentiellement d'entrepreneurs et de professionnels aguerris ayant un riche parcours. Voilà pourquoi notre offre est complète et pointue. 
Nous organisons des événements à fort impact qui réunissent à la fois les décideurs, les professionnels, les entrepreneurs et  les partenaires techniques et financiers pour échanger, s'informer, se former, partager, se vendre et nouer des partenariats gagnant-gagnants: La Semaine du Jeune et Femme Entrepreneurs qui est un RDV national organisé dans plusieurs villes économiques du pays. De même nous éditons un Magazine YiLiM Mag qui est exclusivement dédié à l'entrepreneuriat et aux métiers.
Nous avons de solides partenariats avec certaines institutions de l'Etat Togolais pour la mise en place de leur feuille de route gouvernementale

Name: Innovation Fest
Description:
Join us in April 2024 for a two-week-long series of dynamic events and showcases, educational and networking gatherings, and exchanges with influential leaders across sectors with the focus on Cleantech innovation.

FEST launched in Canada in April 2022, hosted by the Consulate General of Switzerland in Vancouver bringing together organizations and audiences from the fields of science, technology, arts, industry and community around Swiss-Canadian innovation.

FEST is a Public Diplomacy initiative where Consulates, Embassies, Government Organizations, and members of the broader diplomatic community host a customized series of cross-stakeholder engagements and events in a city where they aim to highlight their country's innovations and cultivate international collaboration. 

By tailoring the FEST Format, we co-curate bespoke programs bringing together arts and cultural organizations, science and technology institutions, universities and schools, industry and startup networks, social impact and grassroots groups –- to enrich international innovation ecosystems and make them more visible locally and around the world.

Our vision is to highlight and build on world-class innovation happening in each corner of the planet.

Name: Rural on Purpose
Description:
Building Strong Rural Communities through Entrepreneurship

Point of View
Rural on Purpose is the point of view of people who have made the conscious choice to live in rural communities. It is the positive message of optimism and empowerment and a commitment to strengthen our communities through the development of our entrepreneurial culture. 

Why Entrepreneurship? 
Today entrepreneurship is much more than business development – It’s a mindset. It’s a mindset of growth and a vehicle for change. It’s the entrepreneurship of a new generation and it’s exactly what rural communities all over the world need more of to solve challenges and grow. 

Entrepreneurs envision the future and then CREATE it. 

Programming
We develop and pilot programs that support entrepreneurial growth in rural regions. The program pilots generate data and feedback that we use to iterate and grow the program or discard it if it doesn’t show positive results. Not only do we support entrepreneurs, we ARE social entrepreneurs. 

Our programs are informed by two types of knowledge – deep knowledge that is found within our own communities and global network knowledge that comes from sharing our challenges and solutions with other communities around the world. 

Follow our Blog and signup to join the conversation and participate. Individual pilot projects will be discussed and updated regularly.

Name: IDM Partners
Description:
IDM Partners (IDM) is a leading program and project management organisation, specialising in the delivery of infrastructure projects in the energy, oil and gas, water and utilities, roads and transport, telecommunications and mining and resources sectors.  

Our philosophy is to deliver precise and exceptional outcomes for our clients.  

At present, close to $10 billion in programs are being delivered by over 60 of IDM’s talented and committed professionals in ten project offices across Australia.

The IDM structure is project delivery oriented and operates on project-specific structures that vary depending on the scope of work of the project, the nature of the engagement and the phase of the project.  

The success of IDM is underpinned by the utilisation of the whole-of-life project execution methodology, known as the Project Execution Framework.  

IDM is accredited to ISO 9001 for the provision of project management, infrastructure development and management consultancy services.  These services range from developing initial project concepts, through feasibility assessment, delivery planning, approvals, and on to procurement, construction and commissioning of major projects.  

Our strategic intent is all about continuous improvement – of our people and in the way we do things – to deliver exceptional outcomes to our clients.

IDM has recently been awarded the AIPM's 2014 National Project Management Achievement Award for "Project of the Year".  

This follows IDM winning the Queensland division "Project of the Year" and "Construction/Engineering Project in Excess of $100,000,000".  

IDM was recognised for its outstanding success in program management for the delivery of the Department of Transport and Main Roads' $6.9bn Transport Network Reconstruction Program.

Name: Work Training Center, Inc.
Description: Work Training Center, Inc. was founded in 1960 to provide job and life skills support for adults with developmental disabilities. While our mission remains the same, the jobs we provide have us grow, from training four clients in a small workshop environment, to a $12 million corporation training 400 actively engaged client employees, and supported by 250 staff employees. Our six commercial divisions, which operate throughout Butte County, provide wood and soft goods manufacturing, light assembly and mailing services, recycling, janitorial, and landscape services. We grow much of our landscape stock on-site and offer them for sale in our nursery. Additionally, we offer retail experience in our two retail gift stores. Our own buses travel over 2,000 miles per day transporting our clients to their work. Certified in clinical and occupational social work, our staff continue to provide life skills support to over 300 clients in the form of group recreation therapy, independent living programs, and daytime respite care. Work Training Center is actively seeking highly qualified people to work alongside us.

These questions are central in Project Like! Building a local digital innovation culture
The Like! Project will:

- Work together with 10 partners in 5 countries in the North Sea Region
- Combine knowledge of local governments, citizens, universities and SME's
- Co-create smarter services through 9 transnational pilots
- Contribute to the North Sea Region Programme 2014-2020

The Like! Project partners are:

- Groningen Municipality (lead beneficiary) NL
- Groningen University NL
- Drenthe Province NL
- Rotterdam Municipality NL
- Aalborg Municipality DK
- Angus County Council  UK
- Suffolk County Council UK
- Roeselare Municipality BEL
- Vechta Stadt GER

Name: Antreprenoriatul la feminin
Description:
Proiectul "Antreprenoriatul la feminin" este un proiect cofinantat din Fondul Social European prin Programul Operational Sectorial Dezvoltarea Resurselor Umane 2007 - 2013, Axa prioritara 6 “Promovarea incluziunii sociale”, Domeniul Major de Interventie 6.3 “Promovarea egalitatii de sanse pe piata muncii“. 

Proiectul este derulat de S.C. European Project Consulting S.R.L in parteneriat cu ESSEC Business School Paris, Camera de Comert si Industrie a Municipiului Bucuresti si Asociatia pentru Dezvoltarea Antreprenoriatului Feminin.

Proiectul “Antreprenoriatul la feminin” prin obiectivele si activitatile sale, vine in intampinarea nevoilor femeilor care intentioneaza sa initieze sau sa dezvolte afaceri, prin facilitarea accesului acestora la programe de formare antreprenoriala de succes. 

Astfel, proiectul isi propune ca obiectiv general imbunatatirea accesului femeilor pe piata muncii din regiunile Nord-Est, Sud-Muntenia si Bucuresti–Ilfov, prin dezvoltarea competentelor antreprenoriale ca urmare a participarii la programe de informare si formare profesionala antreprenoriala. 

Numarul femeilor care doresc sa se dezvolte in domeniul antreprenoriatului, din regiunile Nord-Est, Sud-Muntenia si Bucuresti–Ilfov si care pot urma gratuit aceste cursuri este de 1.020.

So, if you’re looking for a design agency that prioritizes social good and impact, choose Niki Lopez Creative. Let’s work together to bring your vision to life and make a positive impact in the world.

Name: Trinh Foundation Australia
Description:
Trinh Foundation Australia (TFA) works to assist the Vietnamese people to establish Speech Therapy as a profession in their country. 
We collaborate with our Vietnamese partners to create university-based training programs. We work to enable the Vietnamese people to acquire speech therapy capacity themselves, to be able to assist those in their population with communication and swallowing disorders. Until 2010, when TFA collaborated with the University of Pham Ngoc Thach in Ho Chi Minh City, there were no Vietnamese speech therapists nor formal training courses in Speech Therapy in Vietnam.

The work of TFA depends critically on all of our volunteers. 
Our volunteers come from all over Australia, and their passion, patience and enthusiasm are inspiring. They are committed to making a difference.

Over 60 Australian volunteer speech therapists have now visited Viet Nam to support TFA’s work there: teaching students, mentoring speech therapy graduates, coordinating projects and courses, and liaising closely with our Vietnamese partner organisations.

Trinh Foundation Australia (TFA) is a voluntary, non-profit organisation, established in Australia. We are independent and do not have any political or religious affiliation.
Vietnamese Government INGO Certificate of Registration Number: 10/BNG-HÐ

Name: United States Small Business Administration My Brothers Keeper Millennial Entrepreneurial Initiative

“Together, we will support President Obama’s My Brother’s Keeper Initiative by empowering young people in many of our under-served communities with SBA resources, so that they can dream big and propel the entrepreneurial spirit of their generation forward,” - Administrator Maria Contreras-Sweet, the head of the U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) and a member of President Obama’s Cabinet

Acknowledging that unemployment among the Millennial Generation, particularly in minority communities, is at record levels, beginning this spring, the SBA My Brother’s Keeper Millennial Entrepreneurial Initiative will embark on a nationwide effort to increase the awareness of millennial entrepreneurship in the areas of music, fashion, film and sports.

Soon, a team was fully formed, and the Amouranth brand as a whole skyrocketed in both productivity and profitability. From that, the idea was born- what if she could take the team she had trained, and provide the same services to other creators in the space?

This way, GALACTICA will empower Industrial intelligent systems or Industrial Internet of Things as part of the strategic alignment with priorities on strategic emerging value chains.


GALACTICA’s strategy is:
1. Cultivation within an open collaboration space focused on supporting SMEs to change the mindset about digitalization and empower them to start partnerships.
2. A set of dedicated grants complemented with coaching and technological vouchers to assess the feasibility and small technical tests aimed at minimum viable products of a new value chain.
3. Large scale demo of the new value chain with dedicated grants for SME consortia with coaching and technological support.
4. Scale-up support to leverage additional funds. GALACTICA will connect successful SMEs with private investors and other initiatives for scaling up the innovations.

In total, 4M€ (79% of budget) will be dedicated to SMEs through diverse vouchers to support technological innovation and value chain creation.

Name: Paving the Way Foundation, Inc
Description:
Paving the Way Foundations mission is to empower communities to end child trafficking and exploitation through powerful, engaging awareness and educational programs. 

Why? Well according to NCMEC (National Center for Missing and Exploited Children) there were are millions of Child Sexual Abuse Materials cyber tips reported every year. Human trafficking and online child exploitation is one of the most egregious crimes to humanity.  It can be hard to comprehend. 
We understand. It leaves most people asking, who am I to do anything about this tragedy? More importantly, what can I do? 

Sadly, our children are more at risk than ever. With the ever changing school environment, our kids are spending more time online, leaving them vulnerable. In fact  - the average age of enticement is 10-13 years old. 
Take a breath. 
There is good news. 
YOU! and us. 

YOU can do something about it by educating yourself an those around you. That's why we are here, so you don't have to navigate this alone. 

Educate. Empower. Prevent. That's our goal

Paving The Way Foundation has educated over 25,000 youth, parents, teachers, and community leaders about exploitation and trafficking, the impact it has on families, our communities and the actions to take to prevent it. 

We invite you to partner with us to disrupt the cycle and keep our children safe. Invite us to come educate and empower your students, parents, youth leaders and the faith based community. 

Together, we can make a difference and end child exploitation.

Name: Agronomy Manager
Description:
My name is Thomas Sedlmeier and I'm working currently as a Golf Course Superintendent at Twin Chapels Golf Resort in Prague, Czech Republic.

I was so sick of having all my administrative materials spread on multiple sheets, files and books. One day I decided to start adding some macros into my excel files to make my life a bit easier. That was my first contact with .NET in 2014. From than on I saw the potential of having all information in one database and Agronomy-Manager was born.

In my spare time, I work permanently on Agronomy Manager and some parts need still a bit more improvement, but I think it's already so good, that I'd like to share it with all my fellow colleagues out there.

I hope a lot of you will use Agronomy Manager and feed me with feedback and proposials for improvement. Especially from these areas on this planet calculating with non-metrics.

Agronomy-Manager today is a software to assist Golf Course Superintendents, Head Greenkeepers, Directors of Agronomy and all other people managing turf and green space in their daily work.

Agronomy-Manager supports you in 
- Planning (Budget, Agronomy Calendar, Application Planner, Staff Planner)
- Purchasing (Price Inquiry, Price Survey, Order, Delivery, Stock, Inventory)
- Applications (Liquid or Granulair Applications)
- Resources (Products, Staff)
- Field Operations (Diary, Consumption, Expenses, Time Table)
- Tests (Soil and Water Tests, Root Zone Mix and Gravel)
- Analysis (Reports)

Name: SecondMuse Foundation
Description:
The SecondMuse Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit advocating for a relational approach to addressing complex problems at scale; called “relational wealth” that recognizes the interconnectedness of our world by prioritizing relationships. Our goal is to inspire ways of thinking and actions to drive societal change at scale rather than unconsciously replicating the status quo. By breaking down traditional boundaries of value and putting relationships at the center, we encourage ourselves and others to think differently and explore new ways of addressing the world's most pressing and complex challenges.

We help ground and facilitate programs to build relational wealth through partnerships and funding opportunities with like-minded entities. Current work supported and/or sponsored by the Foundation include GET Cities, Black Tech Street and others. Visit our website to learn more and connect with us.

Our dynamic network of management trainers, coaches, and facilitators infuses energy, depth, and professionalism into our training solutions. With decades of leadership experience, our faculty engages corporate audiences with practical leadership lessons.

Drawing from extensive experience in delivering high-level training to government ministries and agencies, our resource personnel employ diverse learning methodologies, including modules, lectures, and presentations. Our approach incorporates instruction, role-playing, group discussions, and feedback, allowing us to cater to professionals at all levels, drawing on expertise from a variety of industries.

Name: Clare Local Development Company
Description:
Clare Local Development Company (CLDC) is a local, community-led organisation committed to the support and empowerment of communities and individuals in County Clare.  We work collaboratively to deliver innovative programmes that support inclusion, equality, diversity, sustainable economic development and positive environmental impact.

Our approach to empowerment focuses on advocacy, support, personal growth, participation, and integration.  We work collaboratively, supporting people to actively participate and build their capacity to meet their own needs and the needs of their communities, to develop local enterprise and their local economy, to take climate action and to protect their local environment. We provide integrated support through a range of targeted CLDC delivered programmes, schemes and services.

[Our Vision]
We are working towards a diverse, inclusive, economically vibrant county, where every person’s basic needs are met, and every person is treated with respect and compassion.  We envision a county of resilient and economically sustainable communities, with high levels of cultural awareness and free from discrimination. We envision a county of people that are capable of adapting to a changing economy and environment, through collaborative and innovative approaches to social and environmental justice.

[Our Services]
We provide a diverse range of supports and services to community and voluntary groups, social inclusion target groups, disadvantaged and marginalised communities, small businesses, farm families and potential entrepreneurs. Some of our services are available throughout the county, whilst others are limited to specific geographical areas. We collaborate with a wide range of local organisations in the delivery of our services.

Name: PREDA PLUS Foundation for Sustainable Economic Development
Description:
Our Story begins in 2000…

The Swiss SME (small and medium-sized entreprise) support project PREDA since 2000 has considerably evolved in 2007 in a locally anchored and owned Regional Agency for Economic Development, Pelagonia-PREDA.
Having its roots and experience in private sector development, Pelagonia-PREDA was recognized as a stabile partner of its funders, the nine Pelagonia region municipalities in their efforts for regional development and inter-municipal cooperation.
In 2010 the organization grew and transformed itself into new Foundation for Sustainable Economic Development – PREDA Plus. The aim was to provide continuity of a decade of investments in institutional and human capital development.
Moreover, in 2013 the gained unique experience in Macedonia was offered in Kosovo through implementation of tourism project, TourTaste. In 2015, PREDA Plus Kosovo was established as a step towards our goal to contribute in development processes and social change in Western Balkan countries.
At the moment the Foundation for Sustainable Economic Development – PREDA Plus experiences rapid growth process in terms of team members, turnover, geographical outreach and international operations in both countries.

Name: Sundance Media Group
Description:
Based in Las Vegas, Nevada and West Jordan, Utah, Sundance Media Group (SMG), has been producing training, trade events management, product development/management for 30 years.  Instructors from SMG have taught, presented workshops and have participated in panels worldwide.  Over the years, SMG's area of focus has been audio, video and software applications for production and post-production.  Douglas Spotted Eagle, the original founder of SMG, has long history of aviation from the adrenaline-filled world of fast-action videography in skydiving to commercial application of drone/UAV use.  SMG's latest evolution and vision is to incorporate its years of experience for best-practices training into the world of UAV use.  
SMG produced the first-ever vertically-focused training event in the UAS and Broadcast industry at NAB in 2012, and continues to provide vertical/industry-specific training in Public Safety, Construction, vertical Inspection, and Real Estate industries. 

SMG serves as a consultant within the UAV industry, offering training and speaking engagements on UAV topics ranging (but not limited to!): UAV cinematography, commercial and infrastructural UAV applications, UAV risk management, night UAV flight, aerial security systems, and 107 training to ensure pilots clearly understand the FAA laws.  With an intimate knowledge of the FAA FARs and FSIM, our collective experience with instructors and UAV pilots nationwide is our foundation for creating a best-practices for everything drone/UAV/UAS.

Name: Humathèq
Description:
Наш бизнес — это разработка новых продуктов.

Помогаем производителям и владельцам брендов исследовать рынки, находить идеи, инновации
и воплощать их в сильных продуктах.

В нашем понимании сильный продукт — это продукт, который продает себя сам.

Чтобы нас окружало как можно больше функциональных, эргономичных, эмоциональных и безопасных продуктов, а наши клиенты запускали такие продукты чаще, берем на себя полный цикл разработки: от идеи продукта до участия в запуске на рынок.

Сильный продукт должен быть ярким, эстетичным, удобным и желанным — эту задачу решают наши промышленные дизайнеры.

Мы с удовольствием делимся нашими подходами, наработками и технологиями создания продуктов, чтобы на рынке было как можно больше крутых продукт-менеджеров и разработчиков.

Некоторым клиентам мы помогаем выстроить собственные PdM и R&D–процессы.


Реализуем проекты в сфере:
- hardware: физические (материализуемые) продукты
- software: услуги и IT-решения
- бизнес-модели 

Нами разработано более 350 продуктов, среди которых электронные приборы, мебель и предметы интерьера, продукты питания, IT-продукты, банковские и страховые сервисы, химия и композитные материалы, решения для строительства и отделки помещений…

Продукты наших клиентов участвуют в Red Dot Design Awards.

Более 485 продукт-менеджеров и разработчиков получили дипломы нашей школы.

С нами работать сложно, но результативно!

Name: METIP
Description:
Stichting Maritime Emerging Technologies Innovation Park, kortweg METIP is een innovatiecentrum, community, techhub en broedplaats. 
Bij METIP komen ondernemers, start-ups, kennisinstellingen, studenten en maatschappelijke organisaties en defensie samen om te werken aan uitdagende en innovatieve vraagstukken voor de versterking van de maritieme, mariene en offshore energie sector.

Het METIP is mogelijk gemaakt door de Regio Deal Maritiem Cluster Kop van Noord-Holland. Met deze Regio Deal werken het Rijk, provincie Noord-Holland, gemeente Den Helder, het samenwerkingsverband De Kop Werkt! en andere (publieke en private) partners aan een integrale aanpak om het leef-, woon- en werkklimaat in de Kop van Noord-Holland te versterken.

Name: E-Tedarik Bilisim ( e-ihale , e-satinalma , e-katalog )
Description:
e-Tedarik Bilişim firması olarak müşterilerimize geleneksel satınalma ve satış süreçlerini geliştirmelerinde destek olacak tamamen web tabanlı teknoloji ve hizmetler sunmaktayız. 

e-tedarik sistemi tamamen web (internet) tabanlı bir elektronik tedarik sistemi olup sadece bir bilgisayar ve internet bağlantısı ile kullanılabilmektedir.

Ülkemizdeki birçok firma tarafından etkin bir şekilde kullanılan e-tedarik sistemi, bünyesine her geçen gün daha fazla müşteri ve tedarikçi katmaktadır. Özellikle büyük ticaret devlerinin tercih ettiği e-tedarik sistemi sayesinde, firmalar milyonlarca dolarlık tasarruflar elde etmektedirler.

e-tedarik sistemi içerisinde e-ihale, e-satınalma ve kişiselleştirilmiş e-katalog çözümleri kullanılarak teklif toplama ve pazarlık süreçleri de dahil olmak üzere tüm satın alma süreçlerinde maliyet ve zaman tasarrufu sağlamakta, aynı zamanda şeffaf satın alma prosedürü ile tedarikçiler arasındaki etik rekabet arttırılmaktadır. Tüm bu işlemler, kullanıcı dostu pratik ekranları sayesinde çok kısa sürede ve hatasız olarak istenirse bizzat müşterilerin kendisi tarafından da gerçekleştirilebilmektedir.

Müşterilerimiz, e-tedarik sistemini kullanarak mevcut iş süreçlerini iyileştirirken maliyet ve zaman tasarrufu da sağlamaktadırlar.

www.etedarik.com.tr

Name: DEJ Management
Description: Dale Earnhardt Jr. is a third-generation racer in a family forever connected to American motorsports. His innate ability and intrinsic instincts behind the wheel have propelled him to 50 victories and two championships in NASCAR’s top two national touring series, but his common-sense charisma and down-to-earth disposition has catapulted his popularity well beyond the race track, resulting in a record 15 consecutive NASCAR Most Popular Driver awards. His performance on the track and off resulted in his election to the NASCAR Hall of Fame in 2021. Earnhardt Jr. won 26 NASCAR Cup races and is one of only 12 drivers to have multiple victories in the sport’s most prestigious race, the Daytona 500, winning in 2004 and 2014. As owner of JR Motorsports, Earnhardt Jr.’s NASCAR Xfinity Series team has won 64 races and series championships in 2014, 2017, and 2018. In 2018, Earnhardt Jr. joined NBC Sports Group as an analyst and influencer in its NASCAR coverage. Also in 2018, Earnhardt Jr. penned Racing to the Finish: My Story, with ESPN scribe Ryan McGee, detailing his battle with multiple concussions that affected his life, his livelihood, and his future in the sport. The book earned critical acclaim and hit the Best-Seller lists from the New York Times, USA Today and the Wall Street Journal. Earnhardt spearheads his own multimedia content network, Dirty Mo Media, which produces Dale’s podcast, The Dale Jr. Download, as well as content for various platforms and partners.

Name: African Child & Youth Development Initiatives (ACYDI)
Description:
African Child and Youth Development Initiative (ACYDI): Is Registered and Incorporated as a not-for-profit limited liability company in the Register of Companies of Uganda on Certificate Registration Number: 80020000339575, June 2017.

Founded in October 2014, ACYDI began its operations as a charitable non-government organization to mitigate the educational and poverty related concerns as well as support to improve livelihoods, health, and nutrition standards of critically vulnerable children (OVCs), women and youths in Uganda.

Our Vision: 
A country (Uganda/Africa) offering the marginalized children, youths and women an opportunity to have a say and be involved in the socio-economic development issues/decisions affecting them.

Our Mission Statement; 
To empower children, youths and women to focus, organize and work towards improved social-economic wellbeing. 

We achieve this by empathy, social and economic empowerment through self-help projects, Advocacy, networking, psychosocial support, community mobilization and sensitization, outreaches, health, and educational support. 

Who do we support

ACYDI has expanded to cover the 4 districts of Buvuma Islands, Mukono, Kayunga and Buikwe.

Currently ACYDI is supporting:

- 460 OVCs (300g:160b) with 80 HIV positive 
- 10 women groups (with men and caretakers)-VSLA of 25-30 members each 
- 252 AGYW (Adolescent girls & young women) with HIV/AIDs
- 8 Youths groups each with 20-25 members
- Street/homeless children (reconnection & follow-up project) through education initiatives, agribusiness and home based income generating activities. 

Our goal is to reach 800 OVCs, 400 women or young mothers and 300 youths (1,500) direct beneficiaries) by 2020.

Name: BeLike by SNGULAR
Description:
Cuando fundamos Belike en 2013 no teníamos muy claro qué queríamos ser. Sólo teníamos claras dos cosas, no queríamos trabajar como habíamos hecho para otros hasta aquel momento y queríamos seguir divirtiéndonos programando.

Ahora lo tenemos claro:
   - Somos ágiles de verdad. No entendemos la rigidez, ni los alcances cerrados, ni la negociación constante, ni la burocracia en los proyectos.
   - Somos efectivos. Lo más importante es hacer el software que mayor valor aporte al cliente en el menor tiempo posible, evitamos los artificios.
   - Somos cercanos. Nuestra estructura es plana, practicamos una comunicación exhaustiva y nos involucramos al máximo en nuestros proyectos. 

Hemos ayudado a muchas clientes a conseguir sus objetivos programando aplicaciones para ellos. Clientes como AECOC, Territorio Creativo, Seguros Santa Lucía, Aliseda Inmobiliaria, Autoridad Portuaria de Valencia, Aguas de Valencia, American Express,  AGFA Healthcare, Osudio y muchos más han confiado en nosotros.

Nos hemos especializado desarrollando sistemas que ayudan a los departamentos de marketing y ventas a mejorar sus beneficios, proporcionándoles las mejores herramientas que permitan medir y gestionar su negocio en tiempo real. 

Nunca nos ha dado miedo utilizar nuevas tecnologías, esto nos ha permitido ser expertos en un amplio stack tecnológico y tener un abanico infinito de posibilidades para construir el software que nuestros clientes necesitan.

El software ya no se puede construir como antes, el mundo se mueve rápido, las empresas deben adaptarse a la misma velocidad, los requisitos son cambiantes y la incertidumbre es una constante, nosotros lo sabemos, por eso somos Belike y no una gran consultora tecnológica.

Name: Lex Tax
Description:
A Lex é uma empresa de Consultoria Empresarial com foco Tributário que desenvolveu um conceito pioneiro de serviço denominado Tecnologia Tributária, através da sinergia entre o campo da inteligência tributária e o da tecnologia da informação, contando para isso com a experiência adquirida no setor público pelo seu CEO e demais executivos, principalmente nas entidades tributantes.

A empresa atua nos mais diversos segmentos da atividade econômica e possui um histórico de sucesso com crescente domínio no encaminhamento de soluções de gestão tributária, especialmente em projetos com organizações de grande porte. É a empresa de tecnologia tributária escolhida pela SAP para o desenvolvimento de soluções de auditoria fiscal no Brasil, através do COIL – co-innovation lab.

Em 2007, a empresa apresentou ao mercado o Programa de Auditoria Fiscal Eletrônica, ou seja, uma ferramenta que realizava uma ampla auditoria tributária e disponibilizava recursos gerenciais que facilitavam a tomada de decisão, com base nas informações apresentadas ao fisco nos arquivos Sintegra, livros fiscais e outras declarações.

Acompanhando a evolução da legislação tributária, no início de 2009, a Lex entrou no universo SPED, passando a processar todos os roteiros de auditoria do Programa de Auditoria Fiscal Eletrônica com base nas informações apresentadas nos arquivos da Escrituração Fiscal Digital (EFD) e Escrituração Contábil Digital (ECD). A partir de então o Programa de Auditoria Fiscal Eletrônica passou a ser processado pelo sistema SPEDLEX (Sistema de Auditoria Fiscal Eletrônica) abrangendo a escrituração e apuração fiscal do ICMS e do IPI e análise da contribuição para o PIS e da COFINS.
