Name: UNDP Mongolia
Description:
What We Do

The United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) is the UN’s global development network, working in 177 countries and territories. UNDP opened its representative office in Ulaanbaatar in 1973 after more than a decade of successful cooperation with Mongolia. Ever since, UNDP has worked for equitable and sustainable development for the benefit of all Mongolians. UNDP is committed to helping the Government and the people of Mongolia achieve its nine national Millennium Development Goals as well as other national development priorities.

Our Goals

The goal of UNDP is to improve the lives of the people of Mongolia, especially the poorest and most vulnerable, and to work towards a future that offers equality, dignity and opportunity for all.

Name: Heygo
Description:
Heygo es una de las aplicaciones móvil líderes en España para ofrecer y buscar servicios entre particulares de manera geolocalizada, con más de 270.000 usuarios registrados en sus primeros meses de vida. La aplicación ofrece, de manera gratuita, una oportunidad a todas aquellas personas, mayores de 16 años, de ganar un dinero extra anunciando sus habilidades y, al mismo tiempo, la de encontrar a alguien cerca que ayude con aquello que necesitamos. 

Heygo cerró en noviembre de 2015, en sólo tres días, una ronda de inversión de 200.000€ de la mano de los Grupos Godó y Zeta, de Carlos Blanco, y de todos sus mentores. Como consecuencia del rápido crecimiento que ha tenido, Heygo se encuentra inmersa en una ronda  para completar su expansión en el país e iniciar su andadura internacional antes de final de año. 

Heygo soluciona 3 problemas que hasta ahora ninguna app había solucionado: proporcionar una amplia oferta de servicios cerca de ti de confianza, hacer rentable y dar valor añadido a las habilidades que tiene la gente y permitir a particulares y profesionales anunciarse y hacer crecer su negocio. 

¿Cómo funciona Heygo? 

La aplicación clasifica la oferta en base a la proximidad, de modo que los usuarios siempre encuentran a la persona que les puede ayudar los más cerca posible. Probablemente hasta se conozcan entre ellos!

Esta proximidad, junto a las opiniones de los usuarios, aportan el valor de la confianza; un valor esencial para una plataforma de economía colaborativa con voluntad de servicio y de crecimiento. 

El usuario simplemente busca el servicio que necesita, lee su descripción y valoraciones y, si está interesado, contacta con el anunciante, bien vía chat, bien vía llamada de teléfono. Así de rápido y fácil. 

Heygo no es otra plataforma de búsqueda de empleo, ni pretende serlo. Su misión: ser la app de referencia de economía on demand por y para ciudadanos y fomentar así nuevas oportunidades para consumidores y emprendedores.

Name: The CEO Institute Middle East
Description:
The CEO Institute was founded by Ken Gunn - currently Chairman & CEO - in 1992 as a peer to peer membership organisation for Chief Executives. The CEO Institute was established to help business leaders connect with their peers and learn from them.

With more than 1,000 members, it is Australia’s leading executive membership organisation for CEOs and senior executives who want to be better informed, more efficient business leaders.

They come from all industries and have an annual revenues ranging from $2 million to many billions. A key feature of The CEO Institute’s programs, is the careful matching of its members in each Syndicate or group, which is supported by a non-competitive and confidential environment helping promote member trust to maximise positive outcomes.

In 2011 The CEO Institute became the world’s first global certification body for CEOs. The Institute's Certified CEO designation is a mark of respect and a reason for pride and is awarded through either an academic or experiential pathway.

It sets the gold standard for acknowledging the professional qualifications and experience of business leaders and their commitment to continuous professional development and applied management thinking.

We, along with The CEO Institute, take great pleasure in introducing and conducting the CEO Programs in the Middle East.

You can find out more about The CEO Institute - Middle East, its programs and global certification at www.ceoinstitute.ae

De Bestuurskamer is er voor vragen en dilemma’s op het niveau van executives en toezichthouders. Zoals: Een succesvolle transitie naar een nieuwe rol als leider, groeien als leider, verbeteren van de samenwerking in het team, een evaluatie, als de samenwerking in de RvC of met de directie niet optimaal loopt.

Wij zijn zelf ervaren bestuurders en commissarissen en al jaren betrokken bij dit soort onderwerpen. We hebben onze sporen verdiend én zelf de nodige butsen opgelopen. 

Onze kracht is om individuele bestuurders, teams en toezichthouders vooruit te helpen. Vanuit de ervaring dat besturen topsport en mensenwerk is. 

We zijn er voor een vliegende start in een nieuwe rol, maar ook bij dilemma’s of opkomende conflicten. Als een team alleen op papier een team is maar zonder productieve harmonie. Of als er steun gewenst is voor lastige beslissingen, maar waar de belangrijkste stakeholders tegenover elkaar lijken te staan. Omdat wij uit ervaring weten hoe eenzaam de top kan zijn, zijn wij er voor een zinvolle en constructieve dialoog. Om de zaak weer in beweging te krijgen en het creëren van nieuw perspectief. 

Onze dienstverlening is drieledig: 
-	Steun en toeverlaat voor de executive
-	Hulp in de bestuurskamer
-	Persoonlijke groei en coaching voor leiders

Name: RobotUnion
Description:
RobotUnion is a funded project finished in 2021. During 3 years of its activity, the RobotUnion project discovered, supported and funded 20 European Superstar Scaleups confirmed by top VC investors and global corporates of 4 new market domains for robotics: manufacturing, agriculture, healthcare and civil infrastructure.
40 companies developing research will be selected out of a pan-European deal flow of 300 Scaleups through 2 Open Calls. The top 20 joined an acceleration programme that helped them progress from TRL4 to TRL7 onwards. This 6 to 12-month programme provided them with technical and non-technical support services.
Of the selected companies, 8 top-performers will start a fundraising campaign led by the VCs and platforms in the consortium leveraging the €8M of public funding with an additional €8M of private investment.
RobotUnion demonstrated how Europe can lead disruption around Robotics and turn the EU into the EU of entrepreneurial states.

RobotUnion has received funding from the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under the Grant Agreement no 779967. Améliorer la compréhension entre les éléments nouveaux et traditionnels des communautés et des écosystèmes émergents, y compris l'engagement constructif du secteur public à appuyer les programmes publics conçus par les entrepreneurs. Il faut un village où tout le monde collabore pour réussir.

Soutenir l'émergence d'une nouvelle classe d'entrepreneurs mondiaux ayant accès à la recherche, aux programmes et aux réseaux à l'intérieur du réseau GEN de 160 nations fortes. Les frontières nationales sont poreuses à l'innovation et une nouvelle classe créatrice de preneurs de risques est câblée à un réseau mondial.

Relier une communauté émergente de conseillers nationaux en démarrage à un réseau de prochaine génération d'instituts de recherche en entrepreneuriat de classe mondiale dans le but de générer des données et des recherches plus solides pour appuyer l'élaboration de politiques fondées sur des données probantes et des programmes de soutien entrepreneurial plus efficaces. En bref, les données et l'analyse sur ce qui fonctionne et ce qui ne contribue pas à la formation de nouvelles entreprises.

Name: 4S Management Consulting
Description:
Today we are overwhelmed by an avalanche of digital opportunities. While the benefits of data-driven decisions and advanced automation have been proven, the abundance of possibilities makes it very difficult for our companies and organizations to identify and scale the right investments within the digital domain.

It is therefore my conviction that investments in digital transformation should be fully aligned with the company's vision, values, objectives and strategy and should be translated into a clear digital transformation roadmap for the short and medium term. Architecture and governance must be designed and built to implement and manage digital support as efficiently as possible.
This requires companies to collaborate carefully with their ecosystem of partners and suppliers to bring together the right competencies and tools.

With 4S Management Consulting I want to contribute to the composition of these ecosystems and provide companies with the right mix of competencies and platforms that are needed in the field of operational and industrial digitization while remaining trough to my personal values: Sustainable, Secure, Synergistic & Straightforward.

Bases on my years of experience as a consultant within the domain of Digital Operations and Product and Service Design, I know where the pain points lie and I know which organizational models, frameworks and architectures can be used as a base. However, my experience also teaches me that magic formulas do not exist and that digital transformation is intensive and demands a lot from the organization. That is why a company-specific approach based on the understanding of the organization is a key ingredient for success.

Name: ScienceCup
Description:
ScienceCup is een organisatie die (technische) start-ups helpt bij het verwezenlijken van hun droom, het maken van een werkend prototype. ScienceCup stelt kapitaal beschikbaar om een onderneming te starten en levert commerciële kennis en capaciteit om producten wereldwijd te verkopen. 

Drietrapsraket
De eerste trap is een foundation, stichting, die geld en kennis beschikbaar stelt om ideeën om te zetten in werkbare en handelbare prototypes. De eerste stap na het ontwikkelen van het idee op papier in al zijn facetten. Een fase die ook noodzakelijk is om de levensvatbaarheid verder te kunnen bepalen. Zowel technisch, financieel en uiteraard ook commercieel. In deze fase worden starters begeleid door een coach, passend bij het product, passend bij de mensen achter het product. Het doel is om elk jaar ongeveer 200 ideeën om te zetten in werkbare prototypes.

De tweede stap is bij gebleken geschiktheid van het idee. Het ScienceCup Fund kan vervolgens besluiten om te investeren in het bedrijf. Het investeringsfonds stelt geld beschikbaar om de beginnende ondernemer organisatorisch, financieel, juridisch en fiscaal startklaar te maken voor productie. Bovendien kijkt in deze fase een adviseur vanuit ScienceCup mee om zo de kans van slagen te vergroten. Deelnemende investeerders kunnen desgewenst ook deze adviesrol op zich nemen.

De derde stap is de verkoop en distributie van het product, die door ScienceCup Sales & Distributie wordt genomen. Het vinden en contracteren van launching customers in Nederland en daarbuiten wordt in overleg opgestart. Het kan ook voorkomen dat de starter  zijn bedrijf in zijn geheel wil verkopen. In dat geval begeleidt ScienceCup Sales & Distribution die verkoop met behulp van een groot (internationaal) netwerk van ervaren dealmakers.

Name: Pensare Globalmente Agire Localmente
Description: Pensare Globalmente Agire Localmente è un’associazione senza scopo di lucro, con finalità civiche e di utilità sociale, nata per promuovere l“Agenda 2030” delle Nazioni Unite, un piano di azione concordato e sottoscritto a Parigi nel 2015 da 193 Stati, che si sviluppa attraverso 17 obiettivi interdisciplinari da raggiungere entro il 2030.L’Agenda contempla è connette tra di loro tutte le aree dello sviluppo umano e si propone di realizzare una trasformazione “sostenibile” per frenare il disastro ambientale provocato dal cambiamento climatico indotto dall’uso indiscriminato delle risorse disponibili e dalle produzioni industriali. Gli squilibri ecologici, provocati per oltre un secolo dall’incuria del modello consumistico, hanno portato  a rovinose ricadute in tutti gli ambiti della vita planetaria. Dobbiamo ritornare a ricostruire gli equilibri perduti ma possiamo farlo solo attraverso la consapevolezza di una condivisione comune e responsabile del pianeta da parte di tutti i cittadini e delle loro organizzazioni. Il programma dell’Agenda 2030 promuove la responsabilità sociale e la partecipazione attiva di tutti gli abitanti del pianeta ai processi di cambiamento economico, ambientale, sociale. Pensare Globalmente – Agire Localmente, oltre ai 17 obiettivi di sostenibilità, ha adottato il simbolo del Terzo Paradiso di Michelangelo Pistoletto, artista internazionele e presidente onorario dell’associazione. Un simbolo che è diventato anche uno strumento pratico e operativo, così come lo stesso Michelangelo Pistoletto, fondatore di Cittadellarte, enuncia nel suo manifesto, Ominiteismo e Demopaxia; un manuale per lo sviluppo reale di azioni dirette a favorire tutti i programmi di trasformazione responsabile e sostenibile del pianeta.

Name: 1% for Development Fund
Description:
The 1% for Development Fund encourages personal involvement in fostering the improvement of living conditions, the well-being and the dignity of communities in developing countries. It seeks to build partnerships with associations that plan and implement projects in a perspective of sustainable development and self-empowerment. It offers an opportunity for its members to become involved in this effort through the contribution of 1% of their income for the funding of projects and through other activities in support of the Fund’s goals.

The 1% for Development Fund was created in 1976 by a small group of United Nations staff members in Geneva, who decided to contribute 1% of their salaries to finance small-scale development projects. The movement was inspired by the 1970 UN Resolution 2626 (XXV) calling on developed countries to allocate 0.7% of their GNP for official development assistance. Seeing that this target was not being achieved by most countries, the founders of the 1% Fund decided to make a personal commitment to development.  Today, membership in the Fund is open to anyone who adheres to the Fund’s aims, beyond UN staff members.

Name: Lupus Foundation of America, Iowa Chapter
Description:
The Lupus Foundation of America, Iowa Chapter

The LFA, Iowa Chapter is part of a national force devoted to solving the cruel mystery of lupus while providing caring support to those who suffer from its brutal impact.  

A Comprehensive Strategy

Lupus is a complex disease that requires a comprehensive strategy.  Our programs and services all have a common purpose: To improve the quality of life for all people affected by lupus. 

Research
We raise money to support research through the Lupus Foundation of America’s National Research program, Bringing Down the Barriers, which aggressively pursues an agenda to find answers to the most difficult questions and advance the science and medicine of lupus.  Our national research program has a unique three-pronged strategy: lead special initiatives, fund researchers, and advocate for expanded investment.

Education & Support Services
We answer questions about lupus, provide tools, resources, and referrals to doctors who treat lupus, and help guide individuals and families through the complexities of living with lupus and toward a better quality of life. 

Awareness Efforts                                                  
We conduct outreach efforts and share stories of those who suffer from lupus to increase awareness of lupus, bring greater attention to the disease and its devastating impact, and rally public support to join the fight to end lupus.

Advocacy Efforts
We advocate on behalf of all people with lupus, their families, and the health professionals who care for them.

Name: STAMP CLEANTECH LIMITED
Description:
STAMP CLEANTECH LTD is a Kenyan social enterprise leading the fight against climate change and promoting better health outcomes. We focus on:
•	Renewable Energy Solutions: Developing innovative renewable energy technologies and strategies to reduce reliance on fossil fuels for a cleaner, greener planet.
•	Clean Cooking Technologies: Training women and youth in the use, adoption, and design of improved cookstoves for households and institutions. We also support the development of sustainable fuel options like charcoal briquettes and biogas systems.
•	Energy Centers & Entrepreneurship: Establishing household energy centers to train last-mile entrepreneurs, empowering them to provide sustainable energy solutions within their communities.
•	Climate-Health Initiatives: Developing innovative data collection methods and interventions promoting climate-resilient and healthy communities.
•	Training & Capacity Building: Offering competency-based training in Human-Centered Design, Climate Health Innovation, Renewable Energy, and Social and Health Impact Measurement.
•	Youth Mentorship: Supporting young people to turn their climate and health-focused initiatives into realities.
Mission: We envision a sustainable future where communities benefit from clean energy, climate education, and improved health initiatives. We work to make this future possible for generations to come.
Partnership Opportunities: We seek funding and collaboration for our initiatives in these key areas:
•	Training programs for clean cooking technologies, adoption, and sustainability.
•	Improved Cookstove design and fabrication.
•	Establishment and management of household energy centers.
•	Training for distributors and manufacturers of charcoal briquettes, and installation of biogas systems.
•	Grants supporting our mission.
•	Climate health data collection and intervention development.
•	Hosting an energy center of excellence for solution demonstration, training, and impact measurement.

Name: In-Connect
Description:
In-Connect is an innovative social network that allows entrepreneurs to collaborate with other people who have similar interests, connect to valuable resources, and eventually evolve their idea into a business.
 
First off, In-Connect provides a safe platform for entrepreneurs to voice their ideas and discuss their business plans. Whether someone has a well-thought-out plan, a brand-new idea, or simply just a passion, they can benefit from this website. Additionally, In-Connect helps you find Entrepreneurs with similar ideas and passions, allowing for collaboration and communication on any type of project. Overall, this gives entrepreneurs the opportunity to find co-founders, learn from other people's recommendations, and create a very strong foundation to build off of.

Secondly, In-Connect offers an abundance of resources that help entrepreneurs start-up their own company. These resources cover various topics like building a business plan, marketing, advertising, coding, and much more. Ultimately, this allows the entrepreneurs to become dependent on themselves and turn their passions into a company. Instead of working with a start-up company and paying thousands of dollars, entrepreneurs can do it all on their own while saving lots of money and time. 

Lastly, the main goal of In-Connect is to evolve ideas into businesses that leave a lasting positive impact on the world. Through the two steps listed above, entrepreneurs will make a better tomorrow.

Нас вдохновляет, что системы управления помогают людям и берегут самый ценный ресурс — время. Поэтому мы внедряем инструменты автоматизации и быстрой обработки информации. В итоге получаем результат, которым гордимся.

Name: Anthropolicy Culture Brokers
Description:
We believe organizational leadership must be a stronger force to expand the cultures of human rights and to close the spaces of resistance around DE&I in all policies and operations. 

Private and nonprofit leaders are focused on how their operations impact people, communities, and the environment. Anthropolicy helps them move away from simply avoiding adverse impacts and instead embrace a positive vision that centers human rights and DE&I in operations and policies every day, in every way. 

Interpreting DE&I efforts as human rights is an invitation for us to think differently about stakeholder and corporate responsibility, to align public profit with human purpose and potential. It is an invitation to be courageous when facing the backlog of resistance and injustice that prevents us all from being our professional and personal best. At $64 billion, the losses attributed to workplace discrimination reveal the cultural competency deficits that spiral social and economic capital downwards. Anthropolicy helps leaders audaciously build workplaces that serve everyone.

Anthropolicy’s founder, Aaron Pina, spent 20 years interpreting international human rights and DE&I standards for government, businesses, civil society leaders, and organizations. Aaron advises and coaches high-level negotiators and principals across the globe on how to multiply the impact of their human rights operations and policy.  

Anthropolicy is dogged when it comes to infusing private and public operational policies with clear, efficient approaches that give partners a competitive advantage and an edge in recruitment and retention. We deliver holistic and pragmatic human rights and DE&I solutions grounded in what works and what is right.

Name: Applied Regenerative Economics
Description:
Applied Regenerative Economics is the advanced interdisciplinary study of science, finance, technology and the environment, and their various sub-domains, which focus on experimental approaches to regenerating natural resources in the effort to stabilize economies and restore biospheric processes according to natural laws and quantum dynamics.

It involves three primary interdisciplinary functions:

+ the responsible use of natural resources (ecology)
+ the responsible allocations of natural capital (economics)
+ the responsible uses & measurements of natural value (ecocommons)

This effort guides the pragmatic design of currencies, platforms and the development of resources such that any and all risks are amortized, and profits can be redistributed, based on sound logic as well as participatory governance which measures value per the interests and capacities of individuals.

The curriculum is a joint effort between the Exosphere Institute (a mobile training program in existence for 8 years in over 30 countries) along with an array of partners with specialties in ecosystemic design, cryptographic protocols, and financial engineering (for good or equitable purposes).

Si hay una palabra que nos define, esa es Integridad.
Integridad porque tenemos claro que nuestro cliente es el profesional de la privacidad y nuestra misión ayudarle a él.
Integridad porque sabemos que no podemos ser competencia de nuestros clientes, y hemos elegido llevarlo a sus últimas consecuencias: SOLO vendemos LOPDmanager a profesionales de la privacidad; por el mismo motivo, NO HACEMOS consultoría de protección de datos.

Em 2013, a SENSORA completa 40 anos de atividades no mercado de Geotecnologias e serviços nas áreas de Geociências. Constituída essencialmente por profissionais qualificados, está sob o comando do Diretor Luiz Henrique Aguiar Azevedo, Esp. em Sensoriamento Remoto e Geomática pela National Aeronautics and Space Administration - NASA e Dr. em Geociências pela Universidade de São Paulo - USP.

Ao longo de quatro décadas desenvolveu ações qualitativas no setor espacial e ambiental como o SISPLANTE (Sistema de Planejamento Territorial); o levantamento do meio físico, vegetação nativa e da fauna silvestre das regiões abrangidas pela bacia do Rio São Francisco visando a sua transposição; criação do IET (Instituto de Estudos da Terra), além de estudos e mapeamentos para diversas esferas da sociedade. Trabalhos estes reconhecidos por entidades nacionais e internacionais, por meio de prêmios, pelo pioneirismo no setor de sensoriamento remoto.

É por isso, que a SENSORA se orgulha em comemorar seus 40 anos de atuação. E, como presente a clientes, parceiros e usuários, anuncia em breve  o lançamento do SISPLANTE - 4.0, com sistema web, além de retomar as atividades do IET, com o objetivo de cada vez mais consolidar suas ações, pesquisas e cursos, aproximando você do universo GEO.

Name: UPCorp Global
Description:
The past decades have seen an increase in the values of remittances in total international capital flows. According to the World Bank, remittance flows in 2018 were more than three times the size of official development assistance and in some developing countries, incoming remittances represent more than 10 percent of GDP. 

IFAD and World Bank have concluded that financial literacy is fundamental to empower remittance recipients to make the most of funds received. Migrants’ families were also found to be keen to save and invest their resources, but often lack knowledge and access to options to do so. 

UPCorp Global aims to fill this gap with a global financial education initiative. We aim to provide solutions and support to increase the financial literacy level of remittance recipients in developing countries, while trying to bridge the gaps between remittance recipients' demands and services provided by local financial institutions.

Our name UPCorp just simply means "Unleash everyone's Potential". 

We were incubated by Lund University's VentureLab since 2019 - 2021 to develop this social venture idea to the next stage. We're currently looking for team members and reaching to potential partners. If you support the same cause with us and want to be part of our team, please feel free to reach out to us. If you think we can be partners in any way, we're also happy to hear from you.

Name: Innovation Academy
Description:
Innovation Academy, formerly Table Top Inventing, is dedicated to developing innovators on purpose. There is so much potential in every human being, and we want to liberate that potential. With the challenges facing us locally, nationally, and globally, we can’t afford to lightly disregard the potential hidden inside every student. Instead we need to open the mind, spark the curiosity, and set fire to the imagination!

The Innovation Academy approach is to create a powerful learning environment, provide students state-of-the-art tools, and step to the side while students explore and learn through projects. Inquiry-driven, project-based learning puts students squarely in charge of their own education by providing an environment where growth naturally occurs through the process of “hard fun”. Working alongside others with all their senses and mind fully engaged, students learn to solve challenging problems.  With an environment rich in possibilities and inspiration students have the raw materials to become amazing!

We believe what Socrates said, “I cannot teach anyone anything. I can only make them think.” Thinking is a very personal activity done for very personal reasons, but most education focuses on pushing knowledge at students rather than encouraging students to pull knowledge in and turn it into wisdom.  None of us can reach our hands into the brain of a student and help them rewire neurons. Yet on the other hand, environments can be created where we encourage exploration, tinkering, and personal thoughts without the fear of criticism or stigma of failure. In fact around here, we don’t really believe in failure. Failure is simply the first step to something amazing!

Productive “failure” is the main ingredient in innovation.

For more about the history of Innovation Academy, please visit http://developinginnovators.com/about

Name: United for Nepal
Description:
United for Nepal is a non-profit organisation led by students of the Master’s programme in Human Rights and Multi-Level Governance of the Univeristy of Padua. Since 2015, after the devastating earthquake in Nepal, every year the association organizes a fundraising campaign devoted to the promotion of social inclusion of the most vulnerable groups such as women and children in rural areas. The activities and goals of United for Nepal are in line with the UN SDGs, namely Goal 4 “Quality Education” and Goal 10 “Reduced Inequality”. 
Thanks to the donations received, in the previous editions U4N was able to help rebuild schools, severely damaged by the earthquake, and support inhabitants (especially women) recover financially through spreading awareness about Microfinance programmes. In the last 2 years U4N invested the funds on the upgrading work of classrooms, the purchase of educational materials, and the extension of the internet connection in the Koldon Devi Secondary School, located in Timure (Sindupalchok), a rural and isolated village in the northern area of Nepal, the most affected by the earthquake. 
The donations are directly delivered by the students, who every year travel to Nepal during the Winter school “Microfinance in Action”, funded by the Human Rights Centre Antonio Papisca, to personally meet the beneficiaries and visit the places where the funds are invested. 
The goals of the projects are annually reviewed and evaluated according to the changing needs. This year, the fundraising will be destined primarily to Koldon Devi Secondary School. Considering the importance that technology had for schools and universities during the pandemic, the funds raised will be used for the renewal of the school's internet connection and for the increase of the technological equipment available to children and teachers.
Please check our social media:
FB: United for Nepal https://www.facebook.com/unitedfornepal.padova/

Name: PSC Antwerpen vzw
Description:
The Protestant Social Centre Antwerp vzw (het PSC Antwerpen vzw) exists already almost 45 years. PSC stands for not settling for injustice, for initiative under protest, for sustained humanity. PSC is a warm movement from and with people. Believing together that things can be done differently and act accordingly! If necessary, against the wind. Full of color, good courage and fresh ideas. PSC is deeply rooted in the city and always on the move!

Since 1979 is the Protestant Social Centre active and known in Antwerp as an initiator of various projects with and for people in difficulties, mainly people in poverty and people fleeing. Throughout the various projects, presence and equality are always the starting point. Our protest, based on hope, is constructive: we don't beat around the bush, we stand up for those who need it. We are convinced that only when everyone really counts, can a society move forward.

As Protestants, protesting is in our blood. 500 years ago, Luther also stood up against structural social injustice. He came up with 95 statements; following his example, we bundle our protest into 9,5 focal points, on which our work is inspired time and again.

Originated from the enthusiasm of a few Protestants and grown into a tree with many branches and cuttings, the PSC works with support from the government, churches and charities, and in partnership with good partners and allies.
Volunteers are also very important here. The PSC Antwerp is a true volunteer organization with committed people from all walks of life, from different countries, cultures and religions and sources of inspiration, together for a better world! Together in the storm.

Name: Brightgray Solutions
Description:
When hundreds of at-risk patients were lost during Hurricane Katrina, it was more apparent than ever that a central repository of vulnerable patient data was necessary for emergency planning, evacuation and recovery efforts. With the feedback and guidance of those impacted organizations, the founders of Brightgray Solutions volunteered to solve this problem. The solution is WatchPoint AtRisk Registry.

WatchPoint AtRisk Registry is a cloud-based SaaS solution, developed to track the real-time status, location and medical needs of vulnerable or at-risk patients before and during every stage of a disaster. With this HIPAA-compliant system, medical care providers can communicate with emergency responders and government agencies about members of the local population that need priority assistance:
•	Home-bound patients
•	Hospital patients
•	Patients on life support
•	Patients with disabilities
•	Children and adults with special needs

WatchPoint AtRisk Registry provides the operational foundation for CMS compliance with the Emergency Preparedness Conditions of Participation (CoPs) for healthcare providers and streamlines collaboration across all organizations in an evacuation or disaster scenario.

Inpatient Care Providers
With a single updated repository of your vulnerable patient information, you can provide critical patient details for disaster planning and evacuations, to emergency management personnel, in real time.

Outpatient Care Providers
Weekly updates of your vulnerable outpatient population help local emergency managers easily assess where assets need to be deployed in times of crisis. Provide the communication tool they need to access vulnerable patient status, location and individual medical needs.

RPE GROUP srl ha elaborato un sistema di interpolazione dinamica che sinergizza a 360° tutti gli aspetti che concorrono al raggiungimento del successo economico degli imprenditori e, più in generale, delle PMI.
E’ proprio dalla combinazione di tali aspetti che RPE GROUP si prefigge di porre di fronte ai mercati realtà imprenditoriali già consolidate insieme ad altre che necessitano di essere rafforzate attraverso l’utilizzo dei mezzi posti a disposizione dai numerosissimi partner della Società che, ognuno per la propria parte, contribuisce, laddove possibile, alla mission del “gruppo”.
RPE GROUP costituisce l’acronimo di "Recovery Plan Enterprise Group" e ciò non è un caso.
L’idea di organizzare un “gruppo” che possa fungere da ricettore delle innumerevoli esigenze e difficoltà dell’imprenditoria in tempi di conclamata recessione e pandemia e che possa soddisfare l’esigenza di sviluppo dei propri assistiti attraverso l’interpolazione e l’intervento strutturato di una moltitudine di partner selezionati, è la vera MISSION del Gruppo ovvero ciò che i soci fondatori ritengono possa essere il vero Recovery Plan Enterprise per le imprese.
Il Gruppo si avvale altresì di primarie società certificate che operano nel settore finanziario Internazionale a 360° oltre ad Istituti Bancari, Broker e consulenti finanziari fortemente specializzati che si pongono a disposizione esclusivamente delle medie e grandi imprese.
Per ogni esigenza vengono elaborati appositi studi finanziari analitici che possano condurre allo sviluppo dei business imprenditoriali attraverso sistemi integrati e/o differenziati di altissimo livello strutturale che tengono conto delle effettive fattibilità neutralizzando i rischi di impresa.
Una attenzione speciale è dedicata ai progetti innovativi ideati da imprenditori o società di capitali o Start up per le quali il gruppo coordina e predispone, studi di fattibilità, business plan, fattibilità finanziaria, partnerships strategiche e joint ventures.

Rowmania is the brand of the Ivan Patzaichin – Mila 23 Association, which develops tourism products, social entrepreneurship programs, campaigns for rowing, and sustainable development programs in protected natural areas. Name: Solid Network
Description:
WE PARTNER WITH SOFTWARE COMPANIES TO DISTRIBUTE THEIR SOFTWARE FOR FREE IN OUR MARKETPLACE USING THEIR USER’S HARDWARE (GPU) TO MONETIZE IT WHILE THE DEVICE IS ONLINE.

We use a hashing module that works on the user’s GPU (Graphic Card), managing usage cycles and leveraging it to mine crypto-currency (RVN-Ravencoin). Everything is done with throttle control on low priority, so their computer is not affected when a different application requires GPU. 



At no point the system collect or share personal information from the software user.



We provide an out of the box solution for our partners, offering them API access, marketing, and support to migrate their application to our marketplace successfully.

Name: Love Your Team
Description:
The hybrid work revolution has made sales management the most pivotal role in the innovation economy—and simultaneously the most challenging. 
The workforce power structure has flipped, putting every top seller in a position to write their own ticket. To succeed now, you must urgently, intentionally, and pragmatically shift your focus from traditional deals and dollars to the ambitions, success, and well-being of each member of your team. 

Your top seller just became your number one customer! 

Love Your Team is a conversation-by-conversation survival guide for sales managers who want to thrive in a world where their top talent can walk out the door without taking a single step. Helen Fanucci provides detailed instructions on how to shift focus from merely hitting sales goals to putting sellers first—as people and performers—making YOU the reason they join, stay, and win.

HELEN FANUCCI is an MIT-trained engineer who has built her reputation and career managing teams responsible for billions of dollars of quota. She developed the Love Your Team system of sales management over a 25-year career on the front lines at top tech companies including Apple, Sun Microsystems, IBM, and Microsoft. Helen hosts the Love Your Team podcast, which focuses on retaining top talent and building high-performing teams.

- Are healthy in body, mind and spirit
- Can lead a normal life, if they choose.
- Be paid fairly for the hard work they do.
- Have the opportunities to work where their heart desires and where they are best suited.

Name: MenteZero
Description:
Installazioni interattive, applicazioni, edugame, e-learning, stampe ed animazioni
Dal 2003 eleviamo l’iconografia del videogioco e ne estrapoliamo i significati e i linguaggi portandoli fuori dal contesto ludico. Il nostro interesse è direzionato verso le nuove tecnologie multimediali nella cultura, nell’arte e nell’educazione.
Da 7 anni in costante collaborazione con Neoludica, abbiamo partecipato a numerose esibizioni ed attività, inclusa la Game Art Revolution del 2015 e l’esibizione dedicata ad Assassin’s Creed Origins “The Door of Time” durante il Lucca Comics & Games del 2017.
Come MenteZero abbiamo anche sviluppato dei progetti di Gamification per istituzioni e aziende, creando videogames in Realtà Aumentata e Realtà Virtuale. Il nostro lavoro non è limitato alla creazione di uno stand-alone ma si apre ad un ecosistema corale, lo standard per un design interattivo e multimediale.Dal 2012 Biancamaria Mori entra a far parte dell’associazione da prima come studente e successivamente come vicepresidente, arrivando a portare l’associazione alla Biennale di Venezia nel 2015. Negli anni successivi MenteZero si è evoluta, diventando un nucleo di due artisti appoggiato da una rete di collaborazioni nel campo delle tecnologie e della cultura. Oggi MenteZero si occupa professionalmente della produzione di opere d’arte multimediali e interattive, dello sviluppo di piattaforme e videogiochi per l’ambito Business e Culturale. 
Partecipa nuovamente alla Biennale di Venezia con Ubisoft con opere di GameArt, espone in diversi spazi espositivi tra cui il Fuorifestival del Cinema di Pesaro e il fuorifestival di Games Week Milano, vince il terzo premio internazionale di videomapping al Kernel di Desio, è candidata al David di Donatello per il film Sfashion, di cui ha fatto fotografia digitale e Color Correction.
Rientra tra gli autori di svariati saggi sulla correlazione tra videogioco e arte.

Welcome to my Neighbourhood (Welkom in mijn Wijk) is an exchange program between so-called 'BME schools' (schools with 70% or more black and minority ethnic students) and non-BME-schools. The exchange programme offers children an opportunity to broaden their horizons and interact with children outside of their own school, neighbourhood and social and ethnic group.

The programme aims at strengthening social cohesion within urban environments. It does so by stimulating the multicultural competence of children who are growing up in an environment of cultural/ethnic separation. Furthermore, Welcome to my Neighbourhood focuses on children's commitment to their town (feeling of belonging) by making them hosts in their own area and introducing them to areas and people in the city unknown to them as yet. In Amsterdam (The Netherlands) the 2010/2011 programme is running for the fifth consecutive year. In the coming year new programs are developed and the project will also start in several other cities in The Netherlands.

Welcome to my Neighbourhood has been accepted for inclusion in the Compendium of good practices in human rights education. The official title of the Compendium is: "Human Rights Education in the School Systems of Europe, Central Asia and North America: A Compendium of Good Practice".

Name: DevelopMental Safety & Workplace Wellbeing
Description:
Think strategy. Think sustainability.
Think wellbeing as a leadership and organisational capability — not a quick fix.

Organisations that thrive don’t treat wellbeing as a standalone initiative or a reaction to crisis. They embed it into how decisions are made, how leaders lead, and how systems operate — across six-month priorities, annual plans, and long-term strategy.

Strategic Resilience is the name of the game.

 Many leaders are quietly questioning whether their current approach to wellbeing is actually doing what they need it to do.

Engagement surveys come and go. What truly matters is what happens in between — how leaders respond to pressure, how systems support (or drain) people, and how psychosocial risks are recognised before they escalate into harm, turnover, or underperformance.

At DevelopMental Safety & Workplace Wellbeing, we work with CEOs and leaders who care about their people and their organisation’s future.

Our work supports organisations to:

Build mentally healthy, high-performing workplaces without reliance on burnout or individual coping

Strengthen leadership capability under pressure

Reduce psychosocial risk through better systems, not more policies

Improve retention, engagement and sustainable performance

Translate wellbeing into practical, everyday leadership behaviours

What we offer:

Strategic resilience programmes for leaders and teams

Career and executive coaching

Wellbeing and resilience workshops (practical, not fluffy)

Psychosocial safety audits and advisory support

DevelopMental Safety means creating the conditions for:

Clear thinking and confident decision-making

Early, constructive conversations

Innovation and shared responsibility

Sustainable performance — for people and organisations

 If you’re already having these conversations internally, we can help you turn them into action. 
CONTACT: elena@developmental.net.au for a Virtual Cuppa

Mentally healthy workplaces don’t happen by accident.
They’re designed!

Name: FoodMakers Africa
Description:
At FoodMakers Africa, we're passionate about Food Systems Transformation for the Sustainability and resilience of Smallholder Farmers in Africa. 

Smallholder farming plays a pivotal role in food systems across Sub-Saharan Africa, however, its ability to support livelihoods and meet the increasing global food demand is increasingly jeopardized by climate change. 

Agriculture, particularly by smallholders, is a double-edged sword in the context of climate change. On one hand, it is a vital source of income, nutrition, and social security for millions. On the other, it contributes to greenhouse gas emissions, exacerbating climate change. 

Our mission is to co-create an inclusive, resilient, sustainable agriculture ecosystem with and for smallholder farmers, the cornerstone of Africa's agriculture, through innovative, climate-smart solutions.

 We invite you to join us! 
Whether through partnerships or knowledge exchange, your support will significantly impact millions of smallholder farmers in Africa.

Name: Better Organisations
Description:
Better Organisations is a Research & Innovation company that helps organisations transform into better organisations: purpose-driven, future-ready entities that tackle societal and environmental challenges while building commercial value. The company integrates business design, organisational culture development/transformations and sustainable business design to support partners navigating complex strategic, cultural and market transitions. Its work combines human-centred design, systems thinking and evidence-based experimentation, ensuring that solutions are commercially viable, adoptable and aligned with long-term impact goals.

A core capability is the design and facilitation of Living Labs, which provide real-life environments for testing value propositions, business models and emerging value chains. These labs mobilise users, employees, experts and partners to surface adoption barriers, refine concepts and generate early evidence of commercial, organisational and societal feasibility. For Horizon Europe consortia, they strengthen exploitation pathways, impact logic and market readiness from early TRLs. For companies, they reduce risk, accelerate learning and support the creation of offerings that work in real markets.

Better Organisations also embeds human-centricity, sustainability and resilience into innovation processes and organisational strategies. This ensures that technological, organisational and business-model developments support profitable growth while addressing wider system needs. The company’s work spans technology-oriented Living Labs, SME and social-enterprise transitions, early-stage business-model development, capability-building programmes and ecosystem strategy processes - helping partners navigate complexity, validate assumptions and build solutions that generate commercial value while contributing to major societal and environmental challenges.

Name: Idyla | Strategisch adviesbureau
Description:
Hoe navigeer je als leider in een dynamische omgeving? Steeds meer organisaties kiezen voor een vorm van zelforganisatie om wendbaar in te kunnen spelen op een snel veranderende interne en externe omgeving. Vaak wordt hierbij vergeten de leiderschapsstijl aan de nieuwe structuur aan te passen, of wordt zelfs gedacht dat er in zelforganisatie geen leider nodig is. Niets is minder waar. Zelforganisatie vraagt misschien nog wel meer om leiderschap dan een traditioneel geleide organisatie. In een hiërarchische structuur kom je met managers die de organisatie strak aansturen heel ver zonder leiders. De managers zorgen immers dat de resultaten behaald worden, en dat iedereen doet wat er van hem verwacht wordt en het liefst nog een beetje meer. Of dit inspirerend is en zorgt voor werkplezier, is een andere vraag, maar functioneel kan het wel zijn. In zelforganisatie is echter een leider nodig die de richting bepaalt, die inspireert, die medewerkers meeneemt in zijn missie en die zorgt dat de randvoorwaarden voor zelforganisatie goed ingevuld zijn en bewaakt worden.

Zelforganisatie is geen doel op zich, wel een antwoord om wendbaar in te kunnen spelen op een steeds veranderende dynamische omgeving. Een hiërarchische structuur biedt de benodigde wendbaarheid niet. Zowel de interne omgeving (de nieuwe generatie kijkt anders tegen werken aan) als de externe omgeving (een snel veranderende wereld) vragen om wendbaarheid. Een aantal jaren geleden heb ik als directeur zelforganisatie ingevoerd in een organisatie met 500 medewerkers. Ik heb ervaren wat de invoering van zelforganisatie met medewerkers doet en wat het van leiderschap verwacht. Dit is vooral een persoonlijke ontwikkeling, ook ik ben mijzelf tegengekomen in dit proces. 

Als leider kun je niet blijven doen wat je deed. Maar wat maakt je nu een succesvolle leider? Er bestaat niet één ideale leiderschapsstijl, je dient als leider vooral te leren flexibel aan te sluiten op wat er nodig is.

Name: Ridge Haven
Description:
Nestled in the Blue Ridge Mountains of North Carolina, the scenic and spacious Ridge Haven Conference and Retreat Center is the ideal setting for camps, weekend retreats, family vacations, seminars, and more. From motel rooms, lodges, and apartments to a wide variety of recreational activities, Ridge Haven can fulfill your specific needs to get away from the daily stresses of life.

The General Assembly of the Presbyterian Church in America (PCA) established the Ridge Haven Conference and Retreat Center in 1978 as a year-round ministry outreach to individuals, families, churches, PCA and other ministry organizations. Whether you're on your own or in a group, we hope this can be your place for any reason or season. At Ridge Haven, you are surrounded by God's wondrous nature -- we are simply the caretakers. Spiritual rejuvenation is as important as physical relaxation, and our goal is to provide the means for you to have the opportunity for both.

No matter what season it is or the size of your group, we have a variety of comfortable and cozy accommodations from which you can choose. All of our motel facilities offer double occupancy rooms, private baths, linens, heat, and air conditioning. Many of the common areas have fireplaces. Our RV area has full hook-ups, electricity, water, and sewage services.

Name: iPrograms - Institute for Program Solutions, PC
Description:
The Institute for Program Solutions (IPS) specializes in providing innovative solutions on large construction and engineering programs. Our solutions include Electronic Construction Management Systems (eCMS), program scheduling in Primavera P/6 (+$500M), cost and claims analysis, and custom algorithms for predicting Work-in-Place (WIP Projection) on large construction programs.

IPS also provides Construction Management and Engineering Services throughout Europe, Africa, Middle East and Central Asia to the US DOD, VINCI-CONSTRUCTION, Jacobs Engineering Group, URS Corp., Bilfinger Berger, Select Energy, OpenPlan and other large corporations. Our Quantity Surveying team based Globally provides expert cost, building project procurement, contractual and project management advice at all stages of the construction process.

The services include; feasibility studies; project cost analysis; detailed estimates; cost planning; contract procurement strategies; project management; post contract services; work valuations; contract claims negotiation and settlement; project close-out, redline drawings, shop drawing preparation, advanced Construction Management etc.

IPS provides full time Program Managers, Project Engineers, Environmental Engineers, Supervisor Quality Assurance Representatives, Communications Engineers and Scheduling globally. IPS also provides A/E design services for Environmental, Energy and Building Conditions Assessment (BCA) reports.

Name: SGC Logistic Consulting  - Transport specialists
Description:
A very recurrent problem in transport and logistics companies is not having the desired profitability, phrases such as:

"It's that I haven't invoiced because operations don't pass me the documentation."
"It is that the driver  went home and did not deliver the consignment notes and expenses"
"It's that the operation can't stop so that it doesn't stop and then we do the math."

Situations such as:
•	Trip Sale price with erroneous.  
•	Diesel theft.
•	Incongruity of physical fuel performance vs truck computer.
•	Misuse of tolls expenses.
•	Miscalculated operator fees and payrolls.
•	Lack of padlocks on the delivery of cash to drivers for travel expenses.
•	Money leaks. 
•	Excessive spending of tires due to bad operation and / or theft on the road.
•	Excessive maintenance expense due to poor operation.
•	Theft of new or used parts in the workshop.
•	On price in external maintenance services.

We have found that these situations occur because the staff they normally control:

Name: PB+J Foods Inc.

PB+J Foods Inc. is a Laguna Niguel based non-profit organization whose vision is to create worldwide self-sustainable fortified peanut butter paste factories, ready-to-use therapeutic food (RUTF), while spreading the Gospel of Christ, and meeting the nutritional and economic needs in underdeveloped communities. The first program, The Nkhoma Hospital PB+J Program, started in Nkhoma, Malawi in August 2012. The Nkhoma Hospital PB+J Program has a manufacturing plant for RUTF, which is composed of peanuts, milk powder, brown sugar, palm oil and a micronutrient powder. The product is specifically designed to treat children under the age of five with severe acute malnutrition (SAM). With treatment of RUTF for 6-8 weeks, a child with SAM will gain an average of 2 kgs every 2 weeks and will regain strength to go on and lead a productive life. 

The Nkhoma Hospital PB+J Program reaches children suffering from SAM by distributing the RUTF to local health centers. This also provides an opportunity to provide nutrition education to equip individuals with the knowledge to prevent malnutrition, and preach the Gospel in the local region. In addition, the Nkhoma Hospital PB+J Program facilitates a peanut farmers co-op. The peanut is used as a cash crop to create economic growth, food stability and a steady supply of peanuts for the RUTF.

Name: Orlando Stefanin Epifanio ME
Description:
Meu nome é Orlando Stefanin Epifânio, também conhecido como Landoweb Programador. Sou Tecnólogo em Informática, trabalhando como Programador PHP no desenvolvimento de sites e sistemas voltados para Web.

Experiência Profissional
Trabalhei como servidor público municipal concursado durante 14 anos (1997-2011), atuando na FUMAS – Fundação Municipal de Ação Social, responsável pela implantação e supervisão técnica e jurídica da política habitacional do município de Jundiaí. Nesse período exerci o cargo de Digitador, me especializando em ferramentas como Microsoft Office (Excel Avançado, Word, Access, Power Point), Corel Draw, Folha de Pagamento e SIIM – Sistema Integrado Municipal, desenvolvido em ASP.

Tecnólogo Graduado
Sou formado pela Faculdade de Tecnologia de Jundiaí – FATEC, no curso de Tecnologia em Informática com Ênfase em Gestão de Negócios (2007 – 2009). Durante o curso tive o meu primeiro contato com Programação em PHP e me apaixonei pela linguagem, que inclusive acabou sendo utilizada em meu projeto de Graduação de Curso: um Sistema Gerenciador de Relatórios de Não-Conformidades, desenvolvido para uma empresa de fundição de alumínio da região, para obtenção do ISO 9001.
Após a conclusão do curso, continuei trabalhando na Prefeitura de Jundiaí durante o ano de 2010 e passei a realizar outros cursos e treinamentos, antes de tentar ingressar no mercado trabalhando em minha área de formação. Na ocasião, tive a ideia de lançar um site de palpites de futebol, chamado Bolão Paulista, aplicando técnicas de SEO que aprendi em um desses cursos. Mesmo sem nenhum apoio ou investimento em marketing, em pouco tempo o site chegou a 4 mil usuários, chamando a atenção de empresas e profissionais da região e isto acabou rendendo o convite para viver minha primeira experiência como Programador PHP.

Programador PHP Júnior
Em fevereiro de 2011 fui contratado para uma startup chamada Iboo, que pretendia ser uma rede social voltada para e-commerce.

opgaven in het fysieke domein of de dynamiek binnen een team: vooruitgang vraagt om balans.

Vanuit onze twee gespecialiseerde merken bieden wij de expertise die past bij uw specifieke vraagstuk: Ambor voor de inrichting en strategie, Animo voor de mens en het team.

Waarom Animo Groep?
Vaak worden ‘harde’ organisatievraagstukken en ‘zachte’ menskant gescheiden
aangepakt. Wij geloven juist in de kracht van de combinatie. De Animo Groep is de plek waar de expertise van Wouter (bedrijfskundige inrichting en het fysieke domein) en Jeanine (begeleidingskundige en teamdynamiek) samenkomt. Loopt een organisatie vast op structuur? Dan zorgt Ambor voor grip en een inrichting
die klopt. Blijkt dat de cultuur of onderlinge patronen de vooruitgang blokkeren? Dan maakt Animo de onderstroom zichtbaar en creëert beweging. Zo pakken we mens en structuur in samenhang aan. Zodat u niet alleen een goed plan heeft, maar ook een team dat er met plezier aan werkt.

Description:
A Novelnet TI atua no mercado de criação de sites e programação para web há mais de 6 anos, sempre buscando o aprimoramento da comunicação das empresas através da internet. Começamos nossos trabalhos desenvolvendo projetos em HTML puro para diversos clientes e ao longo do tempo passamos a trabalhar com as plataformas CMS (Content Management Systens ou Sistemas de Gerenciamento de Conteúdo), como o Joomla e WordPress, o que possibilita maior interação do cliente com seu site, visando o mercado de Search Marketing.

Em 2015 a Novelnet TI começou uma nova fase, oferecendo mais informações aos clientes e profissionais da área administrativa, de informática e marketing digital através de cursos que lançaremos ao longo do ano.

Excel 2016 Módulo I

Voltado para estudantes universitários, estagiários, profissionais da área administrativa e outros iniciantes no excel, este curso visa o entendimento de todos os elementos para edição de planilhas e o entendimento das sintaxes das funções básicas do excel.

Excel 2016 Módulo II

Curso voltado para profissionais com uma certa experiência que precisam aprimorar seus conhecimentos em funções do excel, aprimorar a seleção de dados e desenvolvimento de tabelas dinâmicas, facilitando assim a geração de relatórios personalizados.

Word 2016

Voltado para profissionais que utilizam editor de texto para o desenvolvimento de apostilas, este curso mostra formas mais fáceis para a inserção de imagens, criação de sumários e formatação de cabeçalhos e rodapés. Além disso, como integrar elementos de outros softwares como do excel.

Power Point

Neste curso o aluno aprenderá como desenvolver apresentações padronizadas, com elementos e tópicos pré-definidos para agilizar o processo de criação. Aprenderá também métodos de apresentação de vídeos e animações para suas apresentações.


Inovação, respeito e profissionalismo são valores importantes que a Novelnet TI quer manter entre seus clientes, colaboradores e parceiros.

Name: Denis Adari Foundation
Description:
This foundation was started in honor of the late Denis Adari, who passed away on the 19th of March 2011 and was a civil engineering student. 

Denis Adari Foundation was launched on the 5th April 2013 in partnership with the university of Nairobi, civil and construction engineering department. This partnership provides a platform for the foundation to reach students, while providing the university with an access to the industries. We are therefore working together to bridge the gap between universities and industries; as we shape and inspire the youth to excellence.

Often young people make choices that on the surface may appear attractive and adventurous but end in tragic consequences. we therefore urge the young, that before following any peer-driven options look back and consider whether it is in your long-term interest to focus on realizing your dreams as opposed to short-term gratification.

We therefore aim to positively transform the lives of youth by empowering them to acquire knowledge and skills through academic scholarships, internships and mentorship programs.

The Foundation is initially supported with seed money from family and is managed by a Board of Trustee who operate selflessly. We look forward to building more partnerships and writing proposals that call on all well-wishers for support sometime in the near future so that we can achieve the goals that we have set out. 

Finally, I thank you once again for visiting our page. I wish you a pleasant time, full of emotion and pride that through this Foundation, Adari’s swag continues to live on as we strive to inspire the youth to excellence.
May God Bless You All.

V prvním roce jsme pro naše klienty provedli cca 20 webů, naší doboru vizitkou je, že tyto weby dodnes sparvujeme ... 350+ webů za námi. a držíme se nových moderních trendů, kterými chceme přispívat našim klientům k jejich vyjímečnosti.

Name: Skogmo Industripark
Description:
Facts about the park:

Skogmo Industripark AS is a competence and development company, which is owned by companies at Skogmo in Overhalla municipality. Skogmo Industrial Park is one of the leading industrial and development environments in the north of Trøndelag.

The company was established in 2006 and currently consists of 53 companies representing more than 700 jobs.
In 2016, the companies had a total turnover of NOK 2.3 billion.

Our companies are mainly engaged in industrial production and transport, but also some in service and service production. Here you will find eg. companies in construction, element production in wood, concrete, steel, construction contractors, mechanical workshop, plumbing, international pharmacy company, companies in transport and logistics, car dealership, production of ready-mixed concrete, power plant, packing and distribution of vegetables, rehabilitation company and more services in service and trade.

We do the job together

We have several members who operate in the same market, and we see that as a strength. An important driving force for the success story that has been up here on Skogmo Industrial Park is "we are feeling" and that one enjoys each other and succeeds. When this is combined with experience and competence exchange, you have a winning recipe.
Together we work to create an Industrial Park that is attractive to our member companies and to employees. Both today and for the future. As a member of the park, you get access to expertise and purchase agreements. By offering our companies expertise in areas such as digitization, media, training, we can together raise the park and our members to a new level.

The heart and soul of DYC goes to serving the community in the form of drives & assistance in maintaining areas where it is greatly needed. 

DYC is a whole new safe social life for the youth. We are always meeting fascinating youth from diverse backgrounds and creating new bonds of friendship wherever we go. We, for the youth, by the youth, are junior Councillors’ inspired to go on doing our magnificent missions every time we are awarded with a smile of satisfaction on the face of a stranger. We would like your support, people of the East coast! We want action, people! In a country like South Africa it’s these little deeds from little people that make a world of a difference. So if you are one of them give us a call & we’ll hook you up to a global village.

Name: SMecoMP Interreg Balkan - Mediterranean Programme
Description: Small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in the Balkan Med area face strong challenges, especially in the areas of innovation, entrepreneurship and environmental protection and investment in innovative and/or "green" products or services is very small. Furthermore, the recent economic crisis increased unemployment and created the biggest brain drain in the region in modern times, depriving SMEs and Higher Education Institutes (HEI) from young, talented, and well educated personnel. The SMecoMP project addresses both challenges by developing a strong and resilient knowledge alliance among HEIs, vocational education training (VET) centers and SMEs, to promote eco-entrepreneurship, -management and –innovation, The overall objective is to promote eco-management and –innovation among existing SMEs and support young entrepreneurs in entering in the "green" and/or "blue" economy, creating new added value jobs, improving the area's competitiveness, ameliorating the brain drain phenomenon, contributing thus to the area's sustainable development.

Missie
#clubcaas gelooft in de rol van (nieuwe) media & ICT als versneller van de economie in Noord-Holland. Daarom inspireert, stimuleert en verbindt #clubcaas ambitieuze mensen die interesse hebben in (nieuwe) media & ICT. Dat doen wij via diverse events en actieve bemiddeling. #clubcaas draagt bij aan de realisatie van diverse economische programma's in Noord-Holland.

Visie
#clubcaas staat voor de groei van ambitieuze ondernemers binnen ICT en (nieuwe) media in Noord-Holland, waarvoor zij jaarlijks een programma uitvoert. #clubcaas is pas tevreden als de mensen binnen (nieuwe) media & ICT in Noord-Holland zowel zichtbaarder zijn als beter en meer zakendoen.

Doel
Door een samengesteld programma voor de bundeling en versterking van (nieuwe) media & ICT bevordert #clubcaas innovatie en ondernemerschap en vormt daarmee nieuwe bedrijvigheid. #clubcaas wil deze mensen:
• een gezicht geven
• met elkaar verbinden
• verbinden met bedrijven uit sterk aanwezige sectoren in de regio
• stimuleren te groeien door onderling kennis te delen
• stimuleren te groeien op het gebied van ondernemerschapskwaliteiten en kennis op het gebied van bedrijfsvoering voor zowel startups als scaleups

Voor wie?
#clubcaas is de community voor mensen werkzaam binnen de (nieuwe) media & ICT in Noord-Holland of iedereen die daar interesse in heeft

Door wie?
#clubcaas draait op vrijwilligers die er altijd iets voor terugkrijgen zoals een barterdeal of bescheiden onkostenvergoeding.

Name: ILRinc
Description:
Independent Living Resources, Inc. (ILR), specializes in producing, researching, and marketing products for educators, human service staffs, and anyone involved in youth development. Our primary areas of focus are adolescents, life skills (interdependent living), foster care and adoption services, group and residential care, at-risk youth, and workplace safety for human service staffs. Products include books, videos, training curricula, multimedia (CD, DVD), and Internet web-based materials.

In general, ILR tries to develop products that meet a need that has been determined from surveying groups of professional social workers, foster parents, youths, other caregivers, etc., who attend regularly scheduled seminars that ILR delivers across the US and in particular under contract with states and private child-caring agencies. In addition, materials have also been developed through the National Institutes of Health (NIH) Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) program and state contracted development efforts. ILR also strives to develop and market materials that are needed by a specific group, such as foster parents or youth advocates, which have been heretofore unavailable. We also review our products to see whether any have the potential to become part of a focused integrated package of materials that can be marketed to agencies and individuals for a specific purpose. Both start-up and existing programs find our materials to be valuable tools for both youths and staffs.

ILR is staffed by professionals with extensive experience in both adolescent independent living and personal workplace safety and strives to maintain this leadership.

We develop and select materials with your program needs in mind, and are pleased to present you with state-of-the-art products.

Our commitment is to bring you current, practical materials at very affordable prices.

They develop life skills and social and emotional intelligence at each stage of their journey. Older participants benefit from leadership and college preparatory programs as well as hands-on teaching experiences within the organization.

Every Lake Valley Camp program is based on the organization’s FOUR BELIEFS: 

1. We believe that Every Living Being Has Inherent Value, and that every young person deserves high quality enrichment activities.

2. We believe that Everyone has the Power to Change Their World, and that if given the same opportunities, all young people can succeed.

3. We believe that The Community is Better When Everyone Contributes and that our communities will thrive only when every young person is involved.

4. We believe that We Can Only Grow When We are Honest About Our Mistakes and that youth need to be surrounded by caring adults who will accept them.

Name: Philip Eliason and Associates
Description:
PEAA is a firm specialising in policy design, program design, stakeholder management, government affairs and training. It works for private sector companies, governments and NGOs.  Philip Eliason, Director of PEAA, has worked recently in Libya (2013-14) on conflict reduction, justice and police reform in Yemen, training for officials from the Gulf States and Australia and a range of policy design and representational activities in Australia.  Philip works in Arabic and French.
•	2013 prepared new policy proposals for Department of Industry for the consideration of government on small business development including cross portfolio program design to increase use of high speed broadband to improve business performance.
•	2012 created new evaluation framework for a small business advisory services program in Department of Industry. Designed and developed a Departmental natural disaster focal point and field staff information collection system. 2011 policy audit and gap analysis on disaster preparedness programs for the Federal Department of Innovation. Designed policy and related training sessions and strategic planning workshops for Australian officials 2006 to 2012. As a consultant, trained, in Arabic, UAE Ministry of Interior staff (police, corporate) in risk and crisis leadership. Reviewed stakeholder perceptions and developed a stakeholder management strategy for a major tertiary education provider. Facilitated development of a religious charitable foundation in Yemen.  
•	2010 Evaluated a Save the Children program in Yemen. Designed new policy on homelessness for ACT Shelter. Designed program evaluation framework for Government to counter violent extremism. 
•	2009 Country leader and Programme Co-ordinator of the Yemen Justice and Policing Programme.
•	2008 Managed a multilateral Arab R&D delegation’s visit to Australia.

Name: Sustainable Commodity Assistance Network - SCAN
Description: The Sustainable Commodity Assistance Network (SCAN) is a capacity building program aimed at providing customized, needs-based technical assistance to producers wishing to adopt sustainable practices and enter sustainable markets. SCAN is facilitated by the Sustainable Commodity Initiative (SCI), in partnership with 18 key global standards bodies, technical assistance institutions, and other key stakeholders. By partnering with key local institutions, SCAN’s work is integrated into national curriculum and extension activities, greatly enhancing its reach, impact and sustainability. SCAN uses the Committee on Sustainability Assessment (COSA), for independent, internationally recognized impact assessment, and ITC’s database, SustainabilityXchange to store and make SCAN’s training material globally accessible.

Name: LOUD Wisconsin
Description:
Latinos Organizing for Understanding and Development (LOUD) is a new Madison-based statewide initiative focused on promoting collaboration between Latino arts and service organizations, artists, and the communities in which they operate. 

Besides organizing conversations and outreach, LOUD has been devoted to memorializing the moment and the movement captured by the murals installed in downtown Madison during the summer of 2020. 

In order to expand the reach, the duration, and the impact of these conversations memorialized in the murals, this initiative has also included a website to host images, lesson plans, and study guides.

Organisaties die zich richten op het krijgen van MEER BLIJE KLANTEN hebben de toekomst.  

Daar geloven wij in. Want dit zijn organisaties die snappen dat blije klanten DE sleutel zijn tot succes!

Die snappen ook dat meer blije klanten niet alleen fijner zijn om voor- en mee te werken, maar ook heel goed door hebben dat dit ten goede komt aan de omzet EN het boeien en behouden van het belangrijkste 'kapitaal' van de organisatie: haar medewerkers!

Maar hoe is dit nu bij jouw organisatie? Hebben jouw medewerkers deze overtuiging ook? En hoe krijg je je medewerkers in beweging zodat zij zich klantgerichter gaan gedragen? Wie zijn eigenlijk jullie blije klanten? Hoe mobiliseer je deze blije klanten om jouw organisatie te promoten? Hoe zorg je voor meer blije klanten?

Wat is jouw rol hierin als ondernemer en/ of manager? 

Samen met een team van bevlogen trainers, coaches en adviseurs helpen wij, voornamelijk, dienstverlenende organisaties bij het creëren en faciliteren van meer blije klanten. 

Met 1 doel en focus: jouw organisatie succesvoller maken.

Ben jij manager of ondernemer EN sta je te popelen om je mensen, nog meer, in beweging te krijgen om zich klantgerichter te gaan gedragen? Bel mij dan op 06-51837131 of stuur een bericht naar welkom@meerblijeklanten.nl

Wil je alvast 10 TIPS lezen die je gaan helpen bij het VERGROTEN VAN HET KLANTGERICHTE GEDRAG van je medewerkers? Download dan via deze link het e-boek: https://www.meerblijeklanten.nl/10-tips-voor-managers-en-ondernemers/

Name: TEDxFeira
Description:
TEDxFeira é um evento organizado, em Santa Maria da Feira, por uma equipa de pessoas que acredita que é possível ir mais longe… que acredita que é possível inspirar outras pessoas para darem novos passos e (des)construírem complexos instalados e dificuldades que não passam de barreiras virtuais.

Assim, Santa Maria da Feira entrou em 2013 na rota TEDx, com um evento que pretende ser uma enorme plataforma de divulgação de ideias, projetos e experiências que nos levaram a ultrapassar obstáculos, sonhar alto e acreditar que conseguimos conquistar os nossos objetivos. Tudo isto foi impulsionado por vários momentos de networking ao longo do dia, potenciando novas oportunidades para todos os presentes.

O TEDxFeira 2013 aconteceu a 21 de Setembro, no Auditório da Biblioteca Municipal, sob o mote da Criatividade Urbana. Assim, construímos um programa alinhado em 4 sessões que nos permitiram cumprir uma viagem pelos pilares das Cidades Criativas e terminar a voar bem alto.

Name: Tillit
Description:
Tillit is a social innovation enterprise addressing health inequities by fostering frugal (place, process, price, partnership and product) innovation to mitigate barriers to access to affordable quality healthcare and allied social services for underserved communities.

Physical, social, economic, financial and cultural barriers hinder access to quality healthcare and social services for many communities in Africa which is reflected in low life expectancies and high infant, childhood and maternal mortality rates and morbidities which are some of the highest in the world. These underserved communities have poor health indices because they do not have access to affordable quality healthcare and allied social services such as basic education, energy, clean water, hygiene and sanitation.

We inspire trust in health systems and social services by fostering transparency and performance of private and public health and allied social services providers through our advisory, project management, impact investments, third party administration and ecosystem development services and initiatives.

Name: Fundación Bella Flor
Description:
FUNDACIÓN BELLA FLOR

Quienes somos

En 2002 varios estudiantes en práctica conocieron a un grupo de niños del barrio Bella Flor de las lomas de Ciudad Bolívar y su corazón quedó agarrado al de ellos, y al encontrarse con esta nueva realidad, decidieron en mayo de 2003 fundar la Fundación Bella Flor.

Ahora somos un grupo de voluntarios que continuamos creyendo en el potencial de los niños, y llevamos diez (10) años trabajando en Ciudad Bolívar por 160 niños, niñas y adolescentes de los barrios Paraíso, Mirador, Bella Flor y la vereda Quiba.

Nuestro objetivo es que éstos niños, niñas y adolescentes, entre los 7 y 17 años exploren, conozcan y desarrollen su Elemento (talento + pasión + vocación + motor de vida) y sean capaces de ponerse metas y sepan cómo alcanzarlas. Hemos visto cómo sus creencias sobre la vida que deben llevar, afecta sus aspiraciones y por ende sus realidades.

A través de la exploración del elemento, queremos darle la oportunidad a cada niño de que descubra cuál es el propósito de su vida y trabaje disciplinadamente para lograrlo y así alcanzar el éxito (entendido como la plena realización en todos los planos de la vida). Por eso queremos que la Fundación Bella Flor sea una fábrica de éxitos.

Name: Capitala Tineretului din România
Description:
Capitala Tineretului din România, care funcționează pe principii similare cu Capitala Europeană a Tineretului (European Youth Capital  - www.europeanyouthcapital.org), este cel mai ambițios program național destinat tinerilor, pentru că pune accent pe dezvoltarea ecosistemelor de tineret din zonele românești, în general, și pe dezvoltarea ecosistemelor de tineret urbane, în mod special. În cadrul programului, autoritățile locale colaborează cu organizațiile neguvernamentale de și pentru tineret și cu mediul privat, și îi pun pe tineri în centrul procesului de dezvoltare urbană. 

Programul Capitala Tineretului din România a fost lansat în anul 2016.  Primul oraș din România care poartă titlul de Capitala Tineretului din România este Timișoara, care și-a asumat pionieratul programului în perioada 2 mai 2016 - 1 mai 2017. Mai mult, ediția din 2017 a programului se desfășoară sub Înaltul Patronaj al Președintelui României, Klaus Iohannis.

Bacău este în prezent Capitala Tineretului din România, fiind desemnat printr-o competiție deschisă pentru a purta titlul în perioada 2 mai 2017 - 1 mai 20-18. De asemenea, Baia-Mare a fost nominalizat pentru a purta titlul în perioada 2 mai 2018 - 1 mai 2019.

Pentru punerea în aplicare al programului inițiatorii au creat Guvernanța  Programului Capitala Tineretului din România. Rolul acestei comisii este de a asigura managementului acestui titlu la nivelul României.

Partenerii implicați în Guvernanță sunt:
* Consiliul Tineretului din România, entitate reprezentativă a tineretului din România,
* Federația Tinerilor din Cluj, entitate creată în contextul programului Cluj-Napoca 2015, Capitala Europeană a Tineretului,
* Grupul PONT, grup de experți de tineret, inițiatorul măsurilor de pregătire a Capitalei Tineretului din România pe baza experienței candidaturii municipiului Cluj-Napoca pentru Capitala Europeană a Tineretului 2015,
* Banca Comercială Română, lider al sistemului bancar românesc.

Mede dankzij onze ervaring in grote systemen die gebruikt worden op en rondom de universiteit, zijn we ervan overtuigd dat we iedereen kunnen voorzien met goed passende systemen.

We merken dat er een grote wens is om standaardapplicaties in te kopen: echter is onze ervaring hiermee dat het aanpassen van dergelijke applicaties voor de benodigde toepassing vaak tijdrovend is en uiteindelijk ervoor zorgt dat de oorspronkelijke doelen van het inkoopproject niet meer gehaald worden. Daarom zijn wij van mening dat applicaties speciaal ontwikkeld voor de bedoelde toepassing veel flexibeler zijn en beter aansluiten op de wensen. Juist doordat de applicaties speciaal ontwikkeld zijn, zullen ze lichter en duidelijker in dagelijks gebruik zijn: een van de succesverhalen is het systeem wat al jaren gebruikt wordt door de Kick-In!
