De school staat op een historische plaats dichtbij het oude Deventer, omgeven door een schitterende tuin, onder hoge bomen. Rust en stilte zijn hier de trefwoorden, waardoor elke bijeenkomst ongestoord verloopt. Een plaats om tot jezelf te komen, weg te zijn van de drukte van stad en dagelijks leven.

Vergaderarrangementen worden altijd in persoonlijk overleg samengesteld en kunnen uiteraard een goed verzorgde lunch bevatten. Dineren en overnachten is in de school niet mogelijk, maar dichtbij de school zijn twee goede restaurants aanwezig.

In de school wordt gewoond en gewerkt door Nachtzon Media, heilige huisjes en Maria van Mierlo Communicatie. Tuinen, catering tijdens voorstellingen en ontvangst worden mede verzorgd door een grote groep van vrijwilligers. De School van Frieswijk is een semi-openbare plek, bekend in wijde omgeving en met deze vrijwilligers kunnen we ervoor zorgen dat dat zo blijft.

Vanaf afrit 24 van de A1 is een minuut of tien rijden tot aan onze voordeur. Net genoeg om die hele snelweg niet meer te horen en een dag helemaal wég te zijn.

Name: Smart Consumers Community
Description:
«Խելացի Սպառողների Համայնք» 
Մեր երկրի կայուն հիմքն ու հուսալի ապագան հայ հասարակության շարժիչ ուժի՝ մեր երիտասարդների ձեռքերում է: Գիտակցելով երիտասարդ ներուժի կարևորությունն ու անգնահատելի դերակատարումը մեր երկրի զարգացման գործընթացում՝ «Խելացի Սպառողներ» ՍՊԸ-ն հետամուտ է եղել սպառողների՝ նախադեպը չունեցող բիզնես համայնքի ձևավորմանն ու ստեղծմանը:

Խելացի, կրթված և նպատակասլաց երիտասարդներն են մեր վաղվա՝ զարգացած և ուժեղ Հայաստանի խոսուն գրավականը: Սատարելով մեր երիտասարդներին՝ մենք հիմք դրեցինք մի կարևոր նախագծի, որի համաձայն յուրաքանչյուր երիտասարդ կարող է դեռ վաղ տարիքից ունենալ և զարգացնել սեփական բիզնեսը:

Սեփական բիզնեսի հիմնումն այլևս երազանք չէ, երբ ճիշտ համայնքի անդամ ես: Ֆինանսական գրագիրտությունը սկսվում է դեռ վաղ տարիքից: Իրազեկ է քաղաքացին, քիչ են ֆինանսական խնդիրները: Մեր երիտասրդները դեռ պատանի շրջանում պետք է սերտեն ֆինանսներին առնչվող բոլոր կարևոր դրույթները:

Ընկերության տեսլականն է՝ ձևավորել ֆինանսական գրագիտությամբ և սեփական գործը հիմնելու պատրաստակամությամբ զինված սպառողների համայնք, որի որոշումները կարևոր և որոշիչ կլինեն հասարակության մեջ, առավել ևս բարեկեցիկ երկիր կերտելու գործընթացում: Ինչպես նաև աշխատելով և զարգացնելով սեփական բիզնեսը՝ մեր երիտասարդները կստեղծեն նոր աշխատատեղեր մյուսների համար:

Համայնքը՝ երիտասարդ գործարարի անդադար աճի, ուսուցման և ինքնակատարելագործման շարունակական ու երկար ճանապարհ է:
«Խելացի սպառողներ»-ի բիզնես համայնքը ներգրավելու է առաջադեմ և ճկուն մտածողություն ունեցող բոլոր այն՝ 18-ից 30 տարեկան երիտասարդներին, որոնք նպատակադրված են սեփական բիզնեսը հիմնելուն և զարգացնելուն:
Այլևս եկել է սեփական բիզնեսի համար աշխատելու և գործելու ժամանակը:

Միացի՛ր և ստեղծի՛ր ՔՈՆԸ:
Սկսե՛նք լավ ապրել ազգովի…

Name: OptNow
Description:
OptNow LLC is proud to make available an innovative and dynamic lead generation and retention product proven to be an industry game-changer  . . . .  regardless of the industry.

OptNow’s proprietary “Opt System” is a simple but powerful[1] technology which allows businesses that rely on lead-generation and/or repeat transactions to provide compensation or other goods and services up front for a future Option.

OptNow can provide any business with this protected and proprietary Opt System technology, whereby a business and/or its employees can increase their Lead Generation, transaction volume and repeat business, while improving customer relationships, loyalty, and communications.

An example of how the OptNow System works is in Real Estate Brokerage, where we compare the Opt System with LendingTree (LT). LT provides a value proposition to consumers in exchange for using a particular real estate agent, after the transaction is completed. LT then receives a commission from the Agent or their Firm.  Alternatively, OptNow gives an Agent, Firm, or even a Non-Value Added Lead Generator like LendingTree the ability to provide the consumer something of value before the transaction is even considered.

In addition, the OptNow System can be licensed by trade organizations that can promote its use as a member benefit which will generate additional revenue for the organization and its members.  This is a valuable tool for attracting and maintaining membership.

Licensed OptNow partners can be supported by the OptNow System’s backroom software and operations, the result of years of technological and capital investment.

Businesses that have used the Opt System increased productivity resulting in up to a three-fold improvement in repeat business, creating more satisfied and loyal customers, while delivering a mechanism for them to track and predict future business.

Description: The vision of FaY is to promote FIRST involvement in the Yale community, while also providing our members with professional opportunities. Name: ThamesRiverInnovationPlace
Description:
Thames River Innovation Place (TRIP) is an unprecedented alliance of public, private, and nonprofit sectors in the communities of New London and Groton in Southeastern Connecticut. The focus of TRIP is collaboration among the community to design a blueprint for the future of the Thames River Communities. This approach integrates education, policy, entrepreneurialism, investment and fosters a pride in community and identity. Supported by CTNext, TRIP places a focus on innovation through collaboration rather than focus on individual innovations. 

TRIP currently consists of five different programs.

Ignite: Sparks ideas, businesses, and innovative growth in the Thames River region by producing events, sponsoring education, and connecting entrepreneurs with a business development support system.

Cultivator Kitchen: This program gives restauranteurs the support, infrastructure, and education that will bring business plans and ideas to the next level, allowing restauranteurs the ability to take their ideas and test them in a real setting.

Community Concierge: is eastern Connecticut’s 21st-century ‘Welcome Wagon.’ It is a comprehensive tool for new arrivals to become acquainted with living, working, and playing in New London, Groton, and beyond.

Placemaking Redevelopment: By strengthening the connection between our two communities—Groton and New London—and taking steps to dramatically redevelop key neighborhoods, we can create a stronger, more stable sense of place and connectivity.

Connecticut Naval Undersea Supply Chain Consortium: Works to build a network of companies that collectively address challenges, shares solutions, collaborates on opportunities and capitalizes on the growing national undersea business base.

Name: Pacific Advanced Components
Description:
PAC started as a manufacturer's rep organization in 2006.  Our Goal was to provide our customer base of about 2,500 technical OEM companies with the specific components they required for their products.  Our main product for several years was technical ceramic components and value added processes for those components such as metallization and ceramic to metal assemblies.  Since then PAC has evolved into a more complete solutions provider.

We currently provide access to many suppliers of critical technologies that allow our customers to develop products that are as cost effective as possible by integrating their designs with technologies that simplify manufacturing processes and fulfilling their requirements for development and production.

Recently we have begun providing additive manufacturing (3D printing) capabilities for metals, ceramics and plastics.  This allows our customers to achieve proof of concept and prototype components without the high cost of tooling and can be achieved in a fraction of the time it takes to get prototypes from conventional manufacturing.

We would like to wholeheartedly say THANK YOU to our current customers for allowing us to earn your confidence.

Deze onderwerpen worden door ons gekoppeld aan gedragskenmerken. Hierbij maken we gebruik van het #BASE model. Base staat voor Begeleiden, Adviseren, Stimuleren & Entertainen. Dit zijn de vier speerpunten die we toepassen om onze doelstellingen te realiseren.

De doelstellingen variëren per opdracht en opdrachtgever. Zo zijn er meerdere mogelijkheden om onze expertise toe te passen om diverse doelstellingen te bereiken.

Name: Crockett Economic and Industrial Development Corporation
Description:
In 1995, the voters of Crockett approved a one-half percent sales tax earmarked to promote economic growth in the area. CEIDC was created to administer and oversee the expenditure of those funds. The funds are used to offer attractive incentive packages to qualified businesses interested in locating or expanding an operation in Houston County.

Working with Federal, State, and local agencies has allowed Houston County to take an aggressive approach in creating a competitive business environment, resulting in average operating costs lower than other markets. Business development receives full support from the Crockett Economic and Industrial Development Corporation, which strives to collaborate with the Grapeland EDC, Crockett Area Chamber of Commerce, and the Grapeland Chamber of Commerce.

CEIDC is a 4A Sales Tax Coproration. As such, the activities of CEIDC are governed by Texas State Law as it pertains to such corporations. The Office of the Attorney General produces a handbook - Economic Development Handbook for Texas Cities (2008) - which provides detailed information on how 4A corporations are established and operate.

For Individuals

For Businesses

Training 
Mentor programs
Succession Planning
Operations all areas

As a Special Needs Life Coach I will work with your family. We will create a family plan that decides what role I will play in the coaching partnership. A Special Needs Life Coach is dedicated to improving quality of life for the person with special needs, behavioral issues and developmental disabilities and their families.
    
It is important to know that like in any type of coaching a Special Needs Life Coach is not a therapist or a counselor.  I will help with a broad variety of specific goals.
    
Seeking Out Funding From Various Programs
Time Management
Self-Care for Parents
Stress Management
Sibling support
Doctor Management
Advocacy
Estate Planning
    
Having a child with special needs is never going to be easy. However, having a coach can help make some of your hours, days, weeks, or years much easier.

Name: P3 for Humanity
Description:
P3 for Humanity is a woman-owned startup providing advisory and consulting services from a network of seasoned multi-disciplinary practitioners, to organizations working in the areas of humanitarian response, recovery, sustainability, and development, who want to expand and increase the impact of their programming. With decades of experience, P3 for Humanity is uniquely qualified to offer program design through a co-creation framework as well as independent third-party monitoring, evaluation, learning, and oversight of multi-sectoral programs. We analyze data to measure performance, demonstrate impact, and help you successfully achieve your objectives.  

P3 for Humanity works with domestic, international, rural, and urban purpose-driven programming. Our experienced humanitarian and development experts can provide in-depth guidance on emergency response and recovery operations, needs assessments and assistance, as well as preparedness and planning for your organization and programs.  As the fog of COVID-19 begins to lift around the world, P3 for Humanity is strategically positioned to conduct real-time assessments to evaluate the state of your programs to better determine gains, losses, lessons learned, immediate assistance required, and next steps.  

We understand the importance of accountability to achieving results and telling the story of impactful programming based on rigorous and verifiable data. We have led global humanitarian emergency response and development operations, and programs for governments, nonprofits, corporations, and International Organizations worth billions of dollars. We understand what it means to be both a donor as well as a recipient of funds. P3 for Humanity provides expert technical advice to the private sector, intermediary organizations, nonprofits, foundations, governments, and private individuals to help them better vet, design, monitor, evaluate and ensure impact-driven programmatic outcomes.

Entendemos que cada solução é única e requer uma abordagem com foco nos objetivos do seu negócio, sempre aliamos robustez, qualidade e iteratividade em nossos projetos, seguindo metodologias ágeis e engajadas, desde o brainstorming / briefing até a entrega do seu projeto. Todo o nosso time é envolvido, e claro, junto ao cliente, sempre acompanhamos cada etapa do processo de desenvolvimento, validando o projeto, até sua entrega.

Especializada no desenvolvimento de sistemas e soluções de hospedagem para empresas que buscam criar e desenvolver seus projetos sem complicações e com investimento pequeno.

Prestando serviços na terceirização de mão de obra no desenvolvimento de sistemas web, desktop, aplicativos mobile, hospedagem de aplicações (compartilhada, semi-dedicada, dedicada) e na integração de aplicações tudo sob medida, utilizando as melhores tecnologias.

Desenvolvemos também soluções customizadas para atender a necessidade da sua Startup, com isso você obtém seu MVP (Minimum Viable Product), fazendo uso do mesmo em seus pitch’s.

Fuckup Nights is a global movement where stories of failed businesses and projects are told, questioned and celebrated. 
The first Fuckup Night happened in Mexico City in September 2012, but from early 2017 people in Banja Luka gather once every three months to listen to stories about failure. Proud to say that Banja Luka is among the first ones to bring the event to the Balkans. 
It’s essential that we spread the mindset, especially in ex-communist countries where people kept one job their whole life. Statistics show that in the US entrepreneurs fail 4-7 times before succeeding. So far the event has gathered more than 500 attendees and 17 speakers, the next one is scheduled for October 27th.

Name: Haverford Athletes of Color Coalition
Description: We are Black and Brown student-athletes calling for institutional change within Haverford College’s athletic community. AOCC's formation also provides an empowering source of emotional, social, and athletic support for BIPOC student-athletes at Haverford. The coalition seeks to confront the destructive, problematic, and violent norms and practices of the Athletic and Admissions departments with the goal of designing a more inclusive and equitable environment for Haverford College’s Black and Brown "Black Squirrels". However, this system cannot be pigmented. We are calling for the abolition of the athletic-industrial-complex, which glorifies a hierarchy of wealth, blatant elitism, and an intentionally-crafted social ladder rooted within sports teams at elite PWIs similar to Haverford College, all rooted in capitalism. Haverford Athletics serves the cooperation, not the non-profit, that Haverford College truly is.

Name: Tolfree Biofest
Description:

It further demonstrates how we are interdependent on nature to strengthen and support us in our health and well-being.
 
Nature is something to certainly be appreciated and admired. To some it is a form of meditation and healing, to others it is a tool. But to us, it is a process of learning, a process of problem solving. We are looking to nature, learning from nature and being inspired by nature.

For the last 2 years, Tolfree Foundation has organized this hands on educational experience and invited 7th graders from the surrounding school districts, as well as the general public to attend. Over 750 individuals have shared this awesome experience. We have done this through the contributions of those who understand its importance in securing today and tomorrow's health and wellness.

STEP UP is listed as an effective, evidence-based program in SAMHSA’s National Registry for Evidence-Based Programs & Practices (NREBPP) and in the Collaborative for Academic, Social & Emotional Learning (CASEL) and is shown to promote self-regulation, social competence, empathy, and responsibility, essential protective factors in the prevention of suicide.

The SEL for Prevention programs were created by Pamela Goldberg, LMFT, in consultation with experts in the fields of education, mental health, and prevention science. The SEL for Prevention 8-Step programs are brought to life by artists, singers, writers and illustrators. Goldberg has spent over two decades developing and testing the materials used in the programs.

Mission:
To promote strong mental health in communities by equipping all children with essential knowledge, resources, and tools to safely and effectively manage social, emotional, and academic stressors so they may thrive.

Vision:
To partner with school districts, mental health centers, and community organizations, providing them with the highest quality curricula, materials, and support at the lowest possible cost through the distribution, dissemination, and further development of the SEL for Prevention programs.

SEL for Prevention is the DBA for CMB Kids, LLC.

ENVIRONMENT

ANIMAL HEALTH

The Help the Animals Program (Ayuda a los Animales) responds to the challenge of Mexico's large population of unwanted and unhealthy pet animals.
 
ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT

Name: Research & Evaluation Services (RES)
Description:
Research & Evaluation Services Ltd (RES) consultancy based in London and Nairobi specialising in supporting humanitarian and resilience programming actors. RES places emphasis on capacity building and producing visual and impactful information products to inform decision makers and programme strategy.

RES specialises in the following areas:
- Impact evaluation utilising statisical and qualitative methods, ensuring the engagement of project teams and other stakeholders in the process. 
- Evidence synthesis of secondary data (eg. project evaluation reports) and statistical meta-analysis.
- Designing and implementing needs assessments, surveys or thematic assessments, including design of data collection tools and sampling frames, data analysis and reporting.
- GIS skills and producing maps of findings to enable visual and impactful reports. 
- Development of programme MEAL frameworks and proposals.
- Capacity building in any of these areas with project teams or partners.


Consultancies 2015 - 2017:

- Humanitarian Leadership Academy (in partnership with Groundswell Global Research): evaluation of business continuity planning programme in the Philippines.
- Humanitarian Leadership Academy (in partnership with Groundswell): baseline study of the humanitarian capacity building landscape amongst a range of stakeholders, Middle-East.
- World Relief: evaluation ‘Community & Household Resilience in Rural Somaliland’.
- Oxfam: analysis of impact survey data following the Nepal earthquake response.
- Oxfam: analysis of global humanitarian response quality utilising the Core Humanitarian Standard (reporting to UK DFID).
- Save the Children UK: impact analysis of humanitarian and resilience programmes, including appraising the quality of evaluation methodologies.


If you would like to discuss a research project, desk study, assessment, survey or evaluation please contact Research & Evaluation Services through LinkedIn or through the contact page on www.research-evaluation-services.org

Name: High Desert International Foundation
Description:
HDI Foundation is a non-profit organization dedicated to providing underprivileged children access to education. Many of these children come from poor families and most grow up following in their parents' footsteps – fishing, farming, scavenging in rubbish dumps, etc.

They have unrealized potential and education is crucial in helping them to excel in life and finally to break out of the vicious cycle of poverty that has plagued their families for generations.

Our Aim: To break the cycle of poverty by educating children and developing community independence.

Education is a great equalizer! Almost 13 million school aged children in Indonesia do not go to school (Source: Central Bureau of Statistics, 2006). The number of children lacking an adequate education in Indonesia will continue to increase despite the Government’s efforts to rectify the situation. It is our wish to help raising the standard of education and develop the children of today into valuable assets to society through our three main programs: Build a School, Sponsor a Child, and Train Teachers.

HDI Foundation is managed with complete transparency. In line with regulations set by the Board of Governors, more than 90% of the donations are for the direct benefit of the children. Our work is currently in Indonesia. However, with increased support and funding, we will be able to reach out to more children in other developing countries.

Name: Moms as Mentors
Description:
Moms as Mentors is a non-profit organization that provides mothers the tools, time, and space they need to be mentors in their daughters’ daily lives, ultimately helping their girls to grow into confident and influential women. Our hallmark mother-daughter programs offer invaluable mom and daughter bonding time, fun, interactive games/challenges that promote teamwork and communication and tips for moms on topics like how to be confident role models. Moms as Mentors first launched in 2007 with a focus on health, wellness, self-esteem, and leadership for mothers and daughters. In 2014 we relaunched as the non-profit, "The Moms as Mentors Project" and began building programming that centers around fields where women continue to remain underrepresented, especially in key positions of leadership, such as STEM (science, technology, engineering and math) and business. 

All of our programs are designed to be accessible and approachable, regardless of a mom's educational/professional experience. The main theme is always to be together and have fun! 93% of moms and 95% of girls leave our programs feeling closer to one another (even if they already were close).

Our "Build Bridges!" mom-daughter program features enjoyable, hands-on activities emphasizing the STEM fields and provides moms practical tips on how to nurture their daughters' STEM confidence. 92% of participating moms say our programs give them tools for being a “STEM” mentor for their daughter and 100% of the girls say the program makes science and engineering fun.

Our "Make It Count!" program incorporates meaningful mother-daughter activities focused on fostering financial empowerment and an entrepreneurial spirit. The program touches on age-appropriate topics like needs vs. wants, money values, and envisioning oneself as an entrepreneur. 97% of participating moms say program lay the foundation for familial conversations about money and 100% of girls say the program made money and business fun.

Name: Peace + Freedom
Description:
Peace + Freedom is an organization dedicated to saving lives and creating
prosperity in a post-carbon economy by helping individuals living in remote
areas. Millions of entrepreneurs live in remote areas where they lack reliable
access to internet, transport, electricity and financing. By removing these
barriers, we aim to help entrepreneurs uncover solutions to create greater
social, economic and environmental development.

Through a focus on the aspect of peace, we aid individuals in diagnosing
threats (i.e. natural disasters, pandemics, ecosystem collapses, armed
conflict, extinction, etc.) and remedying these threats through strategic
collaboration. Through an emphasis on freedom, we equip entrepreneurs
with the necessary technological tools and connect these individuals to the
global community to discover diverse perspectives, develop ideas and find
opportunities to access capital.

The Peace + Freedom Challenge - 
The Peace + Freedom Challenge is an annual event starting in November 2022 that selects globally diverse innovators to band together, form teams and compete to find the best ways to combat conflict in remote areas using their own design of electrical air transport.

Name: World Arts Access
Description:
World Arts Access is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization founded in 2010 and headquartered in Seattle, WA, with additional offices in London and Sana’a, Yemen. Our staff have been working since the mid-1980s helping youth in ambitious social change efforts, including sexual abuse prevention in South Korea and Panama, theater projects in Colombia, Ecuador, Honduras, Guatemala, Costa Rica, Bolivia, Venezuela, Nicaragua and Pakistan, and radio dramas in Pakistan and Yemen.

World Arts Access’ mission is to engage youth in the arts to create lasting social transformation.

Our work focuses on the 1.2 billion young people ages 15-24 on the planet who constitute the largest global cohort in history. Many of these young people are not engaged in employment, education or training, and are therefore lacking meaning and purpose in their lives, as well as being more susceptible to depression, anxiety, hopelessness, cynicism, and delinquency. World Arts Access uses the arts as a proven method to increase youth self-esteem, creativity, leadership skills, empathy, and activism. Our projects empower youth to be agents of social change and peace in their communities.

Name: Great Lakes Business Leadership Network
Description:
The Great Lakes Business Leadership Network (BLN) is a business-led collaborative seeking to increase business success through increased diversity, including full inclusion of people with disabilities as customers, employees, suppliers and community members.

Organizations can participate in Great Lakes BLN as member businesses or partners.

Great Lakes BLN Members are businesses that share a commitment to collaboration and to the sharing of best practices to fully tap into the talent of people with disabilities in our region.

Great Lakes BLN Partners are non-profit, human service organizations and businesses whose primary missions are focused on increasing inclusion of people with disabilities in all aspects of life.  This is a broad group of organizations providing a wide range of services to increase the quality of life for those they serve.  Great Lakes BLN Partners meet to develop a collaborative approach to more effectively respond to the emerging opportunities realized from the business-led Great Lakes BLN.

We currently have arrangements in 17 enterprises in such areas as agriculture, fish farming, tourism, logistics, air time, mobile banking and micro lending and hope to develop further businesses in model farming, healthcare, education,  renewable energy, manufacturing, value added projects and water supply. For the first time ever, Pathmapp delivers a solution for viewing traditional HeatMapps and Pathmapps (visual interpretations of how users are flowing through an app) along with time analytics and visual crash reporting.

By bringing traditional analytics to the mobile platform, developers, entrepreneurs and enterprises gain similar benefits in an entirely different context. Pathmapp increases this value by revolutionizing old techniques to conform to a new and expanding technology. With over 5 billion mobile phone subscribers using over a million different applications, utilizing a technology like Pathmapp is a necessity in order to understand the user.

Name: EventApe S.E.T Protocol
Description:
The goal of this project is to bring to the forefront the notion of interoperability for BlockChain system, focused on the ticketing industry. The project aims to create an open ticketing ecosystem where all parties in the ticketing supply chain will be able to regulate the secondary ticket sales market, by disallowing scalpers and opportunists to take advantage of the current – opaque system. 

Our ambition is to develop a design philosophy of a blueprint model for interoperable BlockChain system that can be applied to various industries.

The main objectives of the project:

•	Create a transparent and secure environment for ticket sales and resales.
•	Make event stakeholders generate higher revenues, get lost profits from 
        ticket resales, set complex ticket rules, and connect with their fans more 
        efficiently.
•	Provide a marketplace for each event organizer.
•	Allow fans to have equal chances of buying fair priced tickets
•	Ban fake, void and duplicate tickets from the market.
•	Ban all the scalpers and opportunists from the ticket sales procedure 
•	Reduce checkout friction using the digital wallet.
•	Allow people to anonymously resell their tickets in case they cannot attend 
        the event

The main output of the project: 

Design and develop an Ecosystem for interoperable BlockChain, using the design philosophy of the Internet Architecture as the basis for identifying key design principles. All challenges faced in the design of interoperable BlockChain architecture will be identified and approached efficiently.

The project consortium is composed of 2 partners from Cyprus, Eurosuccess Consulting and SmartApe Solutions Ltd.

Duration: 01/04/2019 – 31/03/2021

Name: Community Supervision Solutions
Description:
Community Supervision Solutions (CSS) is a world class consultancy focused on transforming community-based corrections, their operations and outcomes. CSS clients benefit from our expertise, through best practices implementation and the development and delivery of programs and services based on years of real-world experience.

Julie Truschel, Founder and President, established CSS in 2017 to create positive change within the field of community supervision. By applying a proven methodology, the CSS approach concisely delivers more than 35 years of experience in a plan meant to transform organizations and lives.

CSS employs a proven methodology to positively impact the operational processes, efficiencies and outcomes of community supervision entities.  We work alongside our partners and deliver a unique approach to change management specifically designed for the community correction industry.  To accomplish this, we:
•	Perform operational reviews against effective practice protocols.
•	Develop alignment and implementation plans based on our findings.
•	Deliver our customized CSS Evidence Based Practice Plan (EBPP)
•	Work with in-house teams to integrate recommendations.
•	Train, coach and mentor in-house staff on evidence-based-practices.

Our process:
•	Discovery: Interview staff members, clients and stakeholders; review policies and procedures.
•	Observation: Sit in on groups offered to clients.
•	Engagement: Shadow workers in specific operational systems (court processes, client meetings, etc.)
•	Assessment: Review data, create documents regarding program design.
•	EBPP: Deliver an Evidence Based Practice Plan to begin the transformation process.

The Horse's Hoof was born in September, 2000; the company of James and Yvonne Welz. James is a former computer systems administrator and printshop/technical equipment guru who gave up his career to become a barefoot hoofcare professional. Yvonne is a former desktop publishing wizard who tranferred her skills over to this company. And so The Horse's Hoof came into being, initially as this website, and then as a printed publication to support the new interest in barefoot horse care. A full line of products are offered to support the horse owner in their quest for a healthier and more natural life for their horses.

We support hoof care that creates functional, healthy bare hooves. We advocate more natural, humane living conditions for our equine friends. We encourage all forms of hoof care and horse care that promote these basic principles. We are not anti-shoe, simply pro-barefoot. We believe technology can be useful, and we believe in compromise. We are interested in the end goal: healthy hooves, and our philosophy is prevention. Therefore, we embrace all trimming methods, styles, and systems that have this common goal of hoof health.

Hoof Help Online with James & Yvonne Welz is a membership website which will be located at HoofHelpOnline.com, and will provide hoofcare education, assistance, and advice, through online streaming video, photos, articles, Q&A, and a members-only forum.

Name: Stichting Uget2Gether
Description:
Stichting Uget2gether staat voor het creëren van verbindingen met als doel mensen te activeren en deel te laten nemen aan het sociale en economische wijkproces om zo de leefbaarheid van de wijk te verbeteren. Door middel van innovatieve concepten gericht op maatschappelijk ondernemerschap en het verbinden van onderwijs aan welzijn worden mensen geactiveerd deel te nemen in dit buurtproces.

Denk hierbij bijvoorbeeld aan het project "de buurt kamer" waarbij Stichting Uget2Gether een sociale ontmoetingsruimte heeft creëert, door en voor de buurt.  Binnen deze ontmoetingsruimte komen bewoners van de Utrechtse wijk Lunetten bij elkaar om ideeën uit te wisselen, elkaar te ontmoeten en initiatieven te ontplooien.

Visie:
Stichting Uget2gether streeft naar een gezonde stad waarin bewoners samen komen om vanuit de eigen kracht een bijdrage te leveren aan een sociale en prettige buurt. 

Kernwaarden:
-	Activeren
-	Verbinden
-	Innoveren 
-	Sociaal ondernemend
-	Schakel tussen onderwijs en welzijn

Name: ARC Laboratories
Description:
ARC is an initiative created by a group of students from the faculty of IT and the IT-Section of Göta student union and devoted to the exploration of the fields of robotics, automation and communication through practical application of academic theories and industrial practices. As such all projects supported by ARC will have to display clear links to at least one of these primary topics. As a whole we seek to:

Diversify the research areas for undergraduate students interested in the ARC fields.

Find, study and solve societal issues by practical application of the vast knowledge base within the field of applied information technology.

Promote a broader understanding of automated systems and their practical applications in everyday life for a wide cross section of the population.

Expand the knowledge in the ARC fields by producing and demonstrating the practical applications of academic and industrial practices.

Collect a roster of members who are enthusiastic and autonomous information seekers, adept at problems based learning and able to create their own workflow and progress without external instructions.

Name: LeadOff, LLC
Description: LeadOff, LLC works to develop leaders of character who operate with an uncompromising standard of excellence in every area of their lives.  We do this through experience, execution, and education.  ARETE, which stands for Athletes Reaching Excellence Through Experience is our experiential learning platform and consists primarily of offsite retreats at battlefields across the country, using the military staff ride model to maximize experiences and bring leadership lessons from the battlefield to the playing field.  These "holistic" retreats include experiential activities, classroom lectures, small group discussions, sunrise physical training, battlefield immersions, collective character nights, combat veteran speakers, and more.  In addition, we have a ten-week training program called Team Character Intensive that uses experiential activities and physical training to help athletes develop proper moral habits as well as the leadership skills necessary to lead elite teams.  Derived from character strengths as well as elite naval aviation training techniques, our time together focuses on areas including integrity, ownership, commitment, discipline, love, situational awareness, decision-making, communication, adaptability, and mission analysis.

Name: Schor Ethics Consulting, LLC
Description:
We are in a time of unprecedented change to the workplace, economy, enforcement environment, and global community. Now is the time for companies to re-visit their ethics, compliance and risk programs to consider and respond to these changes.

But equally as important, we need leaders to stay true to their values, with fidelity to the truth, guided by a moral compass, and surrounded by strong leaders who are prepared to stand up and speak out for what’s right. 

It is my goal to help companies create an environment and a culture where the principles of dignity, authenticity and transparency are at its foundation. To that end, I can help stand up ethics, compliance and risk programs that include setting a tone from the top; policies and procedures; training and communications; monitoring, assessing and measuring; and investigating and reporting.

My expertise includes creating and revising codes of business conduct and ethics; implementing compliance training programs;  drafting compliance and ethics communications; standing up whistleblower programs; conducting and reporting on compliance investigations; conducting compliance and ethics risk assessments; conducting compliance culture surveys; spearheading applications for workplace awards, such as World’s Most Ethical Companies; and developing compliance program metrics to measure impact.

Name: Connect Alliance – Connecting People, Leadership and Results
Description:
Connect Alliance brings together over forty years of combined experience in leadership development, customer experience leadership and contact centre operations and management. We are an alliance of professionals who deliver practical, flexible and sustainable leadership development for team leaders and operational managers. 

Our team’s strength comes from having real experience leading teams combined with proven results in the design and delivery of development programs for leaders. The program is designed to improve business results through greater staff engagement and enhanced personal/professional satisfaction for leaders.


About the Connect Program

Connect has been designed with busy operational leaders in mind, especially within contact centre environments. Connect enables your leaders to connect more effectively with their team, to connect team development with results and to connect learning with their day-to-day experience, incorporating the following elements:

o	A focus on delivering improved business performance.
o	A modular design that allows you to select the modules most applicable to your business and leadership needs.
o	A combination of delivery methodologies including short small group sessions, practical workplace activities and follow up multimedia sessions that minimise time off the job and maximise time spent applying and embedding new skills and ways of thinking.
o	Use of modern technology (tablet, online) in the delivery to keep the program current and adaptable.
o	Application of scientific and neuropsychology research on how people learn and change to ensure learning is real, sustainable and embedded.


Our LinkedIn company page serves multiple purposes, including:

o	Supporting our programs through additional material and resources
o	Sharing of relevant articles, blogs and other resources developed by our team and other authors
o	An opportunity to support our clients and community through broader engagement

Name: PPM School of Management - WM 83
Description:
1966, Dengan dukungan kalangan mahasiswa dan pelajar, Pemerintah Indonesia melakukan berbagai pembenahan, baik di sektor politik, ekonomi, sosial budaya, dan tentunya juga sektor pertahananan dan keamanan. Pada saat yang bersamaan di Eropa dan Amerika juga sedang berkembang gerakan moral, salah satu organisasi yang menggagas gerakan itu adalah Moral Re-armament, dengan tokohnya Mr. FG. Hendricks dari Belanda (beliau juga sempat bertandang ke Indonesia untuk mempelajari aktivitas mahasiswa dan pelajar sepanjang tahun 1966).

Pada waktu yang hampir bersamaan, Dr AM. Kadarman SJ, yang pada saat itu masih menjabat sebagai Ketua Jurusan Ekonomi IKIP Sanata Dharma Yogyakarta, sedang melakukan lawatan ke Eropa. Sekembalinya dari Eropa beliau mempunyai gagasan untuk mendirikan sekolah bisnis semacam Harvard Business School di Indonesia. Lewat perantara Mr. F. Diepen, Direktur Fokker (perusahaan pesawat terbang), Dr. Kadarman bertemu dengan Mr. FG. Hendricks di Belanda. Keduanya sepakat menyatukan gagasan dan berusaha mewujudkan sekolah bisnis tersebut di Indonesia.

Dr. Kadarman dan Mr. FG. Hendricks berusaha menemui beberapa pengusaha, termasuk pengusaha dari pabrik mobil DAF, dan pejabat Direktorat Kerjasama Teknik Internasional dari Departemen Luar Negeri Belanda, untuk memuluskan gagasan tersebut. Pada prinsipnya pengusaha bersama dengan Pemerintah Belanda bersedia memberikan subsidi, dengan syarat di Indonesia terdapat badan yang representatif untuk menampung pelaksanaan gagasan tersebut.

Dalam hal lain pada saat itu situasi politik di Indonesia, meskipun mulai stabil tapi masih mengandung kerawanan dan sedang menghadapi konflik sektarian yang mengkhawatirkan, sehingga badan yang akan dibangun harus sedapat mungkin meredam kerawanan dan konflik yang kemungkinan akan mengemuka.

Se você buscar pelo significado de “tráfego” na Internet, a resposta que irá obter é a de que é um fluxo ou movimento mais voltado para carros, aviões, dentre outros meios de locomoção. 
O mesmo ocorre na Internet: quando as pessoas transitam entre páginas, vídeos, sites e plataformas, cria-se uma corrente de indivíduos que visualizam cada uma
dessas partes.

Quando você coloca o tráfego em prática, você aparece na frente dessa corrente que nunca para por meio do Instagram, YouTube e outros. 

Tráfego pago: é quando você paga para aparecer na frente do fluxo, e ter vantagem de ser visto antes do seu corrente, além disso quem não é visto não é lembrado.

“Gestão de tráfego pago é você colocar o anúncio certo na frente da pessoa certa no momento certo”

Nutzen Sie Schnittstellen und Module für die größten Preisportale, Marktplätze, Zahlungsanbieter und Speditionen und steuern Sie Ihr Geschäft aus einer komfortablen Softwarelösung heraus. Eine Vielzahl automatisierter Arbeitsprozesse sorgt für Entlastung im Tagesgeschäft, vertrauen Sie auf die mehrjährige Erfahrung und kontinuierliche Entwicklungsarbeit.
Mit dem Shopsystem können mehrere Onlineshops bzw. Ankaufseiten zugleich gesteuert werden. Bestellungen bzw. Ankäufe laufen zentral zusammen und können bequem bearbeitet werden.
Eine Nutzung des Shopsystems ohne eine eigene Webseite ist allerdings auch möglich, z.B. als Connector zwischen Warenwirtschaft und Plattformen wie Amazon und Ebay.

Durch das offene, modulare Konzept des Ipilum Shopsystems können unsere Kunden die Funktionalität Ihres Shops jederzeit durch Ihre Programmierer oder von Ihnen beauftragte Fremdfirmen erweitern.

Mit Ipilum Re-Commerce kaufen Sie Produkte jeder Art an. Viele Tools zur automatischen Preisfindung stehen zur Verfügung. Externe Datenquellen wie Amazon, Ebay, Libri, Keepa können eingebunden werden. Lager- und Lagerplatzverwaltung stehen zur Verfügung, sowie Sepa und Ebics Anbindung.
Viele weitere nützliche Tools und dazugehörige Apple IOS und Android Apps werden von uns angeboten.

Description:
SIEGA jest unikatowym programem tworzonym na bazie wieloletnich badań prowadzonych na grupie 1700 pracowników nad materią rozwoju pracowników fizycznie świadczących pracę, bezpieczeństwa pracy oraz optymalizacji zasobów i procesów w obszarze produkcji i logistyki.

Podstawowym celem było stworzenie zestawu narzędzi organizacyjnych, pozwalających w każdych warunkach i na każdej szerokości geograficznej budować najbardziej bezpieczne i efektywne środowisko pracy oraz tworzyć warunki do rozwoju i pełnego zaangażowania pracowników liniowych.

Aplikacja SIEGA wraz urządzeniami mobilnymi pozwala na usprawnienie każdego procesu w przedsiębiorstwie. 

Pobierz narzędzia i przeprowadź audyt w swojej firmie.

- Ogranicz zasoby w obszarze logistyki wewnętrznej i produkcji nawet o 30%. Wyznacz optymalne normy czasowe i 
   ilościowe na każdym stanowisku.

- Znacząco zwiększ wydajność pracy i wynagrodzenia pracowników fizycznie świadczących pracę bez podnoszenia 
   poziomu kosztów.

- Bądź atrakcyjnym pracodawcą, ogranicz fluktuację i zatrzymaj wartościowych pracowników. Wzbudź wśród nich 
   entuzjazm i zwiększ motywację do pracy.

- Całkowicie wyeliminuj ryzyko powstania wypadku przy pracy. Zarządzaj bezpieczeństwem i jakością.

- Zoptymalizuj flotę wózków widłowych i maszyn ciężkich. Dobierz odpowiednie maszyny do zadań. Zbadaj 
   wydajność oraz zużycie ON, LPG i energii elektrycznej.

- Zweryfikuj jakość usług świadczonych przez dostawców usług outsourcingowych. Wspieraj rozwój swoich 
   partnerów biznesowych.

Carsten Haink wurde ein einzigartiges Dienstleistungsangebot entwickelt – basierend auf mehr als 40 Jahren Erfahrung im operativen ESG-/Nachhaltigkeitsmanagement. Für Unternehmen, die Nachhaltigkeit in Schwerpunkten vertiefen, neu aufsetzen, erfolgsorientiert systematisieren oder professionalisieren wollen. 

Nachhaltigkeitsherausforderungen wirkungsvoll managen... und Potentiale heben
Die von Dr. Heger + Experten entwickelte pragmatische Herangehensweise macht Nachhaltigkeit für Unternehmen aller Größen handhabbar – durch eine klare Systematik, Komplexitätsreduktion und Fokussierung. 

Kundenlösungen für Umwelt, Gesellschaft und nachhaltige Unternehmensführung
Das Kundenangebot von Dr. Heger + Experten umfasst u.a.: 
• strukturierte Ableitung unternehmerischer Fokusthemen zu Umwelt, Gesellschaft und Unternehmensführung (Wesentlichkeitsanalyse)
• Dienstleistungen zum Umweltmanagement (z.B. Erhebung CO2-Fußabdruck), 
• Unterstützungsangebote zu gesellschaftlichen Herausforderungen (z.B. Menschenrechte, Sorgfaltsprüfungen für verantwortliche Lieferketten)
• Nachhaltigkeit in der Governance (Strategie, Nachhaltigkeitsbericht, Kundenfragebögen, Dialog mit Anspruchsgruppen etc.). 
Damit kommen Kunden ertrags- und kostenoptimiert schnell in die konkrete Umsetzung, und profitieren zügig von positiven Effekten. Eben: NACHHALTIG – ERFOLGREICH... JETZT!

Description:
Our Mission:
To attract, retain and engage young professionals in our community by helping them make meaningful connections among their peers and with established professionals, while learning and modeling the qualities of professionalism, leadership, charity, and community involvement.

Membership Statement:
YPAC is designed for emerging professionals who live or work in Anderson County, from any career field or profession.  

Membership in YPAC gives members access to YP-exclusive events, such as our quarterly leadership forums where members will learn and get Q&A time with top business owners and professionals from our area who “made it big”.  Additionally, members will gain exposure to other government and business leaders in our area while learning and practicing leadership in their community. Our programs are designed to help mold young professionals into leaders in their communities and their organizations.

Structure:
The Young Professionals board provides direction and coordination among each of our committees.  The YPAC board, along with each committee is assigned a mentor from the Chamber Board, to provide support and guidance, and to be a cheerleader for the group inside of the Chamber of Commerce and beyond. 

YPAC has the following areas of focus with a supporting committee for each area:

Social - Plan and host regular social events designed to make members feel welcome and enabling  them to form meaningful relationships in their community, while having fun.

Leadership Development - This committee is tasked with planning educational events and initiatives for our members to grow in wisdom and leadership experience through the examples of others.

Philanthropy - The job of the philanthropy committee is to plan, organize, and coordinate at least one hands-on philanthropic project each year that addresses an identified need in our community.  

Community Engagement - The role of this committee is to help inform and connect our members with the concerns

Name: Touchify Solutions
Description:
We create digital channels and services that enhance and improve our customers internal and external communication. We provide with strategy, content and our own cross platform technology.

Customer segments served:
 
1. Investor Relations Department

2. Corporate Communications Department

3. Human Resource Department

4. Sales and Marketing Department

5. Business Development Department


Touchify Solutions is all about Rock Solid, Cross Platform, Future Proof solutions. With everything we do stored in the Cloud instead of having to rely on a single vendors infrastructure, we can deliver very high up-times with solutions that can be used anywhere by anyone. Our unique Cross Platform technology, based on open standards like HTML5 and JavaScript, makes it possible for us to deliver a single source code that can be published on both iOS and Android, phones and tablets, any size at all. And as we only work with open standards and no proprietary software, our software is future proofed.


Administrating a whole array of native apps for different devices running different operating systems, can be a tedious and time consuming task. At Touchify Solutions, we have taken that variable out of the equation. With a single app that runs on phones and tablets running iOS or Android, We are happy to develop SDK Applications - if necessary. But we see that the trend is the same now as when the Internet was established. In the beginning you had Desktop Applications and then the Web Applications took over. We are confident that history will repeat itself. We believe that the traditional native Applications on for exampel App Store and Android Market will get tough competition from today´s HTML5 Mobile Web Applications. If you choose to work with us we can guarantee that your Mobile Applications will work on future Platforms.

Os indicadores do estado de saúde podem representar várias características relevantes da infraestrutura, desde rachaduras na estrada ou rugosidade da superfície - para o caso de aplicações de pavimentação de estradas - a defeitos de trilhos e até alertas de anomalias estruturais de pontes.

Agências governamentais, seguradoras ou empresas de transporte podem usar esses Indicadores do Estado de Saúde para otimizar o planejamento das atividades de manutenção preventiva, otimizar seus recursos, melhorar a avaliação de riscos, minimizar fechamentos não programados ou ate mesmo antecipar falhas catastróficas.

A filosofia da Infrasmart é proporcionar um substancial retorno sobre o investimento, ter aplicabilidade em larga escala e ser atraente para os stakeholders e usuários. Amigável, verde, participativo e colaborativo. A Infrasmart representa uma nova era no gerenciamento de infraestrutura de transporte - a era das cidades inteligentes.

Name: Instituto Helio Teixeira
ASPires Project - Early Detection of forest fires
Description:
Advanced Systems for Prevention and early detection of forest fires

Forest fires present one of the main risk for the nature and protected forest areas. Detection the fire in early phase remains one of the biggest challenge for researchers and institutions in Crisis Management Systems in Europe.

Forest fires pose a major risk for the environment and its detection at an early stage remains one of the biggest challenge for researchers and institutions in the management of the crisis in Europe.

The project will develop a novel model of an information systems for early detection, monitoring and prediction of forest fires in areas of particular importance, providing high fire danger forecast and prediction.

The goal of the project is to develop advanced concepts for early detection systems of forest fires that integrates sensor networks and mobile (drone) technologies for data collection and acquisition of those data at existing Crisis Management Information Systems (CMIS).

Thank you for your interest

ASPires team

The HEMATO-LOGIC Value Proposition are:
•	Decrease time for diagnosis, 
•	To catch diseases that need to have a fast diagnosis and to be detected at the beginning of the evolution/process to have a good outcome. 
•	Don’t miss a rare Disease 
•	To improve the tests outcome. Increase tests performance. Added value to test. 

Unique Selling Proposition (USP) 
•	DAO-2 considers that the patient may have more than one disease.
•	DAO-2 can check the list of symptoms in a patient database. 
•	DAO-2 calculate the probability of each disease having in account the frequency of the disease in the population but also the prevalence of each selected symptoms in each possible disease
•	Published References Bibliography

There are two major segments which are worth particular attention, as listed below and elaborated in the table:
•	Professional medical institutions
o	General Practitioners

Name: 山西平安谷信息技术有限公司
Description:
山西平安谷信息技术有限公司前身为山西中科博杰科技有限公司，成立于2004年。历经十余年的发展，已成为国内信息安全领域专业从事人脸识别技术和智能视频分析技术研究及其应用产品开发、系统设计的高科技公司。公司核心技术源于清华大学科研成果，与中国科学院自动化研究所合作进行产品化升级改造，于 2012 年步入了产业化道路。
    2012年，由中国科学院自动化研究所牵头，山西平安谷信息技术有限公司作为发起人联合生物识别行业骨干企业、具有技术优势的科研机构和高校大学共27家法人单位，共同组建中国生物识别产业技术创新战略联盟，公司成功当选为第一届联盟理事单位，并于2015年当选为联盟第二届常务理事单位。
公司团队承建了 2008 年北京奥运会开闭幕式人脸识别电子票证安全系统，在奥运史上首次应用了人脸识别技术，成为“平安奥运、科技奥运”的一大亮点，并获得了“第29届奥运会组委会贡献突出奖”。2012 年 12 月公司产品“基于云计算技术的高效人脸识别系统”被中科院院士、“中国模式识别之父”戴汝为先生率领的专家组正式鉴定为国际领先水平。2013 年公司产品获得“第十七届中国国际软件博览会金奖”、“ 2013 年度中国十大创新软件产品奖”，公司获得“2013 年度中国人脸识别行业信息化领军企业奖”。
    2014年11月，作为主要起草人，公司参与了公安部人像识别系统的行业标准制订。其七项大标准里，公司的企业标准占了其中主要的四项。同一年，公司荣获“山西2014十大品牌新技术新成果新产品奖”，公司研发的智能视频分析技术荣获“2014年生物识别卓越产品奖”，“基于云计算的高效人脸识别系统”荣获“山西省科学技术奖-科技进步二等奖”，公司还荣获由科学技术部、商务部、环境保护部、国家质量监督检验检疫总局四部委联合颁发的“国家重点新产品奖”，成为山西省唯一一家获此殊荣的高科技企业。
     公司与中科院自动化所共建院士工作站，成为国内业界首家成立院士工作站的企业。为支持“国家火炬太原信息安全特色产业基地”建设，公司于2014年提出“中国平安谷”建设方案。此方案受到省经信委的高度重视和认可，拟列入山西省“十三五”规划并予以重点支持。未来五年，在政府扶持下，公司作为项目发起人和主体建设单位，将联合业内具有代表性的其他信息安全企业，初步打造信息安全产业化基地，增强信息安全体系的占有率、竞争力。
    公司的主打产品为：基于云计算技术的高效人脸识别系统、重点场所（网吧）人脸实时布控系统、高速视频侦查系统、大型场所展台客流统计系统、人员卡口系统、人证比对产品。
Location: 太原市高新区, 山西省

Name: Living Dementia
Description:
By 2050 there will be approximately 2 billion individuals diagnosed with Alzheimer's or other Dementia related disease.  Are you ready?

•	There are more than 5 million Americans currently living with Alzheimer's disease. 
•	Every 66 seconds someone is diagnosed with Alzheimer's. 
•	There are15 million American's providing unpaid care. 
•	Alzheimer's disease is the 6th leading cause of death in the United States.
•	Alzheimer's disease is the only disease in the top 10 with no known cure.

There is little doubt that dementia poses one of the greatest societal challenges for the 21st century. This must be addressed internationally, nationally and locally, as well as at the family and personal level. 

Dementia is exceptional in terms of size, cost and impact on our world. There were 35.6 million people with dementia in 2010. That is 0.5% of the world’s population. This number is projected to double every 20 years to over 115 million in 2050. 

Currently, 58% of people with Alzheimer's type dementia live in low and moderate income countries. This is projected to increase to 71% by 2050. The current costs of dementia are estimated at US $604 billion per year. The numbers are rising more quickly than prevalence of the condition. 

The impact of dementia on socioeconomic conditions world- wide is enormous. Dementia is highly stigmatized and universally feared. Studies suggest that it is strongly associated with suffering, disability and economic loss. 

"It's Time To Act!" says  Darlene Tranquilli, a licensed, bonded and insured care-giver and state certified teacher / trainer. "I am very passionate about making change" said Tranquilli.

"I have been through so much in the past month with my residents. Between doctor visits and visits to the emergency room, I walked away frustrated and deflated because of the lack of knowledge and compassion toward those who have dementia related disease. Our community is just not prepared for what is already happening around them. Our community is in such denial of the facts. We need a call to action. We need it now."

"I want to launch a five year campaign to create awareness and increase education and training to create a "Dementia Capable Society".  It is doable, but someone needs to start.  I guess that someone is me.” 

“We need to reach the families, care-partners, employers, doctors, hospitals, administrators, and the facilities who speak to Alzheimer's disease and dementia care. I see it and live it on a daily basis.  I'm here to tell you that this disease is growing at alarming rates. Everyone needs to be involved so that we are ready."

Name: How To Start A Business org
Description:
Regardless of political affiliation, religion, color, or what kind of sneakers you wear, one thing we all still agree on is that healthy small businesses are good for our economy. Whether we’re talking about our local or national economy, no one except Jeff Bezos would argue that new, local businesses are bad for our communities, states or country. New businesses create new jobs, enhance our neighborhoods, cities and towns. A new business has the ability to be transformative.

The Economic Development Corporation (EDC) is dedicated to enhancing our world through the power of small business. That’s why we created HowToStartABusiness.org.

As a consortium of small business owners and entrepreneurs, the EDC knows that what often limits the creation of a new business is fear. A fear born out of a lack of knowledge and a belief that starting a business is hard, when in fact, you need next to nothing. All that’s required to start a business is an idea and the desire to bring that idea to life. The rest is just paperwork.

Name: Buro Intrinsiek
Description:
Gevoel voor samenwerking en talent om die samenwerking ook echt waar te maken. Dat is de kracht van Buro Intrinsiek. Buro Intrinsiek voert projecten uit waarbij de denk-,  innovatie- en executiekracht van overheden, ondernemers en burgers wordt gebundeld en resultaatgericht wordt ingezet.

Publiek-private samenwerking, coproductie, burgerparticipatie. Het zijn woorden die in onze samenleving op ieders lippen liggen. Overheden willen maar al te graag gebruik maken van de kennis en kunde uit de markt, marktpartijen willen hun ervaring en innovatiekracht graag inzetten bij publieke projecten en de burger wil niets liever dan gehoord worden over zijn woonomgeving. Een goed burgerinitiatief onder de aandacht brengen en succesvol implementeren, is niet eenvoudig. Daarnaast hebben ook technische professionals met de wil te innoveren het vaak niet makkelijk in een ambtelijke omgeving. Kennis en kunde is overal, maar hoe breng je het bij elkaar? En hoe zorg je dat ze samen leiden tot een klinkend projectresultaat?

Wij bezitten het vermogen om ieders eigen intrinsieke belang te begrijpen en te vertalen naar doelen die elke individuele speler binnen een samenwerking kan behalen. Wij zijn initiatiefnemers, kwartiermakers, (stads)ingenieurs, netwerkers, maar zelf ook ondernemers en uiteraard… burgers. Zoekt u een manier om publiek-private samenwerking succesvol in te zetten? Of wilt u als burger of ondernemer uw idee onder de aandacht van de overheid brengen? Wij adviseren en ondersteunen u hierbij. En we vormen graag de link tussen wat er al is, wat er nog nodig is en hoe dat tot het beste resultaat leidt.

Onze passie en expertise maakt van uw vraag onze missie. Neem vrijblijvend contact met ons op!

Description:
The NextGen Leaders Council was formed in 2010 to bring together Boston's top professionals, CEO's, Managing Directors, C-level executives, entrepreneurs, board members, investors, community leaders, government officials, and nonprofit directors under the age of 45 years old. Our members represent many of Boston's best companies and organizations as well as a diverse cross-section of sectors and industries.

The NextGen Leaders Council holds quarterly dinner events in different downtown locations to allow our members the opportunity to network with one another, build relationships, start friendships, share business strategy ideas.  Each of our quarterly dinner events is also headlined by a different keynote speaker which include some of the region's most experienced, influential and inspirational business leaders, CEO's and serial entrepreneurs.

Unlike most organizations in Boston we currently do not have any membership fees or dues because we're simply looking for the best and brightest individuals and certainly don't want any financial burdens or hurdles for people.  Our members are encouraged to attend the quarterly dinner events however we understand that extremely successful people tend to get very busy so some individuals may only attend 2-3 events per year.

Admission into the NextGen Leaders Council is through invitation only and referrals from existing members.  If you would like to be considered please send a short bio to Jonah Lupton at jonah@nextgenleaderscouncil.com

Name: Ninetales Limited
Description:
Ninetales was founded by 3 friends  with one dream in mind. Our dream is to create a business where the wealth is spread to all those involved. We believe the companies built in America put profits above people and that shouldn’t be the way it is. We want to empower everyday people working in careers that they love. The best way to empower the people is to provide them with the tools they need to succeed.  The old saying goes, put your money where your mouth is, and that is exactly what we have decided to do. We fully finance the tools that you need, to get more money in your pocket in an industry you already work in.

The service that we would like to help you break into is teeth whitening.  Right now, dentists have a monopoly on teeth whitening. Paying $300-$400 for teeth whitening is something that most Americans cannot really afford. By working together, we can bring that price point down to a rate that everyone can afford. 

Our company was founded with the goal of helping others make money and help shops reach their full profit potential. By paying all costs up front for you, your shop can start making a profit with your very first sale. You will not be locked into any sort of contract, you will not be required to meet any sales quotas. If you make one sale per month, great! If you make 100, even better! But with our mission in mind, any amount of sales you make is money in your pocket, and that is great to us. We want to help you get that vacation, or the Christmas presents, or that awesome new TV you’ve had your eye on for quite some time. In today's world, every dollar counts, and it’s time that someone started investing in everyday people, just like you and me.

By becoming part of our team, we can help other barbers and stylists across the country also receive this wonderful deal, just like you are. The global market for teeth whitening products is set to reach 7.40 billion by 2024. It is time for you to get your share of the pie.

Name: Deedu
Description:
Deedu es una start-up dedicada al desarrollo de aplicaciones orientadas a solucionar dificultades de aprendizaje en los menores. 
Por esto, diseñamos aplicaciones infantiles destinadas a favorecer una mejora cognitiva en las áreas de la atención, la memoria, el lenguaje y el razonamiento. Nuestras aplicaciones se dirigen tanto a los niños que necesitan trabajar ciertas dificultades de aprendizaje como a los que simplemente quieren mejorar su capacidad atencional. Con ellas no pretendemos enseñar a los más pequeños, sino ayudarles a progresar en su aprendizaje.

Las necesidades educativas especiales requieren un apoyo personalizado y una metodología innovadora. Conscientes de la preocupación que este tipo de necesidades genera en familias y educadores, ponemos a su servicio una serie de aplicaciones con las que podrán ayudar a los niños a alcanzar unos objetivos curriculares mínimos e indispensables, apoyándoles en su esfuerzo de superación.

Presentamos estas aplicaciones en forma de originales juegos para dispositivos móviles. Mediante el uso cuidadoso de los conceptos básicos de la gamificación, por su aspecto lúdico y sus características interactivas, los dispositivos móviles se convierten en el entorno ideal para el aprendizaje del niño. De esta manera, los pequeños se divierten sin tener conciencia de que están mejorando.

Name: The Volunteer Bay
Description:
The Volunteer Bay provides a global voice to small grassroots organizations pursuing the improvement of the quality of life and livelihoods of their communities in developing countries. Many of those organizations do not have the needed resources to reach those willing to give their time and labor to support their projects.  Moreover, their pursuing cause and location in the world provide ideal grounds for international volunteers to find personal awakenings, career development, and fun in experiential learning and multicultural exchange.

We are a networking hub for our partner grassroots organizations developing their social entrepreneurship, and international volunteers who share and have fun living our travel and volunteering philosophy:

"Travel is a full-body learning experience, taken in through our senses and our mind. We observe and learn from the beauty of our planet, people, culture and arts with curiosity, empathy and respect."

It is our priority to conduct our activities based on:
*  Diversity of projects and cultures: International volunteers collaborate in projects in four specific areas: animal care and rescue, conservation and sustainability, teaching, and social development.
*  Responsible assessment: Our programs are assessed for overall community contribution and safety within sustainable development strategies of our partner grassroots organizations.
*  Our partner grassroots organizations: In our destinations, we partner with small local organizations pursuing the improvement of the quality of life of a community within a balanced support and respect to the environment, human rights, and cultural heritage.
*  Personal growth: Experiential learning during volunteering provides a person with one of many paths to become aware of global issues and self aware of his/her body and mind.
*  Inspiration: By spreading the word about our initiatives, we provide a constant flow of inspiring moments and incite action in international volunteers.

Name: Phoenix International Inc.
Description:
We are a corporation founded specifically to design and create positive social and economic change.  We do this by creating sustainable programming around key community problems and developing networks of productivity that fuel each other.  A few key areas of programming are youth homelessness, unemployment, literacy, and access to business resources.  We know the value of information and inspiration.  

MISSION

Our mission is to provide support, education, and development opportunities to lift our participants' mindsets, experiences, and aspirations far above and beyond convention to create both a drive and capacity for success. Just as the mythical fire bird rose reincarnated from its own ashes and flames, Phoenix calls all those with whom we work to rise Beyond Efficiency, Beyond Expectation, and Beyond Excellence.

A major initiative of ours is a full service partnership with the State of Georgia Department of Family and Children Services to define new realities for foster youth.   Foster youth all over the country are aging out of vital social services at 18 without having been given key life skills. They are being left without proper social, economic, and personal support.  As such, this often leads to homelessness, crime, and in many cases incarceration for teens and young adults within this demographic.  

Phoenix International's Independent Living Program was founded to facilitate life skills and support resources to enable this youth population to achieve success on their own terms!  Our ILP provides room, board, watchful oversight, academic support, vocational support, and instruction on key life skills.  We extend our corporate culture of BEYOND into our interactions, programming, and expectations of the youth.  We encourage them to strive and rise BEYOND Efficient, Expectation, and Excellence.  We daily foster the ideal that going BEYOND will be the strategy that will allow them to elevate themselves into a life BEYOND any expectations they ever thought possible.

Name: ExaGGerate Technologies
Description:
A young, Basel (CH) seated, Startup, focusing on the Gaming Branch.
Our main purpose is to develop and distribute the Platform, called ExaQueue.
ExaQueue, the first decentralized social network 2.0 (!) of the gaming ecosystem. A software, offering the social network for every gamer's SuGOI (Superior Gaming/Online-Identity) plus actual content. 
The 2.0 suggests a revolution, making the users to the content creators by offering the infrastructure to manage friends, groups, and communities, expanding them, creating content on a heavily select-able way and organizing tournaments. Supported by Computer Vision and Social Algorithm this software shall do more than just displaying a list - compared to other related alternative software's in that area.
Further, with the base of a connecting, creating, competing, and publishing community (on a C2C basis) we want to establish the first decentralized virtual advertising space marketplace to securely allow game developers, content-creators, and tournament organizers renting, selling or buying virtual space for own advertising, tailored for the particular user in a well-known and valued environment. This shall help to create a whole new source of revenue for game developers and allowing virtual reality games to achieve their required level of development for reaching the vast majority. 
Only by combining all of these three aspects of ExaQueue gamers actually can find their teammate, manage their team, participate in tournaments and advertise their competitions in one space, making ExaQueue to the best synergizing software in the gaming-branch. 
Shorten, the pivot and focal point of the gaming ecosystem.

Name: Africa Growth Platform
Description:
Africa, with the world’s youngest population, is already experiencing a grass-roots Fourth Industrial Revolution in the emergence of a huge wave of entrepreneurial talent. The great challenge the region faces is how to capitalize on this natural talent and create the right conditions for these natural engines for growth, innovation and job creation to flourish.

To date, most efforts at supporting African entrepreneurship has come in the form of grant funding for entrepreneurs. The reality, however, is that, though well-meaning, these investments from governments, corporations, foundations and other sources are rarely as effective as they might be. This is because entrepreneurs face a raft of bottlenecks alongside finance that prevent them from getting off the ground. These include high taxation, excessive red tape, onerous labor law, poorly trained staff and weak channels to customers

The Africa Growth Platform (AGP), will address the policy and investor challenges facing Africa’s home-grown entrepreneurs. A platform approach is needed because the entrepreneurial system is facing multiple inherent paradoxes, meaning that solving one set of problems inherently triggers another set. Building on the Africa Regional Business Council initiative to Scale 100 million SMEs over the next five years, the AGP will do this in three ways:

a. Public Sector by making it easier to start a business, facilitating investments and Facilitating investments

b. Private sector by enhancing access to resources for scalable initiatives, investing in local and regional businesses, especially as part of long-term supply chains and developing formal local, regional and global mentorship systems.

c. Collaboration between the public and private sector by committing to developing entrepreneurial talent through massive skilling and reskilling, enabling procurement policy and by fostering market-creating innovations

Name: Knowledge Systems Romania, SRL
Description:
Knowledge Systems România născut în anul  2011 din cooperarea excepţională cu Serviciile Penitenciare româneşti în cadrul proiectului strategic “Credem în Schimbare” implementat în perioada 2007 - 2011, proiect considerat model de bune practici la standarde europene.  
 
Knowledge Systems România a rezultat din asocierea unui grup de consultanţi care îşi desfăşoară activitatea de mai mult de 20 de ani în Portugalia şi în alte ţări, existând şi în România din anul 2007. Prin implementarea procesului nostru de învăţare pentru schimbarea comportamentului, organizaţiile vor avea creşteri ale eficienţei în activitate.  
 
Knowledge Systems România furnizează şi implementează soluţii pentru sectoarele public şi privat (administraţiile publice locale şi centrale) şi organizaţii, inclusiv sectorul al treilea. Knowledge Systems România efectuează de asemenea studii şi cercetări, proiecte de dezvoltare în ariile de intervenţie ale clienţilor.
 
Viziune
Excelenţa organizaţională este atinsă prin dezvoltarea abilităţilor personalului şi adoptarea tehnologiei potrivite.  
 
Misiune
Sporirea performanţei clienţilor prin intermediul livrării metodologiei şi a procesului de învăţare care combină consultanţa, formarea şi tehnologia.
 
Valori
Model biopsihosocial
Creativitate

As the founder of Your Corporate Shrink, plus CEO of Thrival Company, and a ‘recovering engineer, she has been called the ‘engineer of business success.’

Name: BooWeb - Desarrollo Web & Marketing
Description:
¿Eres una empresa o un emprendedor que está empezando? ¿O un veterano con miras a reciclar la imagen de tu compañía? ¿Cansados de lo de siempre?

Esta es la parte aburrida: 

BooWeb somos una empresa española y ofrecemos servicios de Diseño & Desarrollo Web con especialidad en WordPress, y también marketing en todos sus ámbitos: SEO, pago por click (o SEM), marketing en redes sociales, analítica web, mantenimiento de web y web apps, etc.

Vale, y ahora lo divertido: 
Lo que nos diferencia de TODOS los demás son sin duda las ganas, la cercanía, lo súuuper perfeccionistas que somos con nosotros mismos y nuestro trabajo. Casi siempre nos excedemos en nuestras obligaciones y acabamos entregando un trabajo muy por encima de lo contratado, "for free". Así de guays, progres, y liberales somos (¿acabo de contradecirme?). Tenemos un aire desenfadado como habrás notado, pero que eso no te confunda. Somos muy profesionales, y directos en el trato, y cuando se trata de solucionar un problema nos puedes considerar tu bisturí de la navaja suiza que llevarás contigo desde el momento en que nos fiches para tu proyecto. Porque,... oh, sí, estamos deseando formar parte de él.

Tenemos una mezcolansa interesante en plantilla: Burgos, Canarias, Cataluña, y ... otras partes del país son las comunidades que representan nuestros nacimientos, aunque hemos viajado tanto que somos un poco de todas partes.

Si te interesa trabajar con alguien que querrá tu éxito por encima de las posibilidades de tu competencia, somos los indicados.

Si sólo quieres una empresa que te haga la web o te lleve el marketing, entonces te pedimos que nos des puerta :-).

¿Has visto ya nuestra web? ¿Sencilla no? Prácticamente vivimos encima de los proyectos y sueños de otros para que se hagan realidad, y como dice el dicho: En casa de herrero... 

Aún así, te aseguro que no verás muchas en WordPress con esa velocidad, y claridad. ¿Marcamos punto positivo?

No mordemos, envíanos un mensaje.

Name: EDU-DAPRO
Description:
EDU-DAPRO (EDUcational resources for training adults on digital DAta PROtection) is a Strategic Partnership project in the field of Adult Education funded with the support of the programme Erasmus+. 
The project aim is to develop open educational resources and training for businesses and citizens in the context of the new European regulation on data protection. Come into application in May 2018, the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) provides a set of data protection rules for all companies operating in the EU, wherever they are based, thus allowing people to have more control over their personal data. However, there is a need to step up awareness, train EU citizens to protect their data, and support businesses and SMEs (small and medium-sized enterprises) in their efforts to comply with this new regulation. 
The EDU-DAPRO project answers the need of training in the field of data protection, by developing open educational resources for businesses and training providers. The partnership will develop a digital diagnosis tool related to the level of maturity concerning the implementation of the law, an e-assessment tool in order to evaluate the knowledge and competences of employees in charge of managing data, as well as a mobile app combining e-learning modules and chatbots to support training in and out of the work or training place. This approach ensures an open-access participation in training activities, promotes innovative teaching and learning through new technologies and digital contents. 
In order to complete and vary the training offer, we wish to develop two complementary game-based educational materials: a digital board game on the management of personal data and an escape game activity for face-to-face group activities.

Name: Lucky Sistemas
Description: Somos una empresa dedicada exclusivamente al desarrollo de software de primera calidad, enfocado directamente a la solución de las problemáticas y necesidades principalmente de la actividad agroindustrial. Desde el manejo de la información que se genera en la quinta como lo es la cosecha, cuadrillas, envases, insumos químicos hasta la llegada a planta de empaque en cada uno de los procesos intervinientes: identificación de la materia prima (frutos), pesaje, drencher, frío, insumos de empaque, stock de envases, generación de etiquetas y lectura de las mismas, despachos a destino etc. Hemos desarrollado software para controlar la trazabilidad de los frutos, desde su origen en la granja hasta su lugar de destino como producto, diferenciando cada una de las etapas del proceso, sabiendo en cada momento el origen y/o destino de la materia prima trabajada. Con mas de 20 años en el rubro estamos en constante actualización de nuestros sistemas incorporando nuevas y mejores soluciones para las crecientes demandas de información que requieren los negocios de exportación en estos tiempos.
