Name: Organizational Capacity Building, LLC
Description:
Organizational Capacity Building works with non-profits, schools and districts, municipalities, and businesses to sustain and improve high quality programs. We provide consulting services such as program evaluation, grant writing, sustainability planning, professional development, meeting facilitation, and building cross-sector partnerships. We work with organizations driven by world-changing missions, with the goals of building your internal capacity, strengthening partnerships that will extend your reach, and ensuring that your programs have the greatest possible chance of achieving your goals.

OCB evaluates small- and large-scale projects using rigorous mixed-method qualitative and quantitative research methodology. We work to develop an evaluation plan that fulfills all requirements of the funder and addresses specific goals and values that make your project unique. We view the role of program evaluator as one of technical assistance, including participating in data-driven decision-making ensuring that the data is both useful to both program leaders and direct service staff. 

The Organizational Capacity Building team has written more than $50 million in local, state, and federally funded grant applications since 2011. We work with your teams to craft proposals that fit with your organizational mission and successfully respond to RFPs. OCB can support both local and state grant-writing projects, which typically last for 6-10 weeks, as well as federal proposals requiring months of advance planning.
 
OCB can support you in developing a comprehensive sustainability plan, articulating feasible funding goals, identifying appropriate funding sources, planning your development calendar, and developing a diversified portfolio of funding.
 
We approach consulting from a research perspective – by learning as much as we can about your organization, we provide you with recommendations and action steps that emerge from the data.

The learned behaviour prevalent in society today is based in reactionary energy and the belief that the solutions to conflict live outside of ones self. Within the foundation of his training, Scary brings all participants to the same level of awareness, that every person is involved to some degree in the use of words as negative energy for communication, unaware of the cycle in which they participate.

VisionHeart delivers core systems and programs to empower the cognitive and emotional health and character of the company, through the empowerment of all individuals within it. Each person is taught to understand the flow of words and non-verbal communication as energy, enabling them to make choices with that knowledge. When you harness the power of each individual’s personal capacity to become responsible for all of their words and actions, you enable them to become a successful, healthy and active contributor, creating growth and development in the company as a whole.

Name: Dennis Gudden Advies
Description:
Waarom lukt het onze samenleving vaak niet om grote veranderingen tot stand te brengen? Het antwoord heeft alles te maken met het verschil tussen onze dagelijkse leefwereld en de systeemwereld met regels, procedures en protocollen die we hebben gecreëerd. Deze twee werelden zijn niet altijd goed op elkaar aangesloten, waardoor we bijvoorbeeld de klimaatcrisis maar langzaam te lijf gaan, mensen en werkgevers op de arbeidsmarkt onvoldoende snel bij elkaar matchen en mensen uit de bijstand niet goed genoeg in hun kracht zetten om mee te doen in onze samenleving. En dat terwijl we het wel kunnen, door slimme verbindingen te leggen en goed te kijken wat er nodig is voor mensen, organisaties en de samenleving.

In de afgelopen jaren als adviseur en projectmanager bij gemeenten en vervolgens als wethouder in Wageningen heb ik veel bereikt door terug te gaan naar het doel. Wat willen we bereiken met nieuw beleid en tegen welke belemmeringen lopen de uitvoerders aan? Wat hebben burgers nodig en wat betekenen de veranderingen voor hen?

Het is mijn missie om hierin doorbraken en versnellingen te realiseren. Dat doe ik in het bijzonder op de onderwerpen economie, arbeidsmarkt en duurzaamheid. Mijn kracht is om systeem- en leefwereld aan elkaar te koppelen, draagvlak te creeëren van bestuurders tot bewoners, en dit door te vertalen naar tastbare resultaten. Voor meer informatie kijk op www.dennisgudden.nl, stuur een mailtje naar info@dennisgudden.nl of bel me gerust op 06-14488466.

Name: InEssence
Description:
Organisaties verwachten steeds meer van medewerkers en leidinggevenden. De wereld verandert continu en de uitdagingen zijn groot. Dat vraagt nogal wat van de individuele medewerker én de organisatie als geheel. Medewerkers moeten flexibel en ondernemend zijn, maar ook vitaal en betrokken. Dat gaat niet zomaar. Medewerkers laten zich vaak meeslepen door de dagelijkse business en zijn zich onvoldoende bewust van hun eigen waarden. Verbroken verbinding met zichzelf en de organisatie liggen op de loer. 
Dat kan anders!

Mijn visie:
Mensen zijn de drijvende kracht van een organisatie. De beste bedrijven zorgen behalve voor hun bestaansrecht ook voor zingeving. Verbinding is daarbij de Essentie. Te vaak zie ik dat beslissingen worden genomen vanuit oordeel of angst. Dit heeft invloed op de cultuur en dus de organisatie. Als medewerkers vanuit verbinding en vertrouwen werken, zijn zij van onschatbare waarde voor de organisatie. Door de mens centraal te stellen, stimuleer je eigenaarschap, een aanstekelijke werkenergie en een intrinsieke betrokkenheid. En dat zie je ook terug in de bedrijfsresultaten. 

Over mij:
Ik maak mensen bewust van hun eigen waarden, ik zet mensen in hun kracht. Een basis van vertrouwen en veiligheid zijn daarbij leidend. 
Als je werkt vanuit je eigen kracht, versterk je jezelf & elkaar. Dat maakt een team, dat is de fundering van een sustainable organisatie. Dat creëert verbinding, vanuit die essentie is alles mogelijk. 
De verbinding van het individu met zichzelf en het individu met team/ organisatie, pas ik toe op de volgende expertise gebieden: 
Klantmanagement, Leiderschap & Hospitality.

Name: Interreg ConValoRe
Description:
Il progetto di cooperazione Italia-Svizzera “ConValoRe” mira a valorizzare gli stretti legami storici, sociali e culturali fra i territori della Media Valtellina e della Valposchiavo. 
I tre secoli di percorso comune di Valtellina e Valposchiavo hanno modellato il contesto ambientale e il grande patrimonio legato al paesaggio culturale, quali i sentieri ed i terrazzamenti del versante retico e i molteplici edifici religiosi e nobiliari che recano evidenti tracce di un sapere costruttivo comune e di una cultura condivisa. 
Il progetto prevede una serie di azioni per migliorare la conservazione del patrimonio architettonico e paesaggistico condiviso, mettendo in comune attività, conoscenze e metodologie con una visione strategica della conservazione programmata finalizzata a garantire una migliore sostenibilità economica ed ambientale di questo territorio italo-svizzero. 
L’importanza del progetto risiede non solo nelle azioni di conservazione del patrimonio culturale, ma anche nel voler rafforzare il senso di appartenenza delle comunità valtellinesi e valposchiavine ad una comune radice culturale.
Il progetto sviluppa 4 macro-tematiche: conoscenza, conservazione, valorizzazione e formazione. 
La conoscenza riguarda la storia, i materiali, le tecniche costruttive, ma anche e soprattutto il contesto in cui i beni sono inseriti e la correlazione tra gli stessi. 
La conservazione prevede interventi di tutela di lungo termine e una positiva interazione con il sito UNESCO “La Ferrovia Retica nel paesaggio dell’Albula e del Bernina”.
La valorizzazione contribuirà a rendere fruibili i beni ed il paesaggio culturale e sarà da stimolo allo sviluppo turistico e culturale del territorio comune fra Media Valtellina e Valposchiavo.
La formazione mirerà a sviluppare competenze nella conservazione a diversi livelli, per professionisti del paesaggio e operatori manutentivi con attenzione alle tecniche di conservazione dei muri a secco.

Ichrak Debbah est la présidente-fondatrice de « Projet Immigration - CAP CANADA » (PI2C) qui traite principalement les dossiers d’immigration vers le Canada en partance d’Algérie, de Tunisie, du Maroc et de la France.

Agissant uniquement avec des collaborateurs reconnus et en partenariat avec le cabinet d'avocats canadien "BENKHALIFA CABINET | MBC INC.", le cabinet PI2C possède un savoir-faire reconnu au Canada.

Name: ComuLux Program
Description:
Der sachgerechten Modernisierung von Strassenleuchten stehen verschiedene, z. T. starke Hemmnisse im Weg. Aus Sicht der Steuerzahler unterliegt die Sanierung einer Optimierung zwischen Energieeffizienz, Wirtschaftlichkeit und dem aktuellen Stand der Technik. Das Programm „ComuLux“ hilft, die Hemmnisse bei der Umsetzung zu überwinden, indem Strukturen bereitgestellt werden, die den Gemeinden mehr Unabhängigkeit bieten. Die Modernisierungsprojekte werden zudem mit einem Beitrag pro Leuchte direkt gefördert und umgesetzt. Hierbei sollen strukturschwache oder kleine Gemeinden und Gemeinden in Berg- oder Randgebieten mit höheren Beiträgen gefördert werden. Mit einem etwas niedrigeren Subventionsbetrag können jedoch auch Städte und Agglomerations-Gemeinden profitieren.

Ein Konsortium erarbeitet mit dem Gemeindeverband ein Programm, das den Ersatz von rund 5000 Strassenleuchten in bis zu 200 Gemeinden zu tiefsten Gesamtkosten ermöglicht. Das Konsortium ist so zusammengefügt, dass sowohl kommunikative, wie technische, qualitative, ökonomische, organisatorische und Energieeffizienz-Anforderungen auf bestem Niveau erfüllt werden. Neben dem Gemeindeverband als Kommunikationsträger agieren die eLight GmbH für die lichttechnische Betreuung und die onlog AG für die Programmführung und die logistische Umsetzung.

Das ComuLux-Programm verbessert die Energieeffizienz von Strassenleuchten um mindestens 65%, indem veraltete Natriumdampf-Leuchten durch modernste LED-Leuchten samt integrierten Steuerungsoptionen zur Effizienzsteigerung ausgetauscht werden.

Die Gesamtinvestition beläuft sich inklusive aller Projekt- und Installationsleistungen für die Gemeinde auf durchschnittlich ca. 679 Franken pro Leuchte. Die Energie- und Kostenwirksamkeit des Programms ist ausgesprochen gut und beträgt nur 3.0 Rappen/kWh. Insgesamt wird das Programm dazu beitragen, über 32 Millionen kWh einzusparen.

Name: TheEPiCFoundation
Description:
Our Mission & Vision

Our sole mission is to improve the lives of minorities by increasing the knowledge in areas that would be most impactful for health and financial security. TheEPiCFoundation pulls resources together, just as in the spelling of our name, to provide access to resources in environments geared towards learning. Knowledge is power and we want to support every individual we serve with the tools to become wiser every day.

Our  three pillars are designed to address what we believe to be the largest needs within minority communities in the United States. The experiences amongst our team helped establish our focus to lift minorities out of poverty and into opportunity. We believe the successful way forward is taking ownership of our destiny by improving our minds (college scholarships), our wallets (financial literacy), and our bodies (healthcare disparity).

Healthcare Disparity – provide education to minority communities regarding health issues, support testing/screening for disorders or diseases and access to local health care experts with the mission to reduce the risk, improve lifestyle with early detection.

Financial Literacy – provide programs to educate minorities on financial health with focal points including debt reduction, saving for the future, and credit.

College Scholarships – provide merit-based or need-based financial support for minority high school seniors to attend college.

Name: Inclusion and Displacement
Description:
Events of recent history have forced vast swathes of people to depart their homeland, isolating them from the familiar environmentally embedded forms of culture-specific engagement which inform identity.
Consequently, for millions of people, a sense of inclusion and belonging has given way to the experience of displacement and dissociation.
This experience manifests on multiple levels, impacting individuals, families, and communities.
Thereby, provisions to facilitate and enable displaced populations in their endeavor to recreate a sense of inclusion and belonging ideally respond to those levels.
The Inclusion and Displacement Project seeks to investigate such multidimensional responses by which displaced individuals and communities can rediscover authentic identity.

Name: The Listening Lab
Description:
Listening Lab trains the brain to process sensory, cognitive and emotional information more effectively with iLs.

iLs stands for "Integrated Listening Systems", a U.S. based company located in Denver, CO. The company was founded in 2007; and is an early pioneer in the application of sound and movement for therapeutic purposes. 

iLs is a multi-sensory program for improving brain function.

iLs programs provide high quality processed music through specialty designed headphones.

iLs uses music and movement, and then gradually integrates language and cognitive processes.

The exercises appear simple but become increasingly difficult as the music gradually filters out and eliminates lower sound frequencies. The remaining high frequencies create a stimulating effect on the brain, allowing the brain to attend and process new information more efficiently.

The program involves no computers or screens of any type. 

iLs programs improve emotional regulation and cognitive functioning while training the brain to process sensory information in a profound new way.

With improved regulation and processing, our ability to focus, think, and engage successfully in social situations improves drastically.
Find out more at www.listeninglab.ca

What is a Cluster?
Our starting point is the cluster framework developed by Prof. Michael Porter.

Michael Porter defines clusters this way:
Clusters are geographic concentrations of inter-connected companies and institutions in a particular field. Clusters encompass an array of linked industries and other entities important to competition. They include, for example, suppliers of specialized inputs such as components, machinery, and services, and providers of specialized infrastructure.

Name: JM Business Assistance
Description:
Het omzetten van dromen naar een duidelijke strategie. Geen werkboek creëren hoe je iets moet doen, maar een mooie lijn naar het uiteindelijke doel, waar jij als ondernemer natuurlijk van kan en mag afwijken en nog steeds het doel kan behalen! 

- Commercie gaat over kansen creëren en grijpen. Daarnaast ook over ‘jumping on the train’ die je niet had kunnen voorspellen. Een commerciële strategie staat nooit vast en heeft altijd ruimte voor kansen en mogelijkheden. 

- Bedrijfsstrategie gaat onder andere over de missie en de visie van het bedrijf. Weet de uitvoerende tak wel wat je doel is? Weten deze mensen welke missie en visie jij met jouw bedrijf wil uitstralen? Weten ze waar ze naartoe aan het werken zijn? 

Daarnaast, weet je zelf wel echt waar je wil staan over een x periode? Hoe je dat wil doen? Wat de normen en waarden zijn van je bedrijf? Hoe je wil dat het intern verloopt? Lopen processen wel zo efficiënt mogelijk? 
Draag het uit! Wees trots! And go for it! 

- Marketing een prachtig middel om waarde te creëren voor het product/dienst. Een essentieel onderdeel now a days voor een onderneming. Ook hier is een strategie en een plan voor nodig. Hoe ga je een target halen tegen wel budget? Is dat haalbaar? Zal je andere kanalen moeten aanboren? Al eens nagedacht over adverteren op social media? Tegenwoordig kan je er bijna niet meer omheen. No marketing, no growing business. 

Al deze aspecten worden opgepakt bij JM Business Assistance.

Zie de website voor uitgebreidere informatie over de takken van sport en over mij. 

www.jm-ba.nl

The magic comes when we start taking about client relationship management. We will have a better advertisement target knowledge based on the client previous purchases.

La InvaderComputer è orgogliosamente Italiana,
Nata nel 2007 dalla passione e dedizione del suo Ceo Andrea Bonsignore, si è ampliata fino a contare attualmente 10 elementi.
La InvaderComputer conta un team multidisciplinare che copre un ampio raggio nel panorama informatico.
La InvaderComputer lavora nei seguenti ambiti:
-Sviluppo Software Applicativi per Piattaforma Windows e Mac
-Sviluppo Siti Web dedicati ad ampio spettro (E-commerce, portali, ecc..)
-Sviluppo Applicativi Videoludici
-Sviluppo in ambito Mobile (Windows Phone, Apple, Android)
-Setting e mantenimento di strutture hardware dedicate
-Consulenze e organizzazione informatica per aziende e uffici

Anche se giovane la InvaderComputer conta già un ampio parco di prodotti sviluppati e conta molti progetti in cantiere.
I progetti della InvaderComputer sono sempre innovativi e al passo con i tempi, poichè il team studia continuamente e acquisisce ogni nuova tecnologia utile sul mercato.

Name: Dedato.nu
Description:
Een monument zonder de juiste herbestemming heeft geen toekomst. Herbestemmen van cultureel erfgoed vraagt om lef, doorzettingsvermogen, nieuwe allianties en inzichten. Maatschappelijke ontwikkelingen bieden volop kansen voor het behoud van ons erfgoed door herbestemming. Maar die kansen moeten gezien en gepakt worden om daadwerkelijk tot innovatieve en haalbare oplossingen te komen. 
Dedato.nu legt nieuwe verbindingen in onderzoeken en concrete projecten. Zo werken wij samen met andere professionals om herbestemmingsvraagstukken integraal te benaderen: Van onderzoek naar nieuwe instrumenten en bouworganisatiemodellen tot de uitvoering van concrete haalbaarheidsonderzoeken en de realisatie van renovatieprojecten.
Dedato.nu weet de optimale herbestemmingsvisie voor een gebouw of complex te ontwikkelen en vervolgens te vertalen in een realistisch plan. Wij doen dat samen met social entrepreneurs, architecten, bouwers, fondsenwervers, financiers, onderwijsinstellingen en adviseurs. 
Dedato.nu deelt en ontwikkelt kennis op het gebied van herbestemming door het analyseren van succesvolle praktijkvoorbeelden (best practices) en het inzetten van onze denkkracht bij actuele vraagstukken. In werkateliers werken wij aan concrete projecten met professionals en studenten om kennis en expertise, die versnipperd aanwezig is, te borgen en over te dragen.

Name: Versnellingsaanpak asbestdakensanering
Description:
Het ministerie van Infrastructuur en Waterstaat heeft in juli 2016 het Programmabureau Versnellingsaanpak asbestdakensanering opgericht. Het Programmabureau stimuleert en monitort de versnelling van de sanering van asbestdaken in Nederland. Met de ondertekening van de  Samenwerkingsverklaring aanpak asbestdaken op 2 maart 2020 is de hoofdfunctie van het Programmabureau het faciliteren van de partijen die samen aan de slag zijn met de uitvoering van de activiteiten uit de samenwerkingsverklaring. 

Om bij te dragen aan de versnellingsaanpak voor de sanering van asbestdaken werkt het Programmabureau op basis van de volgende uitgangspunten:

- Centraal staat het brede samenwerkingsverband dat de sanering van asbestdaken wil aanpakken en versnellen. Het Programmabureau betrekt daarom het netwerk van ambassadeurs in haar activiteiten en omgekeerd wordt aan ambassadeurs ondersteuning geboden aan initiatieven gericht op de versnellingsaanpak.
- Een flexibel en faciliterend Programmabureau. Het bureau treedt niet in de eigen verantwoordelijkheden van dakeigenaren, belangenorganisaties of aanbieders van oplossingen. De basis voor het programma is verkenning en verbinding.

Name: AJC projectmanagement
Description:
Theater is mijn grote liefde. In elk project hoor ik een nieuwe voorstelling, een spannende dialoog, een bijzonder lied. Altijd zingen is het devies. Want als je gaat zingen, ben je ontspannen en straal je. Op het podium kun je van een afstand de zaal in kijken, de maatschappij in kijken en rustig observeren wat daar te doen is en ondertussen jezelf blijven.

Geef mij een project, inhoud maakt niet uit, en ik neem de regie. Dan trekken we alle spelers het podium op, gaan we de discussie aan, vinden we de beste vorm. Samen maken we de voorstelling, kijken we de zaal in, want wie verdient nog meer een rol? Zo creëren we het leukste theater. Of de leukste, mooiste, beste samenleving. Het is maar hoe je er naar kijkt…

Veel studies gedaan, veel sectoren gezien, maar altijd soortgelijk werk. Om die verscheidenheid de ruimte te geven, ben ik in januari 2018 AJC projectmanagement gestart. Ik zie mijzelf als een echte regeltante en mijn omgeving beaamt dat. De zakelijke kant van de organisatie van een project, evenement of instelling en mijn passie voor cultuur en maatschappij wil ik graag combineren. Mijn brede blik en ervaring behapt thema’s als cultuur, onderwijs, zorg, welzijn, duurzaamheid en milieu.

Name: ihop it gmbh
Description:
Die Geschichte unseres Unternehmens begann 2006 mit der Entwicklung einer Software zur Kundenwertberechnung für Businesskunden eines führenden Telekommunikationsunternehmens. Dieses Projekt legte den Grundstein für unsere Expertise in der Automatisierung und Optimierung von Geschäftsprozessen. 2011 wurde daraus ein Einzelunternehmen gegründet, mit dem Ziel, maßgeschneiderte Softwarelösungen für verschiedene Branchen zu entwickeln.

Mit der Zeit wuchsen sowohl die Anforderungen als auch der Kundenstamm. Ein bedeutender Meilenstein war die Entwicklung eines Zeiterfassungssystems für ein Unternehmen aus der Systemgastronomie (Catering und Kantinen). Parallel dazu entstanden individuelle Lösungen für kleinere Unternehmen, darunter Makroskripte und webbasierte Tools zur Prozessautomatisierung.

Seit 2015 liegt unser Schwerpunkt auf der Zusammenarbeit mit Steuerberatern. Unsere Lösungen helfen dabei, Arbeitsabläufe effizienter zu gestalten – sei es durch die Automatisierung der Einspielung von Buchhaltungsdaten, die Entwicklung kundenspezifischer Rechnungserstellungstools oder SaaS-Programme zur Unterstützung komplexer Lohnverrechnungen.

2016 wurde das Unternehmen in die ihop it gmbh überführt.

Neben der individuellen Betreuung unseres mittlerweile auf drei Steuerberatungskanzleien angewachsenen Kundenpools forcieren wir den Ausbau von SaaS-Software, die einer breiten Zielgruppe einen echten Mehrwert bietet. Dazu gehören unter anderem:
 monatsabschluss.at
 payroller.at
 ready2invoice.com

Name: FACING THE SKY
Description:
FACING THE SKY is an art project with a very specific goal.

Besides the obvious magic of the art as you will see, the goal is to increase awareness and activism regarding the major issues of our time, first and foremost our environmental concerns.

And for that purpose FACING THE SKY will be a massive installation: a ”visage”, a stylized representation of humanity, almost half-of-a-square mile - one square kilometer.

FACING THE SKY will be so big in fact that it will be captured by satellite and broadcast all over the world.
Facing us all, looking at us directly in the eyes, - in the same time that it is FACING THE SKY, looking at the future, the starts and the infinite cosmos – it will boldly inject itself into the global community as an “Art Imperative”, a call to awareness and action...

And it will be shown during ART BASEL MIAMI BEACH, the biggest concentration of art in the world.

The global community outreach of FACING THE SKY is fundamental. This is the time to be bold. There has never been a better time to push forward. The world has never been more connected. The global village is now, and FACING THE SKY wants to help sharing ideas, hopes and concerns, and communicate to each other..

We, the people from planet earth. So that everyone can say what they think and show what they see.

We believe that the first step in changing lives begins with challenging traditional mindsets.  Each one of us is different in some way.  Those differences should not define who we are as people.  Open dialogue about our differences and the ability to speak about our fears and insecurities creates a path of change and acceptance.

مسیر را برای شما ساده سازی کرده ایم؛ در ابتدا پس از مشاوره تلفنی یا حضوری و بعد از دریافت اطلاعات اولیه به بررسی و آماده سازیِ یک طرح جامع بازاریابی دیجیتال با رویکرد توسعۀ کسب و کار شما میپردازیم. در ادامه پس از تایید طرح توسط شما، اجرای طرح آغاز میشود.

ما در آژانس دیجیتال مارکتینگ روژیا در زمینه مشاوره راه اندازی کسب و کارهای آنلاین، طراحی و برنامه نویسی وب سایت و اپلیکیشن، خدمات دیجیتال مارکتینگ و تبلیغات آنلاین فعالیت می کنیم. برای برند های بزرگ و کوچک زیادی پروژه های مختلفی را انجام دادیم که با افتخار اکثر مشتری ها راضی و خشنود بوده اند. ما برای بهترین راه همیشه به روز هستیم و به کمک تیم ایده پرداز مان و در نظر گرفتن نیاز های مشتری بهترین راه و به صرفه ترین روش برای دیده شدن در فضای مجازی را ارائه میدهیم.

Name: Singing For Sri Lanka
Description:
Founded by the Sri Padmasambhava Buddhist Temple, Singing For Sri Lanka is a fundraising initiative committed to providing for Sri Lankan children in need. 

Originally created to raise funds for children affected by the Easter terrorist attacks in Sri Lanka, our organisation now focuses on providing long term scholarships for underprivileged children. In Sri Lanka today, hundreds of children struggle to afford school supplies and basic living necessities. Singing For Sri Lanka fundraises through festivals, charity concerts and donations to sponsor these children in need. We focus on providing financial stability in the long term, rather than one-off donations. Our scholarships last until the child is permanently employer after becoming an adult, or have graduated from high education (university/college). 

Singing For Sri Lanka was proud to be featured in Sri Lankan national TV and radio in 2019, in partnership with the Young Mens Buddhist Association (YMBA) in Kandy. Currently we are expanding to aid more families in Sri Lanka that are struggling through the pandemic.

Description:
ABORASTORY is een beweging waarbij Kleinkunst en podiumkunstenaars samenwerken aan projecten en voorstellingen. 

Ontdek de kracht van verhalen
Alles is verhaal. Zonder verhalen zouden wij niet weten wie wij zijn. Laborastory gaat over die verhalen. Hoe vertel je ze? Hoe pas je ze toe? Hoe geef je ze vorm?
Laborastory wil vooral mensen in staat stellen dit te ontdekken. Geen pasklare
antwoorden maar een gezamenlijke zoektocht. Dit kan bijvoorbeeld door te kijken hoe je persoonlijke of maatschappelijke processen kunt versterken met verhalen. Maar ook uitproberen hoe je verhalen kan combineren met andere( kunstzinnige) disciplines.

Laborastory doet dit o.a. door

    Zelf voorstellingen en optredens te verzorgen.
    Projecten begeleiden om hun verhaal te versterken of duidelijk vorm te geven.
    Opgedane kennis over hoe je verhalen kan toepassen of vorm geven te delen. 

 Verhalen zijn het bindmiddel van de maatschappij. Juist in deze tijd van verregaande (en noodzakelijke) veranderingen kunnen ze een houvast bieden. Laborastory wil dit mede vorm geven.

Name: Nieuw Ondernemen
Description: Nieuw Ondernemen begeleidt transities naar nieuwe oplossingen. We bieden diverse programma’s en workshops om een ondernemende mindset te ontwikkelen. Door co-creatie en crowd sourcing, vergroten we de denkkracht, de creativiteit, het netwerk en de impact. We maken gebruik van “nieuwe gereedschappen” om mensen optimaal te ondersteunen om een idee in zeer korte tijd tot een succesvol duurzaam product of dienst te ontwikkelen. Samen mobiliseren we de kracht en mogelijkheden van mensen, treden buiten de gebaande paden en creëren nieuwe structuren en nieuwe kansen. Er ontstaan dwarsverbindingen door bestaande sectoren (transdisciplinariteit), die meerwaarde genereren. Het programma creëert met de deelnemers een broedplaats voor innovatie en valorisatie. De kracht van Nieuw Ondernemen is de multidisciplinaire werkwijze, waarbij globaal gedacht wordt en lokaal geacteerd. Door het verbinden van sociale, ecologische en economische duurzaamheid dragen we bij aan sociale innovatie in een markt die zich enorm aan het ontwikkelen is zonder dat dit ten koste gaat van mensen, dieren en milieu.

Name: Bounce Forward Women and Girls Development Agency
Description:
Bounce Forward is an independently run Women’s Development Agency to make a real and lasting difference to the lives of young girls and women.  We engage across all traditions, faiths and ethnicities with women based in the most disadvantaged urban and rural areas of Sheffield City Region. Our work covers a wide scope and keeps us right at the heart of women in local communities. 

Our Values
•	Empowerment – Women and men should have equal rights and opportunities. Women outnumber men by 1.2 million in the UK yet face persistent discrimination. This needs to change 
•	Collaboration – Women and girls are the experts in their own lives. All our work is co-designed with the people we work with as we believe local knowledge drives long-term solutions.
•	Transformation – We believe with the right skills, confidence and aspirations women can have a transformative impact on their own lives, those of their children and their community.
•	Creativity – We believe creativity exists in everyone and is a powerful approach in confronting problems.  It can release tension and contribute to happier, healthier lives.

Name: Tuneflash
Description:
Sind wir ehrlich, jeder von uns liebt Musik. Und jeder liebt es, das eigene Leben mit anderen zu teilen. Wieso nicht beides kombinieren? Genau das ist Tuneflash. Bei uns geht es um den Moment, um das Gänsehaut-Feeling, wenn die Bässe wummern oder die Sonne im Meer versinkt - um die Möglichkeit deine Freunde daran teilhaben zu lassen und sie für kurze Zeit in deine Welt eintauchen zu lassen. Egal ob auf dem Festival nebenan, oder über Kopfhörer in der Bahn.

Mit Tuneflash hast du die Möglichkeit Momente, in denen du dir mit Musik die Welt verschönerst, einzufangen und ganz einfach mit deinen Freunden zu teilen.

Wie funktioniert Tuneflash?

Erstelle dir ein Profil und du kannst mit der In-App Kamerafunktion ein Foto aufnehmen oder eines aus deiner eigenen Mediathek auswählen. Nachdem du das Bild mit einem beliebigen Song verbunden hast, kannst du deinen Moment mit deinen Followern teilen. Nun haben deine Freunde die Möglichkeit deine Beiträge nicht nur zu sehen, sondern auch zu hören um sich so für einen Tuneflash Moment in deine Welt hineinzuversetzen.

Name: LC Disability Consulting
Description:
LM Disability Consulting was founded out of a passion to assist public and private agencies with navigating the complexities of disability access compliance while building pathways to maximize accessibility.  It is the case at many municipalities that the ADA Coordinator is someone with a regular, full-time job who has been tasked with being the agencies Coordinator, as required by law. This individual rarely has had access to the training and experience necessary to implement a comprehensive accessibility program. Likewise, many businesses struggle to understand what steps they must take to reach and serve their clients with disabilities. This is where LM Disability Consulting can help! Our wide menu of services allows us to help you address any accessibility challenge or initiative you may undertake. Even the most seasoned ADA Coordinator may need support to expand bandwidth, and we are here to give you as much, or as little support as you want. All of our services are designed to be customized to your organization's unique needs!

Our Mission
To provide our clients with the knowledge, tools, support and confidence to not only comply with disability laws and regulations, but to maximize access for people with disabilities.

Our Vision
Successfully managing the disability access profiles of clients nationwide, while providing customized accessibility solutions for a diverse customer base.

Name: Anette Ludikhuize coaching & training
Description:
Gericht op:

Loopbaancoaching
Loopbaancoaching kan gericht zijn op het maken van een volgende stap in je carrière of op het vinden van een andere baan. Dit kan zijn binnen of buiten de organisatie waar nu je nu werkt. Deze vorm van coaching ondersteunt ook het vinden van een passende baan na het beëindigen van je studie.

Persoonlijke coaching
Wanneer je bent vastgelopen in je leven, of je staat voor een (grote) verandering in je leven, kan een persoonlijk coachingstraject je een waardevolle ondersteuning bieden.

Bij persoonlijke coaching staan jouw kwaliteiten, jouw manier van leven en leren centraal. Daarbij proberen we om weer orde en overzicht te scheppen in wat er actueel is in jouw bestaan. Dat helpt om te komen tot nieuwe inzichten in jouw eigen handelen in combinatie met je omgeving.

Teamcoaching en teamtraining
Bij het werken in teamverband is het essentieel dat de teamleden in verbinding staan met elkaar. Dit betekent elkaar aanvullen en elkaar aanspreken op het handelen, zodat je samen verantwoordelijkheid neemt voor de te behalen resultaten. Ik begeleid teams om deze stappen met elkaar te maken.

Name: Digimox
Description:
Digimox är ett företag med visionen att digitalisera och förbättra restaurangupplevelsen genom att använda modern teknik som surfplattor och smartphones. 

Med en allt högre andel människor som använder surfplattor växer marknaden för digitala tjänster markant. Dessutom blir fler och fler vana vid digitalisering och tillgänglig service. Digimox erbjuder digital mat- och drinkmenyer till restauranger, barer och hotell. Nu blir det möjligt för restauranger att ta emot flera beställningar och därmed öka sin försäljning. 
 
Digimox är en "digital servitris" som är ständigt redo att hjälpa gästen, så att de slipper vänta på att beställa, oberoende om det finns ledig personal eller inte. Menyerna anpassas för att maximera restaurangens säljflöde, öka omsättningen och höja gästens upplevelse.
 
Med digimox presenteras menyerna/rätterna med aptitretande bilder, tydliga presentationer, allergivarningar och ingredienser. Dessutom kan restaurangen öka merförsäljningen genom att rekommendera rätter, drycker och diverse tillbehör. Med en enkel klick kan man få sina internationella gäster att känna sig särskilt välkomna genom att presentera menyn på olika språk och priset i olika valutor. En av de mest värdefulla funktionerna i digimox är gästens omdöme. Att få reda på vad gäster tycker om servicen, maten, personalen och annat är viktigt för att kunna förbättra verksamheten. Det finns garanterat många gäster som vill tycka till. Nu kan restauranger på ett snabbt och diskret sätt få information om hur gästerna tycker och upplever.
 
Även för personalen finns det stora fördelar. Stressen minskar betydligt då den "digitala servitrisen" kan ta emot fler beställningar från varje bord. Det är enkelt att ta bort en rätt som tagit slut för dagen och byta ut något som förändrats. Menyerna kan skräddarsys och erbjudas med kombinationer av olika rätter, drycker och tillbehör. Det går snabbt och restaurangen slipper betala för tryckkostnader och dessutom värnar om miljön.

Name: Born From My Heart Adoptions
Description:
Welcome Current or To Be Parents of Privately Adopted, Foster to Adopt or Foster Children! Whether you are currently an adoptive parent or are thinking about adoption as an option for you and your family we are here to support you. Whether you have found your way to adoption due to struggles with infertility, miscarriages, unplanned circumstance or you have always planned to adopt there will be others in this group that can empathize with your journey. I created this group in order to provide the opportunity to network, share, and learn from other adoptive parents who are experiencing or have experienced the same things as you.

My name is Ronette Clarke Williams and my husband and I have two children, who both happen to be adopted. We adopted my daughter through a private agency almost 12.5 years ago when she was 7 weeks old. We adopted my son through Foster to Adopt 7 years ago when he was 6. Our children are 5 months apart which definitely causes some eyebrow raises as my son is an entire foot taller than my daughter. LOL. There is also an interesting twist to my son's adoption and I will share that as the group expands.

I am an Adoption Advocate, Adoption Coach and the Creator of the Born From My Heart Adoption Program. I am so thrilled to have this opportunity to serve and walk through this journey with you.

Always Remember...

Not flesh of my flesh
Nor bone of my bone
but still Miraculously my own.

Never forget for a single minute
You did not grow under my heart
but in it.

About 70% of our world is covered by shifting waters, and Wayves uses the power of the boating community to create up-to-date maps of these areas. Whether it's marking a favorite fishing spot, tracking the migration of an endangered species, or letting nearby boaters know where you're scuba diving, Wayves puts the power of charting the oceans in your hands.

It can also lead you wherever you want to go. It can find you the perfect little-known restaurant, or let you know whether the closest pump-out or fueling station is open and operational. If you enjoy spending time on or near the water, let us take the helm and simply follow the Wayves!

Description: Mensen zijn zo gefocust op wat ze later willen bereiken in het leven dat ze vrijwel alleen naar de toekomst kijken, zonder stil te staan bij wat ze al hebben bereikt. Wij geloven erin dat iemand later moet kunnen kijken naar de bijzondere momenten in het leven die hebben bijgedragen aan het vormen van de persoon.  Herinneringen worden te snel worden vergeten en wij vinden dat deze gekoesterd moeten worden, omdat dit een van de mooiste dingen zijn die het leven ons biedt. Wij geloven erin dat je herinneringen tastbaar moet maken voor jezelf, je toekomst en voor je nabestaanden, en dat wanneer je deze wereld verlaat, je dat met een gerust hart kan doen wetende dat je alles goed hebt afgesloten en  achtergelaten voor je nabestaanden, zonder angst om confrontaties aan te moeten gaan in je laatste levensfase om keuzes te verantwoorden.  Wij willen mensen laten stilstaan en laten inzien hoe mooi het leven is, en ze met behulp van deze app het leven te laten vieren. Wanneer de laatste levensfase in zicht is, streven ernaar wij om met deze app zoveel mogelijk steun en comfort te kunnen bieden om het afscheid te verlichten. Ons motto is dan ook: “Sta stil bij de kleine dingen in het leven die later de grote momenten zijn geweest.”

Name: Groves Park Commons
Description:
What is Groves Park Commons?

Groves Park Commons is a Traditional Neighborhood Development. TND is a philosophy of community, a way of not ‘just building a house,' but designing a home to compliment a lifestyle. It's a comprehensive approach to designing a community that's in harmony with the land, and extends that synchronization into every feature of a neighborhood and home. It's a walking community, it's an active neighborhood, and it's a little slice of heaven.

When you drive into Groves Park Commons, you will feel the difference immediately. It is a district of tree-shaded sidewalks that meander into elegant green spaces, with Fountains and people. You see, people are the real key to the Groves Park Commons plan. And it was people right here in Oak Ridge that invested over a year of information gathering and planning before the first bit of earth was turned. The result is a site plan that is designed around Aesthetics, views from every window, all utilities hidden from sight and inviting green space that will pull you out into nature.

Groves Park Commons is a community where kids will have places to play and safely ride bikes, and parents will stop putting off getting back in shape. It will be a village of friends who enjoy knowing their neighbors and place where golden memories will be made. And it's so much more!

"Project management is the discipline of initiating, planning, executing, controlling, and closing the work of a team to achieve specific goals and meet specific success criteria. 
A project is a temporary endeavor designed to produce a unique product, service or result with a defined beginning and end (usually time-constrained, and often constrained by funding or deliverables) undertaken to meet unique goals and objectives, typically to bring about beneficial change or added value. 
The temporary nature of projects stands in contrast with business as usual or operations which are repetitive, permanent, or semi-permanent functional activities to produce products or services. In practice, the management of these two systems is often quite different, and as such requires the development of distinct technical skills and management strategies."

We provide the means to acheive project goals within the given restraints.

Name: B2B Analytics Ltd
Description:
B2B Analytics Ltd. is a development company who specialise in data solutions using basic Microsoft Office programmes. After project leading multiple expensive third-party programmes into business’ we found that not all of the software was being utilized. This one size fits all approach is both expensive to maintain and expensive to create which means a higher cost to the end user. This is why we decided to go “Back to Basics” which is what our company name B2B stands for. We wanted to give customers the software and tools they needed at a cost they wanted.

We began this company with a simple goal in mind. To use our experience and expertise to provide a service based on programmes you already have. Our team can produce any project your business needs to thrive. From a simple spreadsheet that tracks your spending to a fully integrated ERP system which tracks and aids every aspect of your business. For every step of every project we will be in continuous contact with you to ensure you’re receiving exactly what you wanted. We understand that business changes daily and that the best ideas can happen during the early stages of a project. Because of this we have a creeping scope allowance which makes us as flexible as your business needs us to be.

Our aim is to offer you the service you want for a price which is fair.

- Lieferung von Senkelektroden zur Herstellung von Einsätzen für die Produktion von Kunststoffzahnrädern.
- Zahnrad-Schulung
- Coaching neuer Mitarbeiter im technischen Büro, in der Produktion oder in der Messtechnik.

Allgemeines Know-How:
- Parametrische und geometrische Berechnungen an Verzahnungen und Verzahnungswerkzeugen (evolventisch und nicht-evolventisch).
- Planung und objektorientierte Realisierung kundenspezifischer Softwaresysteme.
- 2D und 3D Vektorgrafik und Rastergrafik.

Camp Grit creates a unique environment outside the home or classroom, unplugged and more self-aware. It is an Outdoor Education! Families return to camp to renew their spirits and familial purpose. Camp Grit leverages the wilds of the outdoors, coupled with intentional programs to instill leadership characteristics and creativity into the lives of kids. At the same time, bringing in executive style training for the youth staff to create leaders of consequence for this chaotic, fickle and ephemeral world (Tom Peters) in which we live in. Social entrepreneurship requires an experiential Camp environment, where youth take risks, get messy and develop true grit. Integrate the Camp Grit concept into an existing camp or help me start a new one to serve your community. Let’s begin discussing your favorite camp story, for the next generation.

Name: Ignatz & Co
Description:
We focus on providing retailers, restaurants,  auditors, distributors, chain stores and other FMCG companies with solutions to enforce standard operating procedures, checklists, forms and other operational functions, through our OPELINT mobility platform, which allows businesses to manage processes and procedures on a smartphone or tablet. In addition to our mobility solution that allows us to convert any paper based checklist, forms, contract or process into smart forms available on our app, we also have a business dashboard solution that enables businesses to display relevant information in the right locations live on screens throughout the business. 

The combination of these two solutions were developed in order to increase efficiency and save costs. The need for creating excel reports for each department and printing them is now substituted with our solution that can capture and display any information.

Our 'Operational Electronic Intelligence' platform or OPELINT for short, can time the duration it takes to complete checklists, validates the physical location of an employee or manager as they progress through the business completing their tasks, OPELINT can capture  text, numbers, locations, date, time, signatures, annotations, photos, audio, video, scan bar-codes, QR codes, NFC tags and can even do advanced calculations similar to that of excel. We offer a white label solution that allows us to create a branded business app for your company and our back office system allows drag and drop design of your own forms, checklists or procedures. Through this system we can convert any paper based check or measure into a smart form or business app available on Android devices, iOS devices and even Windows desktop.

Our 'Analyst Intelligence Information Display and Exploitation System' or AIDES for short can be linked to Google Sheets, OPELINT, MySQL, SalesForce, FreshBooks, Xero, Facebook and many more, in order to display information from these sources.

Name: Jacob's Ladder Youth Alternatives, Inc.
Description:
As Criminal Justice professionals we see children and young adults get swallowed up by a system all too ready to attach a label to their backs and usher them through revolving doors of courtrooms, which eventually lead down paths to jails, prisons, unemployment, and sometimes worse. Broken homes and absent fathers, overworked and underpaid teachers in the public school system, apathetic and disconnected churches and a general lack of community resources are just a few of the problems we typically hear about when discussing the plight of our young people. What are the solutions? How can we change the dismal outcomes and turn things around?  

The real problem is there simply aren’t enough solutions. Jacob’s Ladder Youth Alternatives, Inc. recognizes that and has one single focus: to develop solutions to problems that plague our youth and lead them down paths to education and employment. We recognize the need for communities to increase resources and programs and invest in young people in a different way. Instead of paying, on average, $31000 per year to house a young person in prison, a better return on that investment could be in helping him complete his education, training him in a green job or just teaching him to read and improving his self-worth.

Jacob’s Ladder Youth Alternatives, Inc. have solutions. If we don’t have the solution – we will create one! The future of our children and the young people in our communities is depending on us to make a difference.

Description:
Built from the concepts developed by CEO, Isaac Richi, Ghostli is an architect of turn-key income streams, active and profitable within 5 days of launch. He aimed to end the classic deterrent of would-be great entrepreneurs, lack of capital or means.

 Isaac believed that he needed to share the vast library of knowledge and intellect he'd amassed, to design and build true, turn-key business systems that could be made accessible to anyone hunting for the dream of freedom. Isaacs belief was and still is, that there are genius entrepreneurs working the counter at the grocery store, due to paths chosen and he, being a poor kid who scraped for everything he ever got, was passionate. 

Isaac knew how to build complex, algorithmic commerce systems that were previously reserved only for large companies, fully staffed and capitalized. Isaac, an entrepreneur from the age of 3, wanted to make the dream and freedom of ownership a reality for anyone. He needed a way to instantly generate a $50K income stream for a new entrepreneur, then allowing them to automate the stream and repeat the process, amassing an enterprise. 

"If Entrepreneurship were available to all, it would change the world." - 

 To explore this concept, Isaac looked to the overwhelmingly vast catalog of SaaS and application solutions, available on the market today. Swimming through all of the various productivity, optimization, collaboration, content production, business management and efficiency solutions available, Ghostli was born, the perfect algorithmic approach to micro-streams of income, fully automated. 

Quickly he got to work testing, sorting, cataloging, integrating, implementing and structuring different algorithmic workflows with the solutions and software options he found worked optimally in his systems. 3 months passed, 6 months, a year when finally the perfect algorithmic system finally clicked into place.

Name: David B. Morris Foundation
Description:
Our Mission

David B. Morris Foundation aims to promote community service initiatives in Canton, Pennsylvania and surrounding areas.

Our Strategy

The primary aim of this foundation is to fund a scholarship given in the name of David B. Morris to an outstanding graduating senior at Canton Area High School who excelled in community service and outreach during their time in school. To that end, the strategic action for the David B Morris Foundation will be to sponsor events and other fundraising processes by which an endowment can be raised to continue to scholarship for many years. Additionally, it is the long-term goal and hope of the David B. Morris Foundation board of directors to also provide assistance and sponsorship to other community initiatives in the region.

Our Story

Reverend David B. Morris of Canton, Pennsylvania, left a legacy of service which continues to inspire individuals in the community. It is in his name and with this spirit that we formed the David B. Morris Foundation to promote community service initiatives in both Canton and the surrounding region.

Name: San- Tech Solutions and Consultancy Services
Description:
San-Tech Solutions and Consultancy services, is a Malawian hygiene and sanitation social enterprise established in 2019. Our aim is to increase access to quality and affordable reusable sanitary pads for girls through production of low-cost and innovative sanitary pad making-machine. Our mission is to provide pad producers with low-cost and innovative sanitary pad making-machine capable of producing high quality and affordable reusable pads for low income women and girls. Our vision is to become innovation leader in Sanitation and Hygiene in Malawi by 2021 and Sub Sahara Africa by 2025.
 Over 70% of vulnerable girls and women in rural Malawi do not have access to hygienic reusable sanitary pads. According to United Nation Population Fund (UNFPA), Malawian Girls miss 11% of school days due to menstruation and Girls Network Malawi (GENET) has mentioned lack of sanitary pads as one of the main causes of school dropout. Although there are None-Governmental Organizations (NGOs) and companies promoting production of reusable pads targeting vulnerable women and girls in school, the promoted process of making pads is hard, tiresome and expensive due to lack of efficient production tools and system 

Therefore, San Tech Solutions, innovated a reusable sanitary pad making machine. Product testing of SAN Tech pad making machines has indicated that our sanitary- pad making machine, can cut 2 pads in 39.5 seconds (100 pad templates in 32 minutes) in comparison to traditional way (template drawing and scissor cutting) which cut 2 pads in 4 minutes (100 pad templates in 3 Hours) . The machine saves three times labor expenses and reduces pad template cutting inaccuracy by 99% unlike traditional ways which has 66% cutting inaccuracy.

Services offered by San Tech Solutions and Consultancy Services include production of reusable sanitary pad making machine and pads, consultancy services, implementation of sanitation and hygiene grants and sell of pad making machine spare parts.

Estamos en App Store y en Google Play Store, descárgatela y empieza a regalar aciertos.

Name: Osuna Consulting
Description:
Jose Osuna is the Principal Consultant for Osuna Consulting. Prior to founding Osuna Consulting, Osuna was the Director of External Affairs at Homeboy Industries, a position he held as part of the executive management team with the organization. Jose led Homeboy’s external advocacy initiatives, such as ‘Banning the Box’ from employment applications. These issues are important to the population served at Homeboy Industries, where up to 75% of those who work in the program and seek their services have served prison terms and have felony convictions. Osuna continues to work in partnership with Homeboy Industries on numerous special projects, including the Global Homeboy Network, and most recently, establishing a Homeboy Alumni Network. Before working in external affairs, Osuna was the Director of Employment Services, as well as the head of the Solar Panel Installation Training and Certification Program – both at Homeboy Industries.

Jose Osuna first arrived at Homeboy Industries as a trainee enrolled in the eighteen-month program the organization offers. Prior to this, Osuna served thirteen years in prison, and had been involved in gangs since the age of ten. Nine years ago, Jose’s son Moises was killed as a result of gun violence – he was seventeen years old. Jose uses this experience, among many others, as the strongest motivating factors in his work at Osuna Consulting. By combining both his personal and professional experience, Osuna is able to bring a unique perspective and a fresh approach to his work.

Jose is uniquely qualified to provide consultation in a diverse set of areas, such as: gang rehabilitation, community based re-entry solutions, working with elected officials and community leaders to attain potential and appropriate private and governmental funding, general community organizing, and social justice advocacy efforts.

Jose is a current member of L.A. County’s Blue Ribbon Commission on Public Safety, appointed by L.A. County Supervisor Hilda Solis.

Description:
Stichting MENSEN DINGEN organiseert evenementen, workshops en andere activiteiten met en voor in nood verkerende mensen. De stichting zet zich in om de in problemen geraakte medemens te helpen, te steunen en te begeleiden op sociaal en cultureel maatschappelijk gebied.
 
Onze organisatie zet zich in om diverse (culturele) groeperingen bij het project / de activiteit te betrekken.
Bij het uitvoeren van het project / de activiteit, wordt zorg gedragen voor het voorkomen en het tegengaan van discriminatie wegens godsdienst, levensovertuiging, politieke gezindheid ras, geslacht, burgerlijke staat, leeftijd, seksuele voorkeur of op welke grond dan ook.

Doelstelling
Stichting MENSEN DINGEN weet dat een sociale en creatieve samenleving mogelijk is. Ze zien dat er veel mensen zijn die actief werken aan nieuwe of verbeterde oplossingen voor een betere wereld. De stichting steunt ook andere ondernemende organisaties die gericht zijn op het bedenken, ontwikkelen en uitvoeren van projecten en evenementen. Voor alle door de Stichting ondersteunde initiatieven geldt dat ze onvoorwaardelijk zijn in hun doel om een bijdrage te leveren aan de veilige, saamhorige,groene, sociale en creatieve samenleving in Lelystad.
 
Projecten
 
Aan Tafel
Is een project opgezet om gezinnen, die aantoonbaar onder de armoedegrens leven, een gezellige en gastronomische avond/dag kosteloos aan te bieden.
 
Sponsor projecten voor andere organisaties
De stichting biedt ook facilitaire ondersteuning aan lokale verenigingen en stichtingen

Name: Kendall Innovation Community Hub
Description:
What is KICH?
Kendal Innovation Community Hub (KICH) 
KICH connects experts and idea people to breathe new business life and innovation into the southern quadrant of Miami. People join us at KICH to develop new concepts, solve challenges and increase their likelihood of success. We aim to serve existing businesses and startups. The technology and business landscape continue to evolve at rapid a pace; KICH helps by sharing insight and expertise in a collaborative environment.

How does KICH work?
Every Monday evening KICH brings a speaker that will teach us about an important aspect of building a startup or running a successful business. After their educational presentation they will give us an exercise to work on our businesses and innovations. That way you can put what you have learned into action. The meeting will be at StartUP FIU West Kendall, 14591 SW 120th St, Miami, FL 33186 from 6 PM to 9 PM. Our first meeting will be on February 5th, 2018 and will focus on Design Thinking.

Who should come to KICH?
KICH needs the energy and vision of people with ideas, experts willing to share, operational people, early startups and businesses looking to trigger innovation. Come on by, see who we are and what we are building. See how you can get involved—you might be the next founder of a world-class startup or a breakthrough innovation.

To learn more please visit: http://visualdatasolutions.com/kich-miami

Description:
CSF is a 501C3 organization that primarily serves youth through performing arts and business youth programs that include training, certifications, mentors, and a number of opportunities to learn career and life skills. We also support other nonprofit organizations to increase capacity and develop programs.

Our Mission is to be servers of the community by aspiring to offer a holistic service with selflessness. We desire to educate, financially empower, and meet the emotional, physical, and spiritual needs of the community. We strive to bridge the educational and financial gap that divides the masses from the few. 

CSF was created to offer youth programs that are/will be effective at equipping our youth to be successful adults. This is to be accomplished through an array of programs that are rooted in the performing arts and business with a strong mentor and community service component. Currently, CSF is in the process of starting two youth programs TV Broadcasting and Therapeutic Arts. 

These programs are designed to use the performing arts as a way to engage youth, their families, and the community. These efforts should also lead to a youth enterprise that will provide employment opportunities for the youth. Program participants will receive certifications in TV Broadcasting from CANTV, entrepreneurship training, mentors, job readiness training, and assistance in preparing for college.

Name: Ken George Associates
Description:
Ken George Associates is your premier drug and alcohol program provider. For over 20 years, We have been assisting companies of all sizes in personalized implementation and management of drug and alcohol testing programs.

Ken George has over 25 years experience as a Consortium/Third Party Administrator (C/TPA) offering DOT and non-DOT drug and alcohol programs. We will connect you with local certified service agents to coordinate your drug and alcohol testing to meet your needs regardless of your location and hours of operation.

Our solutions include seminars, presentations, on-site testing/intervention, and custom programs.

Name: Courtem, LLC
Description:
Founded in Dallas, TX – Courtem, a mobile dating app, offers its users the ability to instantly propose unique date offers to one another.  Courtem is unlike any other dating application or web-based service as it brings the lost art of “courtship” back to the 21st century.  Once a date is proposed, the recipient has the option to immediately accept the date, reject the date, or better yet can opt to put the date offer on the open market for another user to view and attempt to out-do (i.e. present them with a more favorable offer).  After the date is accepted and completed, the two individuals are then asked to rate one another with ratings being visible to the entire user base. Courtem will revolutionize the on-line dating industry as we know it today by giving singles a 360-degree dating application which handles the dating process from start to finish, all through its proprietary software.

Singles join Courtem to see, “what someone might offer them as the best date of their life.”  Courtem goes beyond simply the shallow (at first glance) interactions of other dating apps.  We urge our users to thoroughly review another’s profile, interests, friends-in-common, proximity, and rating to help them develop their best date offer.  As always, Chivalry is the best policy.  Hence, the name Courtem.  We ask that you, “Court them on Courtem!”
